Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为RexDrug的基于大型语言模型的端到端推理增强关系提取框架，用于从生物医学文献中提取n元药物组合。RexDrug采用两阶段训练策略，包括多智能体协作机制生成推理轨迹和强化学习优化提取精度，并在DrugComb数据集上取得了优于现有方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有关系提取方法难以处理变量长度的n元药物组合，需要考虑复杂的兼容性逻辑和分布式的证据。为了解决这些局限性，需要一种能够有效建模n元药物组合的方法。

Method: RexDrug是一个基于大型语言模型的端到端推理增强关系提取框架。它采用了两阶段训练策略：1. 使用多智能体协作机制生成高质量的专家级推理轨迹进行监督微调；2. 应用强化学习和为DCE量身定制的多维度奖励函数来进一步优化推理质量和提取准确性。

Result: 在DrugComb数据集上的大量实验表明，RexDrug在n元提取方面持续优于最先进的基线方法。在DDI13语料库上的额外评估证实了其在二元药物-药物相互作用任务上的泛化能力。人类专家评估和自动推理指标进一步表明，RexDrug能够产生连贯的医学推理，同时准确识别复杂的治疗方案。

Conclusion: RexDrug是一个可扩展且可靠的解决方案，用于从非结构化文本中进行复杂的生物医学关系提取，尤其在n元药物组合提取方面表现出色。

Abstract: Automated Drug Combination Extraction (DCE) from large-scale biomedical literature is crucial for advancing precision medicine and pharmacological research. However, existing relation extraction methods primarily focus on binary interactions and struggle to model variable-length n-ary drug combinations, where complex compatibility logic and distributed evidence need to be considered. To address these limitations, we propose RexDrug, an end-to-end reasoning-enhanced relation extraction framework for n-ary drug combination extraction based on large language models. RexDrug adopts a two-stage training strategy. First, a multi-agent collaborative mechanism is utilized to automatically generate high-quality expert-like reasoning traces for supervised fine-tuning. Second, reinforcement learning with a multi-dimensional reward function specifically tailored for DCE is applied to further refine reasoning quality and extraction accuracy. Extensive experiments on the DrugComb dataset show that RexDrug consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines for n-ary extraction. Additional evaluation on the DDI13 corpus confirms its generalizability to binary drugdrug interaction tasks. Human expert assessment and automatic reasoning metrics further indicates that RexDrug produces coherent medical reasoning while accurately identifying complex therapeutic regimens. These results establish RexDrug as a scalable and reliable solution for complex biomedical relation extraction from unstructured text. The source code and data are available at https://github.com/DUTIR-BioNLP/RexDrug

</details>


### [431] [TildeOpen LLM: Leveraging Curriculum Learning to Achieve Equitable Language Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08182)
*Toms Bergmanis,Martins Kronis,Ingus Jānis Pretkalniņš,Dāvis Nicmanis,Jeļizaveta Jeļinska,Roberts Rozis,Rinalds Vīksna,Mārcis Pinnis*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了TildeOpen LLM，一个包含34种欧洲语言的300亿参数开源模型，旨在解决低资源语言的性能不足问题，并通过数据增强和课程学习策略提高了模型在非英语语言上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在许多欧洲语言上的表现不佳，原因是训练数据中英语和其他高资源语言占主导地位，导致语言资源不均衡。本文旨在促进语言公平，提高低资源语言的性能。

Method: 作者训练了一个300亿参数的TildeOpen LLM模型，覆盖34种欧洲语言。为解决数据不均衡问题，采用了数据集上采样和课程式训练策略，在均匀分布和自然语言分布之间交替训练。

Result: TildeOpen LLM在文本生成和理解方面表现优于其他多语言LLM，尤其在波罗的海、芬兰-乌戈尔语系和斯拉夫语系语言上表现突出。人类评估显示，与领先基线模型相比，语言错误减少高达十倍。该模型使用的计算资源显著少于其他模型。

Conclusion: 精心策划的数据集和平衡的训练策略可以显著提高多语言模型的质量，而无需增加模型大小或训练量。TildeOpen LLM的成功表明了这种方法的有效性，并为低资源语言的NLP研究提供了宝贵资源。

Abstract: Large language models often underperform in many European languages due to the dominance of English and a few high-resource languages in training data. This paper presents TildeOpen LLM, a 30-billion-parameter open-weight foundational model trained for 34 European languages to promote linguistic equity and improve performance for low-resource languages. To address the data imbalance, we combine dataset upsampling with a curriculum-based training schedule that alternates between uniform and natural language distributions. The resulting model performs favorably compared to other multilingual LLMs despite being trained with significantly fewer computing resources. Evaluation across multiple multilingual benchmarks shows that TildeOpen surpasses existing open-weight models in text generation and comprehension, particularly for Baltic, Finno-Ugric, and Slavic languages. Human evaluations confirm an up to tenfold reduction in linguistic errors relative to leading baselines. The model and associated resources are fully open-weight and publicly available at huggingface.co/TildeAI/TildeOpen-30b. These outcomes demonstrate that careful data curation and balanced training strategies can substantially enhance multilingual model quality without increasing model size or training volume.

</details>


### [432] [Supporting Workflow Reproducibility by Linking Bioinformatics Tools across Papers and Executable Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08195)
*Clémence Sebe,Olivier Ferret,Aurélie Névéol,Mahdi Esmailoghli,Ulf Leser,Sarah Cohen-Boulakia*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出CoPaLink，一个自动化的方法，用于将生物信息学工作流代码中的工具提及与其在论文描述中的提及联系起来，以提高工作流的透明度、可复现性和易用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物数据快速增长，对透明、可复现和文档完善的计算工作流的需求日益增加。需要将工作流代码中的生物信息学工具与其在论文中的描述联系起来，以改进工作流理解、支持可复现性和促进重用。

Method: CoPaLink 集成三个组件：1. 在科学文本中识别工具提及的命名实体识别（NER）；2. 在工作流代码中识别工具提及的NER；3. 基于生物信息学知识库的实体链接。该方法使用了包含已注解工具的科学文章和可执行工作流代码语料库。

Result: 在Nextflow工作流上，使用Bioconda和Bioweb知识库进行评估，CoPaLink 在三个步骤中均取得较高的F1值（84-89），联合准确率为66%。

Conclusion: CoPaLink 能够有效地将生物信息学工作流的叙述性描述与其代码实现联系起来，解决了当前工作流理解和可复现性方面的挑战。

Abstract: Motivation: The rapid growth of biological data has intensified the need for transparent, reproducible, and well-documented computational workflows. The ability to clearly connect the steps of a workflow in the code with their description in a paper would improve workflow understanding, support reproducibility, and facilitate reuse. This task requires the linking of Bioinformatics tools in workflow code with their mentions in a published workflow description. Results: We present CoPaLink, an automated approach that integrates three components: Named Entity Recognition (NER) for identifying tool mentions in scientific text, NER for tool mentions in workflow code, and entity linking grounded on Bioinformatics knowledge bases. We propose approaches for all three steps achieving a high individual F1-measure (84 - 89) and a joint accuracy of 66 when evaluated on Nextflow workflows using Bioconda and Bioweb Knowledge bases. CoPaLink leverages corpora of scientific articles and workflow executable code with curated tool annotations to bridge the gap between narrative descriptions and workflow implementations. Availability: The code is available at https://gitlab.liris.cnrs.fr/sharefair/copalink-experiments and https://gitlab.liris.cnrs.fr/sharefair/copalink. The corpora are also available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18526700, https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18526760 and https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18543814.

</details>


### [433] [The Conundrum of Trustworthy Research on Attacking Personally Identifiable Information Removal Techniques](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08207)
*Sebastian Ochs,Ivan Habernal*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 现有PII去除技术的隐私保护能力被高估，因为以往的评估方法存在数据泄露和污染问题。出于隐私考虑，研究人员难以获得真实私有数据来客观评估这些技术，这阻碍了透明、可复现的研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PII去除技术在实际场景中的隐私保护能力受到质疑，因为之前的研究可能夸大了重建攻击的成功率。作者怀疑这是由于评估方法中的数据泄露和污染问题。

Method: 作者批判性地分析了现有PII去除技术的评估方法，识别出数据泄露和数据污染问题。他们提出应使用真正私有的数据源来避免这些问题，从而进行客观评估。

Result: 以往对PII去除技术重建攻击的评估方法存在缺陷，未能充分隔离或排除数据泄露和污染，导致对PII去除技术实际隐私保护能力的判断可能不准确。

Conclusion: 需要使用真正私有的数据来进行客观、可信赖的PII去除技术评估。然而，由于对私有数据的严格访问限制，公开的研究社区难以以透明、可复现的方式解决这一问题。

Abstract: Removing personally identifiable information (PII) from texts is necessary to comply with various data protection regulations and to enable data sharing without compromising privacy. However, recent works show that documents sanitized by PII removal techniques are vulnerable to reconstruction attacks. Yet, we suspect that the reported success of these attacks is largely overestimated. We critically analyze the evaluation of existing attacks and find that data leakage and data contamination are not properly mitigated, leaving the question whether or not PII removal techniques truly protect privacy in real-world scenarios unaddressed. We investigate possible data sources and attack setups that avoid data leakage and conclude that only truly private data can allow us to objectively evaluate vulnerabilities in PII removal techniques. However, access to private data is heavily restricted - and for good reasons - which also means that the public research community cannot address this problem in a transparent, reproducible, and trustworthy manner.

</details>


### [434] [Sensivity of LLMs' Explanations to the Training Randomness:Context, Class & Task Dependencies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08241)
*Romain Loncour,Jérémie Bogaert,François-Xavier Standaert*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究调查了Transformer模型解释的可解释性如何受到随机性、句法上下文、类别和任务的影响，发现任务的影响最大，句法上下文的影响最小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer模型在自然语言处理领域已成为主流，但其决策过程的可解释性仍然是一个挑战。以往的研究表明，相同的模型在相同数据上进行训练，仅随机种子不同就可能导致截然不同的解释。因此，本研究旨在深入探究随机性对模型解释的影响因素。

Method: 本研究通过实验，系统地分析了句法上下文、学习类别和任务这三个因素对Transformer模型解释对随机性敏感度的影响。通过对比不同设置下的模型解释，进行统计学分析以量化各因素的影响程度。

Result: 研究结果表明，句法上下文、学习类别和任务都对模型解释的随机性敏感度有统计学上显著的影响。其中，句法上下文的影响最小，学习类别的中等，而任务的影响最大。

Conclusion: 本研究证实了Transformer模型解释对随机性的敏感度并非均匀分布，而是受到句法上下文、学习类别和任务的显著影响，并且影响程度各不相同，任务的影响尤为突出。这为理解和改进Transformer模型的可解释性提供了重要的见解。

Abstract: Transformer models are now a cornerstone in natural language processing. Yet, explaining their decisions remains a challenge. It was shown recently that the same model trained on the same data with a different randomness can lead to very different explanations. In this paper, we investigate how the (syntactic) context, the classes to be learned and the tasks influence this explanations' sensitivity to randomness. We show that they all have statistically significant impact: smallest for the (syntactic) context, medium for the classes and largest for the tasks.

</details>


### [435] [Not All Queries Need Deep Thought: CoFiCot for Adaptive Coarse-to-fine Stateful Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08251)
*Dongxu Zhang,Hongqiang Lin,Yiding Sun,Pengyu Wang,Qirui Wang,Ning Yang,Jihua Zhu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CoFiCot框架，通过多指标分类器自适应地分配推理资源，解决LLM推理中的计算资源分配不均问题，提升简单任务效率和复杂任务准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM推理方法在测试时计算量扩展上面临统一计算悖论，即简单任务资源浪费，复杂任务资源不足。需要一种能够根据问题难度动态调整推理策略的框架。

Method: CoFiCot框架使用多指标分类器（结合语义熵、共识可靠性和预测推理深度）对查询进行分类。对于简单查询，采用高效聚合；对于复杂查询，则进入上下文感知纠正循环。纠正过程被形式化为状态化顺序传播，每个修复都依赖于先前修复的历史记录。通过集成过程奖励模型（PRMs）来处理状态依赖的轨迹，以实现精细的错误定位和全局逻辑一致性。

Result: CoFiCot能够有效地区分简单和复杂任务，为简单任务提供高效的推理，同时为复杂任务提供更深入的、上下文感知的纠正，避免了无状态方法中常见的上下文碎片化问题。

Conclusion: CoFiCot框架通过自适应地分配计算资源，能够显著提升LLM在推理任务中的表现，尤其是在复杂推理任务上，能够更有效地进行错误纠正并保持逻辑一致性。

Abstract: Scaling test-time computation enhances LLM reasoning ability but faces a uniform computation paradox. Allocating identical resources leads to over-correction on simple tasks and insufficient refinement on complex ones. To address this, we propose CoFiCot, a coarse-to-fine adaptive framework that dynamically tailors inference strategies to problem difficulty. Specifically, we implement a multi-metric classifier that triages queries by synthesizing semantic entropy, consensus reliability, and predicted reasoning depth . This enables a differentiated refinement stage that applies efficient aggregation for simple queries while routing complex ones to a context-aware correction loop . We formalize correction as a stateful sequential propagation process , where each repair is strictly conditioned on the verified history of prior rectifications. By integrating Process Reward Models (PRMs) within this state-dependent trajectory, CoFiCot effectively bridges the gap between granular error localization and global logical coherence, preventing the context fragmentation typical of stateless refinement methods.

</details>


### [436] [NCL-UoR at SemEval-2026 Task 5: Embedding-Based Methods, Fine-Tuning, and LLMs for Word Sense Plausibility Rating](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08256)
*Tong Wu,Thanet Markchom,Huizhi Liang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究比较了三种方法（基于嵌入、Transformer微调、LLM提示）在词义合理性评分任务上的表现，发现结构化LLM提示配合决策规则效果最佳，且提示设计比模型规模更重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要预测人类对歧义同形词在故事语境下的词义合理性评分（1-5分）。

Method: 系统比较了三种方法：1. 句子嵌入与标准回归器；2. Transformer模型参数高效微调；3. 大语言模型（LLM）的结构化提示和明确决策规则。

Result: 结构化提示策略（将评估分解为叙事组件并应用明确决策规则）表现最优，显著优于微调模型和基于嵌入的方法。提示设计比模型规模对任务影响更大。

Conclusion: 结构化LLM提示配合明确的决策规则是解决词义合理性评分任务的有效方法，并且在设计LLM提示时，应关注其结构和推理规则，而非仅依赖于模型规模。

Abstract: Word sense plausibility rating requires predicting the human-perceived plausibility of a given word sense on a 1--5 scale in the context of short narrative stories containing ambiguous homonyms. This paper systematically compares three approaches: (1) embedding-based methods pairing sentence embeddings with standard regressors, (2) transformer fine-tuning with parameter-efficient adaptation, and (3) large language model (LLM) prompting with structured reasoning and explicit decision rules. The best-performing system employs a structured prompting strategy that decomposes evaluation into narrative components (precontext, target sentence, ending) and applies explicit decision rules for rating calibration. The analysis reveals that structured prompting with decision rules substantially outperforms both fine-tuned models and embedding-based approaches, and that prompt design matters more than model scale for this task. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/tongwu17/SemEval-2026-Task5.

</details>


### [437] [How Much Do LLMs Hallucinate in Document Q&A Scenarios? A 172-Billion-Token Study Across Temperatures, Context Lengths, and Hardware Platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08274)
*JV Roig*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究使用名为 RIKER 的新评估方法，对 35 个大型语言模型在不同上下文长度、温度设置和硬件平台上进行了大规模评估，发现即使是最好的模型也会以可观的比例产生幻觉，并且幻觉率随上下文长度急剧增加。模型选择是影响幻觉率的最关键因素，而温度设置对准确性和幻觉有微妙的影响。研究还表明，事实检索能力和抗幻觉能力是不同的能力，并且结果在不同硬件平台上具有一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估大型语言模型（LLM）产生幻觉的方法存在局限性，如数据集易受污染、基于 LLM 的评估存在偏见以及评估规模不足。这阻碍了对 LLM 在实际应用中可靠性的准确衡量。

Method: 引入 RIKER（ground-truth-first evaluation methodology），一种能够进行确定性评分且无需人工标注的评估方法。在 35 个开放权重模型、三种上下文长度（32K、128K、200K token）、四种温度设置和三种硬件平台（NVIDIA H200、AMD MI300X、Intel Gaudi 3）上进行了超过 1720 亿 token 的评估。

Result: 1. 即使是表现最好的模型，在 32K 上也有 1.19% 的非微小幻觉率，顶级模型高达 5-7%；幻觉率随上下文长度急剧上升，在 128K 时几乎翻三倍，在 200K 时所有模型均超过 10%。2. 模型选择是影响准确性的最重要因素，准确率范围达 72 个百分点，模型家族比模型大小更能预测抗幻觉能力。3. 温度设置影响微妙：T=0.0 在约 60% 的情况下提供最佳整体准确率，但更高温度可减少大多数模型的幻觉率并显著降低连贯性损失（无限生成循环）。4. 事实检索能力和抗幻觉能力是独立的，擅长检索事实的模型仍可能编造不存在的事实。5. 结果在不同硬件平台上一致。

Conclusion: 大型语言模型在进行文档基础问答时会产生非微小的幻觉，且幻觉率随上下文长度的增加而急剧升高。模型本身的性能是决定幻觉率的关键因素，温度设置对准确率和幻觉有复杂影响。事实检索能力和抗幻觉能力是不同的，硬件平台对模型幻觉表现影响不大。

Abstract: How much do large language models actually hallucinate when answering questions grounded in provided documents? Despite the critical importance of this question for enterprise AI deployments, reliable measurement has been hampered by benchmarks that rely on static datasets vulnerable to contamination, LLM-based judges with documented biases, or evaluation scales too small for statistical confidence. We address this gap using RIKER, a ground-truth-first evaluation methodology that enables deterministic scoring without human annotation. Across 35 open-weight models, three context lengths (32K, 128K, and 200K tokens), four temperature settings, and three hardware platforms (NVIDIA H200, AMD MI300X, and Intel Gaudi 3), we conducted over 172 billion tokens of evaluation - an order of magnitude beyond prior work. Our findings reveal that: (1) even the best-performing models fabricate answers at a non-trivial rate - 1.19% at best at 32K, with top-tier models at 5 - 7% - and fabrication rises steeply with context length, nearly tripling at 128K and exceeding 10% for all models at 200K; (2) model selection dominates all other factors, with overall accuracy spanning a 72-percentage-point range and model family predicting fabrication resistance better than model size; (3) temperature effects are nuanced - T=0.0 yields the best overall accuracy in roughly 60% of cases, but higher temperatures reduce fabrication for the majority of models and dramatically reduce coherence loss (infinite generation loops), which can reach 48x higher rates at T=0.0 versus T=1.0; (4) grounding ability and fabrication resistance are distinct capabilities - models that excel at finding facts may still fabricate facts that do not exist; and (5) results are consistent across hardware platforms, confirming that deployment decisions need not be hardware-dependent.

</details>


### [438] [AdaCultureSafe: Adaptive Cultural Safety Grounded by Cultural Knowledge in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08275)
*Hankun Kang,Di Lin,Zhirong Liao,Pengfei Bai,Xinyi Zeng,Jiawei Jiang,Yuanyuan Zhu,Tieyun Qian*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一个新框架，通过整合文化知识描述、LLM自动查询生成和人工验证，构建了一个名为AdaCultureSafe的数据集，包含4.8K文化描述和48K安全与知识导向的查询。通过评估现有LLM，发现文化安全性和知识熟练度之间不存在显著相关性，并提出了一种知识为基础的方法来增强LLM的文化安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究在考虑文化安全性和文化知识时是分开的，未能认识到文化安全应以文化知识为基础。这阻碍了LLM生成符合特定文化背景的尊重性回复，使得适应性文化安全成为一项艰巨的任务。

Method: 提出一个新框架，整合权威文化知识描述策展、LLM自动化查询生成和大量人工验证，构建了一个名为AdaCultureSafe的数据集。然后，使用该数据集评估了三种流行的LLM家族在文化安全性和知识熟练度方面的表现，并通过探究潜在原因，提出了一种知识为基础的方法来增强LLM的响应生成过程。

Result: 构建了一个包含4.8K手动分解的细粒度文化描述和48K手动验证的安全与知识导向查询的数据集AdaCultureSafe。发现流行的LLM在文化安全性和知识熟练度之间没有显著相关性。探究了LLM内部与效用相关的神经元激活，发现这种相关性的缺失可能归因于预训练和后对齐目标的差异。

Conclusion: 文化安全性和文化知识的独立建模是不足的。LLM在文化安全性和知识熟练度方面存在脱节，这可能源于预训练和后对齐目标的不同。一种知识为基础的方法可以有效地提高LLM的文化安全性。

Abstract: With the widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs), respecting indigenous cultures becomes essential for models' culturally safety and responsible global applications. Existing studies separately consider cultural safety and cultural knowledge and neglect that the former should be grounded by the latter. This severely prevents LLMs from yielding culture-specific respectful responses. Consequently, adaptive cultural safety remains a formidable task. In this work, we propose to jointly model cultural safety and knowledge. First and foremost, cultural-safety and knowledge-paired data serve as the key prerequisite to conduct this research. However, the cultural diversity across regions and the subtlety of cultural differences pose significant challenges to the creation of such paired evaluation data. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework that integrates authoritative cultural knowledge descriptions curation, LLM-automated query generation, and heavy manual verification. Accordingly, we obtain a dataset named AdaCultureSafe containing 4.8K manually decomposed fine-grained cultural descriptions and the corresponding 48K manually verified safety- and knowledge-oriented queries. Upon the constructed dataset, we evaluate three families of popular LLMs on their cultural safety and knowledge proficiency, via which we make a critical discovery: no significant correlation exists between their cultural safety and knowledge proficiency. We then delve into the utility-related neuron activations within LLMs to investigate the potential cause of the absence of correlation, which can be attributed to the difference of the objectives of pre-training and post-alignment. We finally present a knowledge-grounded method, which significantly enhances cultural safety by enforcing the integration of knowledge into the LLM response generation process.

</details>


### [439] [Evaluating LLM-Based Grant Proposal Review via Structured Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08281)
*William Thorne,Joseph James,Yang Wang,Chenghua Lin,Diana Maynard*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究评估了大型语言模型（LLM）在审查高风险的EPSRC基金项目提案方面的能力和局限性。研究发现，分章节审查方法优于单次审查和多模型集成方法，但在检测清晰度问题方面仍有不足。LLM的反馈虽然大多有效，但更侧重合规性而非整体评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI辅助的基金项目提案数量激增，超出人工审查能力，研究旨在探究LLM在评估高风险基金项目提案方面的潜力与瓶颈。

Method: 使用六个EPSRC提案，构建了一个基于扰动的框架，探究LLM在六个质量维度（资金、时间、能力、一致性、清晰度和影响）上的敏感性。比较了三种审查架构：单次审查、分章节分析和“角色委员会”集成。

Result: 分章节分析在检测率和评分可靠性方面显著优于其他方法。然而，LLM对齐问题的识别能力较强，但对清晰度问题的检测效果不佳。LLM的反馈大多有效，但存在偏向合规性检查而非全面评估的问题。

Conclusion: 目前的LLM可以在EPSRC评审中提供补充价值，但存在高度变异性和评估重点不一致的问题，不应完全替代人工评审。

Abstract: As AI-assisted grant proposals outpace manual review capacity in a kind of ``Malthusian trap'' for the research ecosystem, this paper investigates the capabilities and limitations of LLM-based grant reviewing for high-stakes evaluation. Using six EPSRC proposals, we develop a perturbation-based framework probing LLM sensitivity across six quality axes: funding, timeline, competency, alignment, clarity, and impact. We compare three review architectures: single-pass review, section-by-section analysis, and a 'Council of Personas' ensemble emulating expert panels. The section-level approach significantly outperforms alternatives in both detection rate and scoring reliability, while the computationally expensive council method performs no better than baseline. Detection varies substantially by perturbation type, with alignment issues readily identified but clarity flaws largely missed by all systems. Human evaluation shows LLM feedback is largely valid but skewed toward compliance checking over holistic assessment. We conclude that current LLMs may provide supplementary value within EPSRC review but exhibit high variability and misaligned review priorities. We release our code and any non-protected data.

</details>


### [440] [LAMUS: A Large-Scale Corpus for Legal Argument Mining from U.S. Caselaw using LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08286)
*Serene Wang,Lavanya Pobbathi,Haihua Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了LAMUS，一个用于法律论证挖掘的新型大规模语料库，它结合了LLM自动标注和人工校验，并对各种语言模型在法律论证挖掘任务上的表现进行了评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有法律论证挖掘研究受限于大规模、高质量的美国判例（尤其是州级）标注数据集的缺乏。

Method: 使用数据中心化流程构建LAMUS语料库，包括大规模案例收集、基于LLM的自动标注和人工校验。将法律论证挖掘建模为六类句子分类任务，并评估了多种语言模型在零样本、少样本和思维链提示策略下的表现，并以LegalBERT作为监督基线。

Result: 思维链提示显著提升了LLM的性能；领域特定模型在零样本设置下表现更稳定；LLM辅助验证纠正了近20%的标注错误，提高了标签一致性；人工验证达到了0.85的Cohen's Kappa系数，证明了标注质量。

Conclusion: LAMUS语料库为未来的法律NLP研究提供了一个可扩展的资源和实证见解，并且通过LLM和人工协同的方式，提高了大规模法律文本标注的效率和质量。

Abstract: Legal argument mining aims to identify and classify the functional components of judicial reasoning, such as facts, issues, rules, analysis, and conclusions. Progress in this area is limited by the lack of large-scale, high-quality annotated datasets for U.S. caselaw, particularly at the state level. This paper introduces LAMUS, a sentence-level legal argument mining corpus constructed from U.S. Supreme Court decisions and Texas criminal appellate opinions. The dataset is created using a data-centric pipeline that combines large-scale case collection, LLM-based automatic annotation, and targeted human-in-the-loop quality refinement. We formulate legal argument mining as a six-class sentence classification task and evaluate multiple general-purpose and legal-domain language models under zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought prompting strategies, with LegalBERT as a supervised baseline. Results show that chain-of-thought prompting substantially improves LLM performance, while domain-specific models exhibit more stable zero-shot behavior. LLM-assisted verification corrects nearly 20% of annotation errors, improving label consistency. Human verification achieves Cohen's Kappa of 0.85, confirming annotation quality. LAMUS provides a scalable resource and empirical insights for future legal NLP research. All code and datasets can be accessed for reproducibility on GitHub at: https://github.com/LavanyaPobbathi/LAMUS/tree/main

</details>


### [441] [Using Multimodal and Language-Agnostic Sentence Embeddings for Abstractive Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08282)
*Chaimae Chellaf,Salima Mdhaffar,Yannick Estève,Stéphane Huet*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为 SBARThez 的新颖框架，用于生成更准确、简洁且具有摘要性的摘要，该框架利用多模态和多语言句子嵌入，并结合命名实体注入机制，尤其在低资源语言上表现出色，并支持跨语言摘要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式摘要模型容易产生“幻觉”（捏造不存在的信息），导致摘要不准确。研究旨在提高摘要的事实一致性，同时保持其摘要性和简洁性。

Method: 使用来自 LaBSE、SONAR 和 BGE-M3 等预训练模型的（多模态和多语言）句子嵌入，并将其输入到一个修改过的基于 BART 的法语模型中。引入了一种“命名实体注入”机制，将标记化的命名实体附加到解码器输入中，以增强摘要的事实一致性。

Result: SBARThez 框架在文本和语音输入上都具有竞争力，并且支持跨语言摘要。与基于 token 的基线相比，SBARThez 生成的摘要更简洁、更具摘要性，尤其在低资源语言上的性能表现更优。

Conclusion: SBARThez 框架通过融合多模态/多语言嵌入和命名实体注入，有效解决了生成式摘要中的事实不一致问题，并在摘要的简洁性、摘要性以及跨语言和低资源场景下都取得了良好的效果。

Abstract: Abstractive summarization aims to generate concise summaries by creating new sentences, allowing for flexible rephrasing. However, this approach can be vulnerable to inaccuracies, particularly `hallucinations' where the model introduces non-existent information. In this paper, we leverage the use of multimodal and multilingual sentence embeddings derived from pretrained models such as LaBSE, SONAR, and BGE-M3, and feed them into a modified BART-based French model. A Named Entity Injection mechanism that appends tokenized named entities to the decoder input is introduced, in order to improve the factual consistency of the generated summary. Our novel framework, SBARThez, is applicable to both text and speech inputs and supports cross-lingual summarization; it shows competitive performance relative to token-level baselines, especially for low-resource languages, while generating more concise and abstract summaries.

</details>


### [442] [Learning Multiple Utterance-Level Attribute Representations with a Unified Speech Encoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08312)
*Maryem Bouziane,Salima Mdhaffar,Yannick Estève*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一的语音基础模型后训练框架，该框架能够生成多种类型的句级表示，用于多模态和多语言应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的语音基础模型主要学习帧级表示，而一些后训练方法（如SAMU-XSLR和SONAR）学习句级语义表示，适用于多模态和多语言场景。研究者希望将这种句级表示扩展到任意的句级属性，并提出一个能生成多种句级表示的统一框架。

Method: 提出一个统一的后训练框架，该框架允许一个语音基础模型同时学习和生成多种类型的句级表示。通过联合学习语义和说话人表示来验证该方法的有效性。

Result: 该方法在多语言语音检索和说话人识别任务上取得了良好的效果，表明可以有效地联合学习和生成多种句级表示。

Conclusion: 提出的统一后训练框架能够有效地扩展语音基础模型以支持多种句级属性，并在多语言语音检索和说话人识别任务上展示了其能力。

Abstract: Speech foundation models trained with self-supervised learning produce generic speech representations that support a wide range of speech processing tasks. When further adapted with supervised learning, these models can achieve strong performance on specific downstream tasks. Recent post-training approaches, such as SAMU-XSLR and SONAR, align speech representations with utterance-level semantic representations, enabling effective multimodal (speech-text) and multilingual applications. While speech foundation models typically learn contextual embeddings at the acoustic frame level, these methods learn representations at the utterance level. In this work, we extend this paradigm to arbitrary utterance-level attributes and propose a unified post-training framework that enables a single speech foundation model to generate multiple types of utterance-level representations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach by jointly learning semantic and speaker representations and evaluating them on multilingual speech retrieval and speaker recognition tasks.

</details>


### [443] [SPD-RAG: Sub-Agent Per Document Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08329)
*Yagiz Can Akay,Muhammed Yusuf Kartal,Esra Alparslan,Faruk Ortakoyluoglu,Arda Akpinar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SPD-RAG是一个分层多智能体框架，通过将问题分解到文档层面来处理跨文档问答，有效解决了标准RAG和长上下文LLM在处理大规模文档时的局限性，并在LOONG基准测试中取得了优异的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准RAG在处理大量文档时存在证据不完整的问题，而长上下文LLM在处理海量输入时推理能力受限。研究旨在改进复杂、真实世界查询的跨文档问答能力。

Method: SPD-RAG采用分层多智能体框架，将文档处理分解到每个文档的独立智能体，然后由一个协调器调度任务并聚合各智能体的部分答案。答案通过分层Map-Reduce方法合成。

Result: 在LOONG基准测试中，SPD-RAG取得了58.1的平均得分，显著优于Normal RAG (33.0)和Agentic RAG (32.8)，且API成本仅为全上下文基线的38%。

Conclusion: SPD-RAG通过文档级别的专业化和集中式融合，提高了异构多文档问答的可扩展性和答案质量，同时提供了一个模块化、可扩展的检索流程。

Abstract: Answering complex, real-world queries often requires synthesizing facts scattered across vast document corpora. In these settings, standard retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines suffer from incomplete evidence coverage, while long-context large language models (LLMs) struggle to reason reliably over massive inputs. We introduce SPD-RAG, a hierarchical multi-agent framework for exhaustive cross-document question answering that decomposes the problem along the document axis. Each document is processed by a dedicated document-level agent operating only on its own content, enabling focused retrieval, while a coordinator dispatches tasks to relevant agents and aggregates their partial answers. Agent outputs are synthesized by merging partial answers through a token-bounded synthesis layer (which supports recursive map-reduce for massive corpora). This document-level specialization with centralized fusion improves scalability and answer quality in heterogeneous multidocument settings while yielding a modular, extensible retrieval pipeline. On the LOONG benchmark (EMNLP 2024) for long-context multi-document QA, SPD-RAG achieves an Avg Score of 58.1 (GPT-5 evaluation), outperforming Normal RAG (33.0) and Agentic RAG (32.8) while using only 38% of the API cost of a full-context baseline (68.0).

</details>


### [444] [Do Language Models Know Theo Has a Wife? Investigating the Proviso Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08358)
*Tara Azin,Daniel Dumitrescu,Diana Inkpen,Raj Singh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了语言模型如何处理“条件句中的预设不一致”问题，将其视为自然语言推理任务，并构建了一个诊断数据集。实验表明，尽管模型在一定程度上符合人类判断，但其推理是基于浅层模式匹配而非语义或语用推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理论和人类对条件句的预设解释存在分歧（即“proviso problem”），这是一个未解决的语用学难题。研究者希望探索语言模型在这方面的表现，并为评估模型的语用能力提供计算框架。

Method: 将“proviso problem”重构为自然语言推断（NLI）任务，并创建了一个专门用于检测条件句中预设投影的诊断数据集。使用RoBERTa、DeBERTa、LLaMA和Gemma等模型，并结合可解释性分析进行评估。

Result: 语言模型在很大程度上符合人类的判断，但在处理此问题时，主要依赖于浅层模式匹配，而非深层的语义或语用推理。

Conclusion: 本文首次为“proviso problem”提供了计算评估框架，并强调了在评估语言模型的语用能力和语境相关意义时，需要采用诊断性、多方法的研究途径。

Abstract: We investigate how language models handle the proviso problem, an unresolved issue in pragmatics where presuppositions in conditional sentences diverge between theoretical and human interpretations. We reformulate this phenomenon as a Natural Language Inference task and introduce a diagnostic dataset designed to probe presupposition projection in conditionals. We evaluate RoBERTa, DeBERTa, LLaMA, and Gemma using explainability analyses. The results show that models broadly align with human judgments but rely on shallow pattern matching rather than semantic or pragmatic reasoning. Our work provides the first computational evaluation framework for the proviso problem and highlights the need for diagnostic, multi-method approaches to assess pragmatic competence and context-dependent meaning in language models.

</details>


### [445] [Computational modeling of early language learning from acoustic speech and audiovisual input without linguistic priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08359)
*Okko Räsänen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文回顾了使用计算模型研究早期语言习得的最新进展，特别是关注自监督和视觉引导下的感知学习模型，展示了这些模型在无需强语言先验知识的情况下学习语音各个方面以及解释早期语言发展特征的能力，并讨论了现代学习模拟的日益现实化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管婴儿学习语言似乎毫不费力，但从信息处理的角度来看，从声学语音中习得语言是一项巨大的挑战。作者希望通过计算模型来理解这一过程。

Method: 本文回顾了使用计算模型，特别是自监督和视觉引导下的感知学习模型，来模拟早期语言习得过程。研究重点在于这些模型如何学习语音的各个方面，以及它们与婴儿语言发展实证结果的联系。

Result: 研究表明，自监督和视觉引导下的计算模型在无需强语言先验知识的情况下，能够越来越强大地学习语音的各个方面。这些模型揭示了早期语言发展中的许多特征可以通过一套共享的学习原则来解释，这些原则与多种语言习得理论和人类认知理论兼容。

Conclusion: 现代学习模拟正变得越来越逼真，能够更好地连接模型行为和婴儿语言发展的实证发现。通过计算模型的研究，可以更好地理解早期语言习得的机制，并解释其与人类认知和语言学理论的联系。

Abstract: Learning to understand speech appears almost effortless for typically developing infants, yet from an information-processing perspective, acquiring a language from acoustic speech is an enormous challenge. This chapter reviews recent developments in using computational models to understand early language acquisition from speech and audiovisual input. The focus is on self-supervised and visually grounded models of perceptual learning. We show how these models are becoming increasingly powerful in learning various aspects of speech without strong linguistic priors, and how many features of early language development can be explained through a shared set of learning principles-principles broadly compatible with multiple theories of language acquisition and human cognition. We also discuss how modern learning simulations are gradually becoming more realistic, both in terms of input data and in linking model behavior to empirical findings on infant language development.

</details>


### [446] [Adaptive Loops and Memory in Transformers: Think Harder or Know More?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08391)
*Markus Frey,Behzad Shomali,Ali Hamza Bashir,David Berghaus,Mehdi Ali*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究了一种结合了自适应循环和门控记忆的Transformer模型，以提高其推理能力，尤其是在数学推理方面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting虽然能实现语言模型的推理，但需要显式地阐述中间步骤。Looped transformers提供了另一种迭代精炼隐藏状态表征的方法，但其参数效率的代价是存储能力不如深层模型。因此，研究动机是探索一种既能进行自适应循环又能拥有额外存储能力的Transformer模型。

Method: 提出了一种结合自适应每层循环（通过学习到的停止机制迭代隐藏状态）和门控记忆库（提供额外的学习存储）的Transformer模型。研究分析了模型内部的工作机制，包括循环和记忆的使用情况。

Result: 发现在数学推理任务上，循环机制主要起到了提升作用；在常识推理任务上，记忆库有助于恢复性能。结合这两种机制的模型在数学基准测试中表现优于参数和FLOPs匹配但层数更多的基线模型。模型内部的分析显示出层专业化现象：早期层倾向于较少循环和访问记忆，而后期层则更多地使用这两种机制。

Conclusion: 自适应循环和门控记忆的结合是提高Transformer模型推理能力的一种有效方法，尤其是在数学推理方面，并且可以实现比传统深层模型更优的性能。模型内部的层专业化揭示了不同层在处理信息时的不同策略。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting enables reasoning in language models but requires explicit verbalization of intermediate steps. Looped transformers offer an alternative by iteratively refining representations within hidden states. This parameter efficiency comes at a cost, as looped models lack the storage capacity of deeper models which use unique weights per layer. In this work, we investigate transformer models that feature both adaptive per-layer looping, where each transformer block learns to iterate its hidden state via a learned halting mechanism, and gated memory banks, that provide additional learned storage. We find that looping primarily benefits mathematical reasoning, while memory banks help recover performance on commonsense tasks compared to parameter and FLOP matched models. Combining both mechanisms yields a model that outperforms an iso-FLOP baseline -- with three times the number of layers -- on math benchmarks. Analysis of model internals reveals layer specialization: early layers learn to loop minimally and access memory sparingly, while later layers do both more heavily.

</details>


### [447] [COACH meets QUORUM: A Framework and Pipeline for Aligning User, Expert and Developer Perspectives in LLM-generated Health Counselling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08392)
*Yee Man Ng,Bram van Dijk,Pieter Beynen,Otto Boekesteijn,Joris Jansen,Gerard van Oortmerssen,Max van Duijn,Marco Spruit*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: QUORUM是一个统一了开发者、专家和用户视角的评估框架，COACH是一个基于LLM的个性化生活方式咨询生成器，应用于癌症患者的健康日志应用Healthy Chronos。评估结果表明，尽管用户、专家和开发者在咨询的整体相关性、质量和可靠性上达成一致，但在语气、对模式提取错误敏感性以及潜在幻觉等方面存在分歧。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的数据收集系统在为慢性病人群提供生活方式咨询时面临挑战，包括可靠地提取用户特异性模式、将模式与医学知识结合以确保咨询质量，以及生成与真实用户相关的咨询。因此，需要一个能够统一开发者、专家和用户视角的评估框架。

Method: 提出了QUORUM评估框架，该框架统一了开发者、专家和用户三个视角。开发了一个名为COACH的基于大型语言模型（LLM）的管道，用于生成个性化生活方式咨询。通过Healthy Chronos（一个面向癌症患者和幸存者的日记应用程序）的案例研究，应用QUORUM框架评估COACH生成的咨询。

Result: QUORUM框架能够有意义地追踪利益相关者在意见上的收敛和分歧。在Healthy Chronos案例研究中，用户、医学专家和开发者普遍认为生成的咨询是相关的、高质量的且可靠的。然而，在咨询的语气、对模式提取错误的敏感性以及潜在的幻觉方面，利益相关者之间存在分歧。

Conclusion: 多方利益相关者评估对于消费者健康语言技术至关重要。统一的评估框架（如QUORUM）可以支持在真实世界中构建值得信赖的、以患者为中心的自然语言处理（NLP）系统。

Abstract: Systems that collect data on sleep, mood, and activities can provide valuable lifestyle counselling to populations affected by chronic disease and its consequences. Such systems are, however, challenging to develop; besides reliably extracting patterns from user-specific data, systems should also contextualise these patterns with validated medical knowledge to ensure the quality of counselling, and generate counselling that is relevant to a real user. We present QUORUM, a new evaluation framework that unifies these developer-, expert-, and user-centric perspectives, and show with a real case study that it meaningfully tracks convergence and divergence in stakeholder perspectives. We also present COACH, a Large Language Model-driven pipeline to generate personalised lifestyle counselling for our Healthy Chronos use case, a diary app for cancer patients and survivors. Applying our framework shows that overall, users, medical experts, and developers converge on the opinion that the generated counselling is relevant, of good quality, and reliable. However, stakeholders also diverge on the tone of the counselling, sensitivity to errors in pattern-extraction, and potential hallucinations. These findings highlight the importance of multi-stakeholder evaluation for consumer health language technologies and illustrate how a unified evaluation framework can support trustworthy, patient-centered NLP systems in real-world settings.

</details>


### [448] [Revealing Behavioral Plasticity in Large Language Models: A Token-Conditional Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08398)
*Liyuan Mao,Le Yu,Jing Zhou,Chujie Zheng,Bowen Yu,Chang Gao,Shixuan Liu,An Yang,Weinan Zhang,JunYang Lin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为 ToCoRL 的新框架，通过条件化生成和强化学习，使大型语言模型（LLMs）在推理时能够像变色龙一样适应行为模式（例如，从逐步推理切换到直接回答），而无需重新训练。实验证明，ToCoRL 能够实现精确的行为控制，并能提升模型在特定任务上的表现，例如使擅长数学推理的模型也能在事实问答任务上表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究者发现大型语言模型（LLMs）具有内在的行为可塑性，可以通过条件化生成来暴露，并通过强化学习来稳定。之前的模型在特定任务上的表现受到其固有行为模式的限制，例如复杂的逐步推理模式会阻碍事实问答的表现。

Method: 提出 Token-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (ToCoRL) 框架。该框架利用强化学习来内化 LLM 的行为可塑性，通过条件化生成（使用展示期望行为的响应样本作为 token 前缀）来引导探索，并利用强化学习来增强利用，从而将推理时的临时适应转化为稳定且可学习的行为模式。

Result: ToCoRL 框架能够实现对 LLM 行为的精确控制，且不会导致能力下降。实验证明，该方法可以使擅长复杂数学推理的大型模型，有效地适应并擅长事实问答任务，克服了之前因逐步推理模式带来的局限性。

Conclusion: LLMs 具有内在的行为可塑性，可以通过 token 条件化生成在推理时暴露，并通过强化学习（如 ToCoRL）稳定。ToCoRL 是一种有效的框架，可以实现精确的行为控制，提高模型在特定任务上的性能，并且不会损害模型的通用能力。

Abstract: In this work, we reveal that Large Language Models (LLMs) possess intrinsic behavioral plasticity-akin to chameleons adapting their coloration to environmental cues-that can be exposed through token-conditional generation and stabilized via reinforcement learning. Specifically, by conditioning generation on carefully selected token prefixes sampled from responses exhibiting desired behaviors, LLMs seamlessly adapt their behavioral modes at inference time (e.g., switching from step-by-step reasoning to direct answering) without retraining. Based on this insight, we propose Token-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (ToCoRL), a principled framework that leverages RL to internalize this chameleon-like plasticity, transforming transient inference-time adaptations into stable and learnable behavioral patterns. ToCoRL guides exploration with token-conditional generation and keep enhancing exploitation, enabling emergence of appropriate behaviors. Extensive experiments show that ToCoRL enables precise behavioral control without capability degradation. Notably, we show that large reasoning models, while performing strongly on complex mathematics, can be effectively adapted to excel at factual question answering, which was a capability previously hindered by their step-by-step reasoning patterns.

</details>


### [449] [Aligning to Illusions: Choice Blindness in Human and AI Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08412)
*Wenbin Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过三个实验挑战了RLHF（基于人类反馈的强化学习）中人类偏好反映稳定内部状态的假设。研究发现，人类在评估文本偏好时存在“选择盲视”，且LLM（大型语言模型）在模拟人类判断时依赖浅层匹配而非真实自我监控。此外，即使在奖励信号大幅下降的情况下，标准的评估指标也难以察觉偏好标签的质量下降。这表明RLHF接收到的信号受到提问环境的显著影响，且现有方法无法有效检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于质疑RLHF的核心假设，即人类标注者的偏好是稳定且能准确反映其真实内部状态的。作者希望通过实证研究来揭示人类偏好在RLHF过程中的脆弱性以及现有评估方法的局限性。

Method: 研究采用了三种实验方法：1. 人类选择盲视实验，测试在文本评估中，标注者对其偏好被偷偷替换的察觉能力。2. LLM判断者实验，评估不同规模的LLM在检测偏好操纵方面的能力，并分析其检测机制（浅层匹配 vs. 自我监控）。3. 剂量反应实验，在不同模型规模下，通过改变标签的腐败比例来观察奖励信号和标准评估指标的变化。最后，通过Best-of-N评估验证下游策略的退化情况。

Result: 研究发现：1. 91%的文本偏好替换未被人类察觉，表明存在“选择盲视”。2. LLM的检测能力依赖于浅层文本匹配，而非真实的自我监控，移除先验推理或施加社会压力会显著影响其检测能力。3. 在奖励信号减半之前，需要腐败1/6到1/3的标签，但标准成对准确率几乎不变。4. 在50%标签腐败的情况下，奖励引导的选择未能提供优于随机采样的性能，而代理模型（proxy model）的得分却单调上升。

Conclusion: 本文的研究结果揭示了一个“偏好构建问题”。在RLHF过程中，进入奖励模型的信号受到提问环境的显著影响，而人类的元认知、LLM的自我监控以及标准的评估指标都无法有效检测到这种偏好信号的失真。这表明RLHF的有效性可能受到其偏好收集机制的根本性限制。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) assumes annotator preferences reflect stable internal states. We challenge this through three experiments spanning the preference pipeline. In a human choice blindness study, 91% of surreptitiously swapped preferences go undetected, extending choice blindness to third-person evaluative comparison of unfamiliar text. Testing fifteen LLM judges as potential replacements, we find detection relies on shallow text matching rather than genuine self-monitoring: removing prior reasoning from context causes blindness to surge from near-zero to over 50%, while explicit social pressure induces near-universal compliance. In a dose-response experiment across two architectures from 86M to 2B parameters, one-sixth to one-third of labels must be corrupted before the reward signal halves, yet standard pairwise accuracy remains virtually unchanged. A Best-of-N evaluation confirms this translates to downstream policy degradation: at 50% corruption, reward-guided selection produces no improvement over random sampling, while the proxy model reports monotonically increasing scores. Together, these results reveal a preference construction problem: the signal entering RLHF is shaped by elicitation context in ways that neither human metacognition, LLM self-monitoring, nor standard evaluation metrics can detect.

</details>


### [450] [One Model Is Enough: Native Retrieval Embeddings from LLM Agent Hidden States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08429)
*Bo Jiang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种为LLM代理设计的原生检索方法，通过添加一个轻量级投影头直接将LLM的隐藏状态映射到嵌入空间，无需独立的嵌入模型，从而简化了检索流程并降低了延迟，同时在QReCC数据集上取得了具有竞争力的检索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的LLM代理检索方法需要一个独立的文本搜索查询生成和编码模型，这增加了基础设施复杂性和延迟，并且存在冗余，因为LLM本身已经编码了对话上下文。研究动机是简化这一流程并提高效率。

Method: 提出了一种原生检索方法，通过为LLM添加一个轻量级投影头，该投影头能够将LLM的隐藏状态直接映射到嵌入空间。训练使用了对齐损失、对比损失和秩蒸馏损失的组合。

Result: 该方法在保留了97%的基线检索质量的同时，能够让LLM代理使用其自身的表示进行搜索。在QReCC对话搜索基准测试中，与标准的“生成-然后编码”管道相比，新方法在Recall@10和MRR@10上表现出有竞争力。

Conclusion: 通过添加一个简单的投影头，LLM代理可以获得原生检索能力，从而无需独立的嵌入模型，显著简化了检索管道并降低了延迟，同时保持了高质量的检索性能。不同的损失函数对性能的贡献得到了验证。

Abstract: LLM agents that retrieve external knowledge typically generate a search query as text, then run a separate embedding model to encode it into a vector. This two-model pipeline adds infrastructure complexity and latency, yet is redundant: the LLM already encodes the full conversational context in its hidden states. We propose equipping LLM agents with native retrieval capability by adding a lightweight projection head that maps hidden states directly into the embedding space, eliminating the need for a separate embedding model. Trained with a combination of alignment, contrastive, and rank distillation losses, our method retains 97\% of baseline retrieval quality while enabling the LLM agent to search with its own representations. Experiments on the QReCC conversational search benchmark show competitive Recall@10 and MRR@10 compared to the standard generate-then-encode pipeline, with systematic ablations confirming the contribution of each loss component.

</details>


### [451] [A Dataset for Probing Translationese Preferences in English-to-Swedish Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08450)
*Jenny Kunz,Anja Jarochenko,Marcel Bollmann*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究者们发布了一个新的英译瑞典语数据集，用于对比“翻译腔”句子和地道表达，并发现语言模型（LLM）倾向于选择“翻译腔”表达，即使在没有英文原文的情况下也是如此。这表明LLM需要改进以生成更自然的非英语语言输出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的语言模型在处理非英语语言时，往往会产生“翻译腔”式的、不够地道的表达。研究者希望通过创建一个专门的数据集来探测和理解这种现象，并推动开发能生成更自然输出的模型。

Method: 研究者构建了一个包含翻译腔句子和地道替代句的英译瑞典语数据集，并为翻译腔句子添加了错误标签和描述。然后，他们使用这个数据集来评估小型瑞典语和多语言大型语言模型，对比模型在有无英文原文提示下的选择偏好。

Result: 实验结果表明，语言模型倾向于选择翻译腔的表达方式。当省略英文原文时，模型更频繁地选择人类提供的地道表达，这暗示了英文原文的存在会偏向模型选择直译。然而，即使在没有上下文的情况下，模型也常常偏好翻译腔变体。

Conclusion: 该研究提出了一个用于评估和改进语言模型生成非英语语言能力的新数据集和基准。研究结果强调了模型在处理非英语语言时存在偏向直译和翻译腔的问题，并指出需要进一步研究和开发模型来产生更自然、更地道的输出。

Abstract: Translations often carry traces of the source language, a phenomenon known as translationese. We introduce the first freely available English-to-Swedish dataset contrasting translationese sentences with idiomatic alternatives, designed to probe intrinsic preferences of language models. It includes error tags and descriptions of the problems in the original translations. In experiments evaluating smaller Swedish and multilingual LLMs with our dataset, we find that they often favor the translationese phrasing. Human alternatives are chosen more often when the English source sentence is omitted, indicating that exposure to the source biases models toward literal translations, although even without context models often prefer the translationese variant. Our dataset and findings provide a resource and benchmark for developing models that produce more natural, idiomatic output in non-English languages.

</details>


### [452] [Fanar-Sadiq: A Multi-Agent Architecture for Grounded Islamic QA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08501)
*Ummar Abbas,Mourad Ouzzani,Mohamed Y. Eltabakh,Omar Sinan,Gagan Bhatia,Hamdy Mubarak,Majd Hawasly,Mohammed Qusay Hashim,Kareem Darwish,Firoj Alam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为 Fanar-Sadiq 的双语（阿拉伯语/英语）多智能体伊斯兰助手，它通过意图感知路由将伊斯兰查询分配给专门的模块，从而提高了 LLM 在处理伊斯兰知识查询时的准确性和可靠性，特别是在引用和计算方面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大型语言模型在回答宗教知识查询时存在幻觉和来源误引的问题，这在伊斯兰教领域尤为严重，因为用户期望答案能够基于经典文本（古兰经和圣训）和法学（菲克）的细微差别。单一的“检索-生成”流程难以应对伊斯兰查询的多样性。

Method: 开发了一个双语（阿拉伯语/英语）多智能体伊斯兰助手 Fanar-Sadiq。该系统采用基于工具的智能体架构，支持意图感知路由，将查询导向专门的模块。这些模块包括：提供检索增强的法学答案并进行确定性引用规范化和验证追踪的模块；支持确切经文查找和引文验证的模块；以及支持逊尼派天课和继承的确定性计算器，并具备法学派敏感的分支。

Result: 在公开的伊斯兰问答基准测试中，对整个端到端系统进行了评估，证明了其有效性和效率。该系统已通过 API 和 Web 应用程序免费提供，并在不到一年的时间内被访问了约 190 万次。

Conclusion: Fanar-Sadiq 通过其多智能体、意图感知路由和专门的模块，有效地解决了 LLM 在处理伊斯兰知识查询时的局限性，提高了答案的准确性、可靠性和可追溯性，尤其是在引用和数值计算方面。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can answer religious knowledge queries fluently, yet they often hallucinate and misattribute sources, which is especially consequential in Islamic settings where users expect grounding in canonical texts (Qur'an and Hadith) and jurisprudential (fiqh) nuance. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces some of these limitations by grounding generation in external evidence. However, a single ``retrieve-then-generate'' pipeline is limited to deal with the diversity of Islamic queries.Users may request verbatim scripture, fatwa-style guidance with citations or rule-constrained computations such as zakat and inheritance that require strict arithmetic and legal invariants. In this work, we present a bilingual (Arabic/English) multi-agent Islamic assistant, called Fanar-Sadiq, which is a core component of the Fanar AI platform. Fanar-Sadiq routes Islamic-related queries to specialized modules within an agentic, tool-using architecture. The system supports intent-aware routing, retrieval-grounded fiqh answers with deterministic citation normalization and verification traces, exact verse lookup with quotation validation, and deterministic calculators for Sunni zakat and inheritance with madhhab-sensitive branching. We evaluate the complete end-to-end system on public Islamic QA benchmarks and demonstrate effectiveness and efficiency. Our system is currently publicly and freely accessible through API and a Web application, and has been accessed $\approx$1.9M times in less than a year.

</details>


### [453] [CODA: Difficulty-Aware Compute Allocation for Adaptive Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08659)
*Siye Wu,Jian Xie,Yikai Zhang,Yanghua Xiao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为CODA的方法，通过感知问题难度动态调整大型语言模型的推理深度，从而在简单问题上节省计算成本，在复杂问题上提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型模型在处理复杂任务时表现出色，但在简单任务上存在“过度思考”的问题，即在简单问题上花费过多的计算资源而精度提升有限。这促使了对“自适应推理”的需求，即根据问题难度动态调整推理深度。

Method: CODA将自适应推理形式化为效用最大化问题，通过在边际准确性收益低于增量成本时停止分配token。具体实现上，CODA使用策略内部的难度信号来分配token，通过基于分组的rollouts估计难度，并将其映射到两个非负门控信号，用于调整基于长度的奖励函数。简单问题的easy-side门控会惩罚冗余，复杂问题的hard-side门控会鼓励更深入的推理。

Result: CODA在不同模型规模和基准测试中实现了自适应推理，无需外部标注或用户预算。在简单任务上，CODA将token成本降低了60%以上，同时保持了高精度。在复杂任务上，CODA通过激励更深入的推理来最大化性能。

Conclusion: CODA是一种有效的自适应推理方法，能够根据问题难度动态地调整大型语言模型的推理成本和性能，解决了简单问题上的过度思考问题，并在复杂问题上提升了模型表现。

Abstract: The emergence of large reasoning models demonstrates that scaling inference-time compute significantly enhances performance on complex tasks. However, it often falls into another trap: overthinking simple problems, where repetitive rationales yield minimal accuracy gains at a disproportionately high cost. This motivates adaptive reasoning: dynamically aligning reasoning depth with instance difficulty. In this paper, we study adaptive reasoning from an optimality perspective, formalizing it as a utility maximization problem where tokens are allocated until the marginal accuracy gain falls below the incremental cost. Based on this, we propose CODA (Compute Allocation by Difficulty Awareness), a method that operationalizes this principle by allocating tokens via a policy-internal difficulty signal. Specifically, CODA estimates difficulty via group-based rollouts and maps it to two non-negative gates that modulate a length-dependent shaping term on top of the binary base reward. The easy-side gate penalizes verbosity on simple instances, whereas the hard-side gate encourages more deliberative rollouts on challenging ones. Across model scales and benchmarks, CODA achieves adaptive reasoning without external annotations or user-provided budgets: on easy tasks, CODA reduces token costs by over 60% while maintaining strong accuracy, whereas on hard tasks it incentivizes more deliberative rollouts to maximize performance.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [454] [A Pivot-Based Kirigami Utensil for Hand-Held and Robot-Assisted Feeding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06716)
*Keone Leao,Grace Brotherson,Iain Mischel,Sagar Parekh,Dylan P. Losey*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种名为 kiri-spoon 的可调节餐具，可通过挤压手柄来改变形状，既可用于手动抓取食物，也可安装在机器人上辅助进食，旨在帮助有基本震颤和其他行动不便的成年人解决进食难题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 有超过 6000 万患有原发性震颤和其他行动不便的成年人在进食时面临挑战，传统餐具难以使用，容易导致食物洒漏并限制食物种类。现有解决方案（如僵硬餐具或仅用于机器人辅助进食的软质餐具）存在不足，需要更通用的辅助工具。

Method: 设计了一种基于枢轴原理的 kiri-spoon，使其能像钳子一样工作。用户通过挤压手柄来改变餐具形状，从而能够像勺子一样舀取食物，或像叉子一样夹取食物。当手柄闭合时，餐具能够包裹住食物，防止掉落。研究人员分析了开启/闭合 kiri-spoon 所需的力，并探讨了通过运动学或材料改变来调整此力的方法。还通过添加伺服电机扩展了该设计以支持机器人辅助喂食。

Result: kiri-spoon 是一种易于获取且由四部分 3D 打印件组成的餐具，可以卡接组装。其设计允许通过改变运动学或材料来调整所需的操作力。用户研究表明，残疾成人和患有帕金森病的老年人认为 kiri-spoon 比现有替代品更能满足他们的需求，并且在防止食物洒漏方面效果更好。

Conclusion: kiri-spoon 是一种创新的、可适应的进食辅助工具，通过其独特的枢轴设计，能够满足有不同程度行动不便的用户的手动和机器人辅助进食需求，有效解决了食物洒漏的问题，并获得了用户的高度认可。

Abstract: Eating is a daily challenge for over 60 million adults with essential tremors and other mobility limitations. For these users, traditional utensils like forks or spoons are difficult to manipulate -- resulting in accidental spills and restricting the types of food that can be consumed. Prior work has developed rigid, hand-held utensils that often fail to secure food, as well as soft, shape-changing utensils made strictly for robot-assisted feeding. To assist a broader range of users, we introduce a re-designed kiri-spoon that can be leveraged as either a hand-held utensil or a robot-mounted attachment. Our key idea -- developed in collaboration with stakeholders -- is a pivot-based design. With this design the kiri-spoon behaves like a pair of pliers: users squeeze the handles to change the shape of the utensil and enclose food morsels. In practice, users can apply this kiri-spoon as either a spoon (that scoops food) or as a fork (that pinches food); when the handles are closed, the utensil wraps around the morsel and prevents it from accidentally falling. We characterize the amount of force required to open or close the kiri-spoon, and show how designers can modify this force through kinematic or material changes. A highlight of our design is its accessibility: the hand-held version consists of just four 3D printed parts that snap together. By adding a servo motor, we can extend this same kinematic structure to robot-assisted feeding. Across our user studies, adults with disabilities and elderly adults with Parkinson's reported that the kiri-spoon better met their needs and provided a more effective means of spill prevention than existing alternatives. See a video of our kiri-spoon here: https://youtu.be/FFIomm5RL98

</details>


### [455] [Dynamic Targeting of Satellite Observations Using Supplemental Geostationary Satellite Data and Hierarchical Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06719)
*Akseli Kangaslahti,Itai Zilberstein,Alberto Candela,Steve Chien*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种结合地球静止卫星数据和机载前视传感器数据的分层规划方法，以提高动态目标（DT）卫星观测任务的科学回报，尤其适用于稀疏目标分布的动态场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的动态目标（DT）任务概念虽然有潜力提高科学回报，但在处理机载前视数据范围有限、数据吞吐量和计算能力受限方面存在挑战。本研究旨在通过引入地球静止卫星的辅助数据来克服这些限制，并提高DT系统的性能。

Method: 提出了一种分层规划方法。首先，利用来自地球静止卫星的、提前35分钟的远期预报数据，在多项式时间内规划一个长期的观测蓝图。然后，利用机载前视传感器（1分钟延迟）提供的前视数据，在短期内对该计划进行优化和精炼。

Result: 与仅依赖机载前视数据的传统DT规划器相比，提出的分层规划方法在四个不同问题实例（三种云规避和一种风暴狩猎场景）中，性能提升高达41%。研究还发现，该方法对于目标稀疏分布的动态问题实例最为有效。

Conclusion: 将地球静止卫星数据融入动态目标（DT）观测任务的概念是可行的，并且通过分层规划方法可以显著提升DT系统的性能。这种方法特别适用于目标稀疏且动态变化的应用场景。

Abstract: The Dynamic Targeting (DT) mission concept is an approach to satellite observation in which a lookahead sensor gathers information about the upcoming environment and uses this information to intelligently plan observations. Previous work has shown that DT has the potential to increase the science return across applications. However, DT mission concepts must address challenges, such as the limited spatial extent of onboard lookahead data and instrument mobility, data throughput, and onboard computation constraints. In this work, we show how the performance of DT systems can be improved by using supplementary data streamed from geostationary satellites that provide lookahead information up to 35 minutes ahead of time rather than the 1 minute latency from an onboard lookahead sensor. While there is a greater volume of geostationary data, the search space for observation planning explodes exponentially with the size of the horizon. To address this, we introduce a hierarchical planning approach in which the geostationary data is used to plan a long-term observation blueprint in polynomial time, then the onboard lookahead data is leveraged to refine that plan over short-term horizons. We compare the performance of our approach to that of traditional DT planners relying on onboard lookahead data across four different problem instances: three cloud avoidance variations and a storm hunting scenario. We show that our hierarchical planner outperforms the traditional DT planners by up to 41% and examine the features of the scenarios that affect the performance of our approach. We demonstrate that incorporating geostationary satellite data is most effective for dynamic problem instances in which the targets of interest are sparsely distributed throughout the overflight.

</details>


### [456] [Robotic Foundation Models for Industrial Control: A Comprehensive Survey and Readiness Assessment Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06749)
*David Kube,Simon Hadwiger,Tobias Meisen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文对机器人基础模型（RFM）在工业应用中的现状进行了全面评估，发现其工业成熟度有限且不均衡，强调了将安全性、实时性、鲁棒感知、交互和成本效益的系统集成到可审计部署栈中的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管机器人基础模型（RFM）在实现灵活、指令和演示驱动的机器人控制方面前景广阔，但对其工业适用性的关键调查仍然缺失。

Method: 该研究对RFM领域进行了广泛概述，并分析了工业领域和用例如何塑造RFM的需求，特别关注了协作机器人平台、异构感知与驱动、边缘计算约束以及安全关键操作。研究人员将工业部署视角综合为十一项相互依赖的启示，并将其操作化为一个评估框架，包含149个具体标准。使用该框架，通过保守的LLM辅助评估流程（经过专家判断验证）对324个具备操纵能力的RFM进行了评估。

Result: 结果表明，工业成熟度有限且不均衡，即使是评分最高的模型也仅满足一部分标准，并且通常表现出特定启示的狭窄高峰而非综合覆盖。

Conclusion: 实现工业级RFM的进展，与其说是依赖于孤立的基准测试成功，不如说是依赖于将安全性、实时可行性、鲁棒感知、交互和成本效益的系统集成系统地纳入可审计的部署栈中。

Abstract: Robotic foundation models (RFMs) are emerging as a promising route towards flexible, instruction- and demonstration-driven robot control, however, a critical investigation of their industrial applicability is still lacking. This survey gives an extensive overview over the RFM-landscape and analyses, driven by concrete implications, how industrial domains and use cases shape the requirements of RFMs, with particular focus on collaborative robot platforms, heterogeneous sensing and actuation, edge-computing constraints, and safety-critical operation. We synthesise industrial deployment perspectives into eleven interdependent implications and operationalise them into an assessment framework comprising a catalogue of 149 concrete criteria, spanning both model capabilities and ecosystem requirements. Using this framework, we evaluate 324 manipulation-capable RFMs via 48,276 criterion-level decisions obtained via a conservative LLM-assisted evaluation pipeline, validated against expert judgements. The results indicate that industrial maturity is limited and uneven: even the highest-rated models satisfy only a fraction of criteria and typically exhibit narrow implication-specific peaks rather than integrated coverage. We conclude that progress towards industry-grade RFMs depends less on isolated benchmark successes than on systematic incorporation of safety, real-time feasibility, robust perception, interaction, and cost-effective system integration into auditable deployment stacks.

</details>


### [457] [Gradient-based Nested Co-Design of Aerodynamic Shape and Control for Winged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06760)
*Daniele Affinita,Mingda Xu,Benoît Valentin Gherardi,Pascal Fua*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于无人机联合设计（形状和运动规划）的通用、基于梯度的嵌套框架，使用神经网络代理模型来模拟空气动力学，并在固定翼滑翔机的栖息和短距着陆任务上进行了验证，性能优于进化基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在设计无人机形状和运动规划器时是顺序的，容易导致次优结果，因为两者之间存在非线性相互作用。需要一种联合优化方法来应对复杂的气动流动条件，并克服现有方法对计算可行性的简化假设。

Method: 提出了一种基于梯度的嵌套联合设计框架，其中运动规划器解决最优控制问题，而空气动力学力通过神经网络代理模型计算。该框架能够处理复杂的亚音速流动条件。

Result: 在固定翼滑翔机的栖息和短距着陆任务上验证了该方法。优化的设计比进化基线在更短的计算时间内实现了更好的任务性能。

Conclusion: 该框架能够通用地解决形状和运动规划的联合设计问题，并且能够有效地处理复杂的空气动力学模型，在提高无人机任务性能方面取得了显著成效。

Abstract: Designing aerial robots for specialized tasks, from perching to payload delivery, requires tailoring their aerodynamic shape to specific mission requirements. For tasks involving wide flight envelopes, the usual sequential process of first determining the shape and then the motion planner is likely to be suboptimal due to the inherent nonlinear interactions between them. This limitation has been motivating co-design research, which involves jointly optimizing the aerodynamic shape and the motion planner. In this paper, we present a general-purpose, gradient-based, nested co-design framework where the motion planner solves an optimal control problem and the aerodynamic forces used in the dynamics model are determined by a neural surrogate model. This enables us to model complex subsonic flow conditions encountered in aerial robotics and to overcome the limited applicability of existing co-design methods. These limitations stem from the simplifying assumptions they require for computational tractability to either the planner or the aerodynamics. We validate our method on two complex dynamic tasks for fixed-wing gliders: perching and a short landing. Our optimized designs improve task performance compared to an evolutionary baseline in a fraction of the computation time.

</details>


### [458] [Stability-Guided Exploration for Diverse Motion Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06773)
*Eckart Cobo-Briesewitz,Tilman Burghoff,Denis Shcherba,Armand Jordana,Marc Toussaint*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种新的方法，通过黑盒模拟来寻找多样化的长时域操控策略，结合了RRT风格搜索和基于采样的MPC，并引入了新的采样策略以引导探索至稳定配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人学习数据收集效率低下，人工演示数据受限且探索不足；现有合成数据生成方法侧重局部优化，难以生成多样化解决方案。

Method: 结合RRT风格搜索与基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC），并采用一种新颖的采样策略，从稳定状态流形中采样，并在模拟环境中直接增长搜索树，而不局限于纯稳定运动。

Result: 该方法能够发现多种多样的操控策略，包括推、抓取、旋转、投掷和工具使用，适用于不同的机器人形态，且无需特定任务的指导。

Conclusion: 所提出的方法能够有效地通过黑盒模拟生成多样化的长时域操控策略，克服了数据收集瓶颈，并展现出在不同机器人和操作场景下的泛化能力。

Abstract: Scaling up datasets is highly effective in improving the performance of deep learning models, including in the field of robot learning. However, data collection still proves to be a bottleneck. Approaches relying on collecting human demonstrations are labor-intensive and inherently limited: they tend to be narrow, task-specific, and fail to adequately explore the full space of feasible states. Synthetic data generation could remedy this, but current techniques mostly rely on local trajectory optimization and fail to find diverse solutions. In this work, we propose a novel method capable of finding diverse long-horizon manipulations through black-box simulation. We achieve this by combining an RRT-style search with sampling-based MPC, together with a novel sampling scheme that guides the exploration toward stable configurations. Specifically, we sample from a manifold of stable states while growing a search tree directly through simulation, without restricting the planner to purely stable motions. We demonstrate the method's ability to discover diverse manipulation strategies, including pushing, grasping, pivoting, throwing, and tool use, across different robot morphologies, without task-specific guidance.

</details>


### [459] [HybridMimic: Hybrid RL-Centroidal Control for Humanoid Motion Mimicking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06775)
*Ludwig Chee-Ying Tay,I-Chia Chang,Yan Gu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为 HybridMimic 的框架，通过学习到的策略动态地调整基于质心模型的控制器，以实现更鲁棒的人形机器人运动模仿，即使在模型外分布的环境中也能生成物理上可行的控制指令。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于强化学习的人形机器人运动模仿方法在部署时会忽略机器人动力学，导致在 out-of-distribution 环境中可能产生物理上不可行的指令。虽然混合方法可以改进性能，但现有方法通常依赖预定义的接触时序，限制了其通用性。

Method: HybridMimic 框架结合了强化学习和基于质心模型的控制器。学习到的策略动态地预测连续的接触状态和期望的质心速度，并据此生成前馈力矩。该框架使用物理信息奖励来训练策略，使其能够有效地利用质心控制器的优化能力，输出精确的控制目标和参考力矩。

Result: 在 Booster T1 人形机器人上的硬件实验表明，与最先进的强化学习基线相比，HybridMimic 将平均基座位置跟踪误差降低了 13%。

Conclusion: HybridMimic 框架通过整合动态感知的部署，提高了强化学习在人形机器人运动模仿中的鲁棒性，即使在领域转移的情况下也能生成物理上可行的控制指令。

Abstract: Motion mimicking, i.e., encouraging the control policy to mimic human motion, facilitates the learning of complex tasks via reinforcement learning (RL) for humanoid robots. Although standard RL frameworks demonstrate impressive locomotion agility, they often bypass explicit reasoning about robot dynamics during deployment, which is a design choice that can lead to physically infeasible commands when the robot encounters out-of-distribution environments. By integrating model-based principles, hybrid approaches can improve performance; however, existing methods typically rely on predefined contact timing, limiting their versatility. This paper introduces HybridMimic, a framework in which a learned policy dynamically modulates a centroidal-model-based controller by predicting continuous contact states and desired centroidal velocities. This architecture exploits the physical grounding of centroidal dynamics to generate feedforward torques that remain feasible even under domain shift. Using physics-informed rewards, the policy is trained to efficiently utilize the centroidal controller's optimization by outputting precise control targets and reference torques. Through hardware experiments on the Booster T1 humanoid, HybridMimic reduces the average base position tracking error by 13\% compared to a state-of-the-art RL baseline, demonstrating the robustness of dynamics-aware deployment.

</details>


### [460] [A Multi-Layer Sim-to-Real Framework for Gaze-Driven Assistive Neck Exoskeletons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06779)
*Colin Rubow,Eric Brewer,Ian Bales,Haohan Zhang,Daniel S. Brown*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究人员利用虚拟现实（VR）收集眼球和头部运动数据，训练模型以仅通过眼动预测头部运动，并提出了一个多层控制器选择框架，用于评估和选择用于颈部外骨骼的控制策略。最终，研究确定了两种在物理外骨骼上表现良好的新型眼动驱动模型，并强调了个性化控制的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 落头综合征严重影响患者头部支撑和运动能力，给日常生活带来痛苦和挑战。开发能够恢复自然运动的辅助动力颈部外骨骼是长期目标，但预测用户意图的头部运动是关键的挑战。

Method: 使用虚拟现实（VR）收集健康个体眼球和头部运动数据，训练基于眼动的头部运动预测模型。提出一个多层控制器选择框架，从仿真、VR到物理颈部外骨骼逐级评估头部控制策略，以尽早淘汰表现不佳的控制器。

Result: 识别出两种在物理颈部外骨骼上表现良好的新型眼动驱动模型。研究表明，不存在一种普遍适用的控制器，强调了眼动驱动辅助控制个性化的必要性。

Conclusion: VR评估对于加速直观、安全和个性化的辅助机器人开发非常有用。研究成功开发并验证了一种能够有效评估和选择眼动驱动颈部外骨骼控制策略的方法，并指出了个性化控制的趋势。

Abstract: Dropped head syndrome, caused by neck muscle weakness from neurological diseases, severely impairs an individual's ability to support and move their head, causing pain and making everyday tasks challenging. Our long-term goal is to develop an assistive powered neck exoskeleton that restores natural movement. However, predicting a user's intended head movement remains a key challenge. We leverage virtual reality (VR) to collect coupled eye and head movement data from healthy individuals to train models capable of predicting head movement based solely on eye gaze. We also propose a novel multi-layer controller selection framework, where head control strategies are evaluated across decreasing levels of abstraction -- from simulation and VR to a physical neck exoskeleton. This pipeline effectively rejects poor-performing controllers early, identifying two novel gaze-driven models that achieve strong performance when deployed on the physical exoskeleton. Our results reveal that no single controller is universally preferred, highlighting the necessity for personalization in gaze-driven assistive control. Our work demonstrates the utility of VR-based evaluation for accelerating the development of intuitive, safe, and personalized assistive robots.

</details>


### [461] [A Comprehensive Analysis of the Effects of Network Quality of Service on Robotic Telesurgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06824)
*Zhaomeng Zhang,Seyed Hamid Reza Roodabeh,Homa Alemzadeh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究使用名为NetFI的故障注入工具，模拟了不同程度的网络劣化（丢包、延迟、通信中断）对远程手术任务表现的影响，并通过用户研究发现网络质量对任务执行和操作员感知负荷有显著影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对远程手术可行性的研究忽视了真实网络退化对任务表现的具体影响，因此需要对这些影响进行量化分析。

Method: 开发了NetFI工具，该工具利用基于真实网络数据的随机QoS模型来模拟网络条件。将NetFI集成到手术模拟平台，并招募15名不同熟练度的参与者执行标准化任务。通过客观性能/安全指标和主观感知负荷来评估网络QoS的影响。

Result: 研究发现了特定动作原语（MPs）容易受到网络退化的影响。参与者熟练度、客观表现和主观负荷之间存在强相关性。网络QoS对整体任务表现和细粒度MPs都有影响。

Conclusion: 本研究为远程手术的操作边界提供了量化见解，并强调了网络条件对远程手术任务表现的关键作用。研究成果（工具和数据集）可用于开发网络感知的控制和缓解策略。

Abstract: The viability of long-distance telesurgery hinges on reliable network Quality of Service (QoS), yet the impact of realistic network degradations on task performance is not sufficiently understood. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of how packet loss, delay, and communication loss affect telesurgical task execution. We introduce NetFI, a novel fault injection tool that emulates different network conditions using stochastic QoS models informed by real-world network data. By integrating NetFI with a surgical simulation platform, we conduct a user study involving 15 participants at three proficiency levels, performing a standardized Peg Transfer task under varying levels of packet loss, delay, and communication loss. We analyze the effect of network QoS on overall task performance and the fine-grained motion primitives (MPs) using objective performance and safety metrics and subjective operator's perception of workload. We identify specific MPs vulnerable to network degradation and find strong correlations between proficiency, objective performance, and subjective workload. These findings offer quantitative insights into the operational boundaries of telesurgery. Our open-source tools and annotated dataset provide a foundation for developing robust and network-aware control and mitigation strategies.

</details>


### [462] [Learning-Based Robust Control: Unifying Exploration and Distributional Robustness for Reliable Robotics via Free Energy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06831)
*Hozefa Jesawada,Giovanni Russo,Abdalla Swikir,Fares Abu-Dakka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种受计算神经科学自由能原理启发的模型，该模型能够同时学习环境动力学和奖励，并确保对认知不确定性的鲁棒性，在机器人控制和仿真到现实迁移方面取得了良好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了解决机器人控制中学习策略和保证现场部署鲁棒性所面临的挑战。

Method: 受计算神经科学自由能原理启发，提出了一种联合学习环境动力学和奖励的模型，并确保对认知不确定性的鲁棒性。该方法对最大扩散学习框架进行了修改，并明确表征了策略对环境和奖励中认知不确定性的鲁棒性。

Result: 在连续控制基准测试中，通过仿真和实际操作（使用 Franka Research 3 机械臂进行抓取）验证了所提出策略的有效性。结果表明，该方法缩小了仿真到现实的差距，并在无需针对任务进行微调的情况下实现了可重复的桌面抓取操作。

Conclusion: 所提出的受自由能原理启发的模型能够有效地学习策略，同时保证对认知不确定性的鲁棒性，这对于机器人控制和解决仿真到现实的差距至关重要。

Abstract: A key challenge towards reliable robotic control is devising computational models that can both learn policies and guarantee robustness when deployed in the field. Inspired by the free energy principle in computational neuroscience, to address these challenges, we propose a model for policy computation that jointly learns environment dynamics and rewards, while ensuring robustness to epistemic uncertainties. Expounding a distributionally robust free energy principle, we propose a modification to the maximum diffusion learning framework. After explicitly characterizing robustness of our policies to epistemic uncertainties in both environment and reward, we validate their effectiveness on continuous-control benchmarks, via both simulations and real-world experiments involving manipulation with a Franka Research~3 arm. Across simulation and zero-shot deployment, our approach narrows the sim-to-real gap, and enables repeatable tabletop manipulation without task-specific fine-tuning.

</details>


### [463] [Receding-Horizon Nullspace Optimization for Actuation-Aware Control Allocation in Omnidirectional UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06832)
*Riccardo Pretto,Mahmoud Hamandi,Abdullah Mohamed Ali,Gokhan Alcan,Anthony Tzes,Fares Abu-Dakka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种考虑了非对称执行器动力学的前瞻性、感知执行器分配策略，用于全驱动全向无人机，通过空域优化利用冗余，显著减少了电机指令振荡并提高了轨迹跟踪性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的控制分配方法忽略了无人机执行器的非对称动力学，导致动态机动时电机指令振荡，影响轨迹跟踪性能。

Method: 提出了一种基于预测时域（receding-horizon）且感知执行器动力学（actuation-aware）的分配策略。该策略显式地包含了非对称电机动力学，并利用过驱动平台的冗余，通过空域优化来抵消振荡。该方法通过预测闭环系统在一个预测时域内的行为，并在线解决一个约束最优控制问题（通过约束迭代LQR求解）来实现。

Result: 仿真结果表明，与传统的单步二次规划分配器相比，所提出的方法显著减少了电机指令的振荡，并在位置和姿态的轨迹跟踪方面均表现出更优的性能。

Conclusion: 所提出的前瞻性、感知执行器分配策略能够有效地处理全驱动全向无人机的非对称执行器动力学，通过利用冗余和预测控制来抑制振荡，从而提高轨迹跟踪的准确性。

Abstract: Fully actuated omnidirectional UAVs enable independent control of forces and torques along all six degrees of freedom, broadening the operational envelope for agile flight and aerial interaction tasks. However, conventional control allocation methods neglect the asymmetric dynamics of the onboard actuators, which can induce oscillatory motor commands and degrade trajectory tracking during dynamic maneuvers. This work proposes a receding-horizon, actuation-aware allocation strategy that explicitly incorporates asymmetric motor dynamics and exploits the redundancy of over-actuated platforms through nullspace optimization. By forward-simulating the closed-loop system over a prediction horizon, the method anticipates actuator-induced oscillations and suppresses them through smooth redistribution of motor commands, while preserving the desired body wrench exactly. The approach is formulated as a constrained optimal control problem solved online via Constrained iterative LQR. Simulation results on the OmniOcta platform demonstrate that the proposed method significantly reduces motor command oscillations compared to a conventional single-step quadratic programming allocator, yielding improved trajectory tracking in both position and orientation.

</details>


### [464] [RoboCritics: Enabling Reliable End-to-End LLM Robot Programming through Expert-Informed Critics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06842)
*Callie Y. Kim,Nathan Thomas White,Evan He,Frederic Sala,Bilge Mutlu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoboCritics 是一种通过引入机器人运动级别的“批评家”来增强基于 LLM 的机器人编程的方法，这些批评家能检测和修正代码中的安全隐患，提高编程的可靠性和用户中心性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的 LLM 驱动的机器人编程方法生成的代码不透明，难以验证和调试，对物理系统存在安全和可靠性风险。研究旨在降低机器人编程的门槛，同时解决安全和可靠性问题。

Method: RoboCritics 在 LLM 基础上增加了一个专家驱动的运动级批评家系统。这些批评家分析机器人运动轨迹，检测潜在问题（如关节速度超限、碰撞、不安全末端执行器姿态）。当检测到问题时，批评家会提供透明的反馈和一键修复建议，并将结构化信息传回 LLM，实现迭代式代码优化，同时让用户参与其中。

Result: 在 UR3e 机器人上进行的对照用户研究表明，与基线 LLM 界面相比，RoboCritics 显著减少了安全违规行为，提高了执行质量，并改变了用户验证和优化程序的方式。

Conclusion: RoboCritics 能够实现更可靠、以用户为中心的端到端 LLM 机器人编程，通过引入专家知识的批评家机制，解决了 LLM 生成代码的安全性和透明度问题。

Abstract: End-user robot programming grants users the flexibility to re-task robots in situ, yet it remains challenging for novices due to the need for specialized robotics knowledge. Large Language Models (LLMs) hold the potential to lower the barrier to robot programming by enabling task specification through natural language. However, current LLM-based approaches generate opaque, "black-box" code that is difficult to verify or debug, creating tangible safety and reliability risks in physical systems. We present RoboCritics, an approach that augments LLM-based robot programming with expert-informed motion-level critics. These critics encode robotics expertise to analyze motion-level execution traces for issues such as joint speed violations, collisions, and unsafe end-effector poses. When violations are detected, critics surface transparent feedback and offer one-click fixes that forward structured messages back to the LLM, enabling iterative refinement while keeping users in the loop. We instantiated RoboCritics in a web-based interface connected to a UR3e robot and evaluated it in a between-subjects user study (n=18). Compared to a baseline LLM interface, RoboCritics reduced safety violations, improved execution quality, and shaped how participants verified and refined their programs. Our findings demonstrate that RoboCritics enables more reliable and user-centered end-to-end robot programming with LLMs.

</details>


### [465] [Nonlinear Performance Degradation of Vision-Based Teleoperation under Network Latency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06850)
*Aws Khalil,Jaerock Kwon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究通过名为 LAVT 的测试平台，在模拟环境中量化了网络延迟对基于视觉的自动驾驶车辆车道保持系统的稳定性影响，发现当单向感知延迟超过 150 毫秒时，系统稳定性会急剧下降，并且控制通道的延迟会加剧这种不稳定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自动驾驶汽车越来越多地采用远程操作作为关键的后备方案，但网络延迟对基于视觉、感知驱动的控制的影响尚未得到充分研究，因此需要深入研究。

Method: 研究人员开发了一个名为 Latency-Aware Vision Teleoperation testbed (LAVT) 的研究型 ROS 2 框架，用于精确测量分布式单向延迟和可重复地注入延迟。利用 LAVT，在模拟环境中对不同道路几何形状的 180 个闭环实验进行了研究。

Result: 研究发现，在 150 毫秒到 225 毫秒的单向感知延迟之间，闭环稳定性会出现急剧的崩溃，导致任务完成率从 100% 下降到 50% 以下，并出现振荡不稳定和相位滞后效应。此外，额外的控制通道延迟会加剧这些效应，即使在恒定的视觉延迟下也会显著加速系统故障。

Conclusion: 该研究通过系统的实证表征和 LAVT 测试平台，为感知驱动的不稳定性提供了量化见解，并为未来的延迟补偿和预测控制策略奠定了可重现的基准。

Abstract: Teleoperation is increasingly being adopted as a critical fallback for autonomous vehicles. However, the impact of network latency on vision-based, perception-driven control remains insufficiently studied. The present work investigates the nonlinear degradation of closed-loop stability in camera-based lane keeping under varying network delays. To conduct this study, we developed the Latency-Aware Vision Teleoperation testbed (LAVT), a research-oriented ROS 2 framework that enables precise, distributed one-way latency measurement and reproducible delay injection. Using LAVT, we performed 180 closed-loop experiments in simulation across diverse road geometries. Our findings reveal a sharp collapse in stability between 150 ms and 225 ms of one-way perception latency, where route completion rates drop from 100% to below 50% as oscillatory instability and phase-lag effects emerge. We further demonstrate that additional control-channel delay compounds these effects, significantly accelerating system failure even under constant visual latency. By combining this systematic empirical characterization with the LAVT testbed, this work provides quantitative insights into perception-driven instability and establishes a reproducible baseline for future latency-compensation and predictive control strategies. Project page, supplementary video, and code are available at https://bimilab.github.io/paper-LAVT

</details>


### [466] [CAR: Cross-Vehicle Kinodynamics Adaptation via Mobility Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06866)
*Tong Xu,Chenhui Pan,Xuesu Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为CAR（Cross-vehicle kinodynamics Adaptation via mobility Representation）的框架，利用Transformer和自适应层归一化，通过学习车辆轨迹和物理配置的共同表示，实现了跨车型动力学知识的快速迁移，只需少量数据即可显著降低预测误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动越野移动研究要么需要大量特定平台数据，要么依赖简化模型，无法捕捉多样化车辆（如轮式和履带式）复杂的动力学特性，这阻碍了在异构机器人车队中的可扩展性。因此，需要一种能快速将移动能力迁移到新车辆的框架。

Method: 提出CAR框架，使用Transformer编码器结合自适应层归一化，将车辆轨迹转换和物理配置嵌入到一个共享的移动潜在空间。通过识别和提取潜在空间中最近邻的共性，实现对新平台的动力学适应，只需少量数据和计算。

Result: 在Verti-Bench模拟器和Verti-4-Wheeler平台上进行了评估。仅使用一分钟新轨迹数据，CAR在不同未见过车型上的预测误差相比直接邻近迁移降低了高达67.2%。

Conclusion: CAR框架能够有效地实现跨车型移动知识迁移，能够在模拟和真实环境中，以极少的数据和计算量，快速适应新平台并显著提高动力学预测的准确性。

Abstract: Developing autonomous off-road mobility typically requires either extensive, platform-specific data collection or relies on simplified abstractions, such as unicycle or bicycle models, that fail to capture the complex kinodynamics of diverse platforms, ranging from wheeled to tracked vehicles. This limitation hinders scalability across evolving heterogeneous autonomous robot fleets. To address this challenge, we propose Cross-vehicle kinodynamics Adaptation via mobility Representation (CAR), a novel framework that enables rapid mobility transfer to new vehicles. CAR employs a Transformer encoder with Adaptive Layer Normalization to embed vehicle trajectory transitions and physical configurations into a shared mobility latent space. By identifying and extracting commonality from nearest neighbors within this latent space, our approach enables rapid kinodynamics adaptation to novel platforms with minimal data collection and computational overhead. We evaluate CAR using the Verti-Bench simulator, built on the Chrono multi-physics engine, and validate its performance on four distinct physical configurations of the Verti-4-Wheeler platform. With only one minute of new trajectory data, CAR achieves up to 67.2% reduction in prediction error compared to direct neighbor transfer across diverse unseen vehicle configurations, demonstrating the effectiveness of cross-vehicle mobility knowledge transfer in both simulated and real-world environments.

</details>


### [467] [Material Driven HRI Design: Aesthetics as Explainability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06879)
*Natalie Friedman,Kevin Weatherwax,Chengchao Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文认为，机器人设计的材质、颜色和纹理等美学元素可以作为交互信号，引导用户对机器人角色和能力的期望，而非仅仅是装饰。作者提出了一个框架，用于分析材质如何通过传达交互、任务和环境的期望来增强机器人的可解释性，并对六个机器人进行了内容分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人设计多采用光滑、工业化的外观，隐藏内部组件，将机器人塑造成“空白画布”。用户通常根据虚构和非虚构媒体来为机器人添加“外壳”，这可能导致用户期望与机器人实际能力不符。作者希望通过借鉴时尚界的经验，利用美学元素作为交互信号，引导和对齐用户期望。

Method: 作者提出一个框架，用于描述材料如何通过发出关于交互、任务和环境的期望信号来创造可解释性。随后，利用该框架对六个机器人进行内容分析。

Result: 分析表明，材质、颜色和纹理的选择能够影响用户对机器人可触性、角色定位以及能力范围的期望。设计得当的信号可以增强熟悉度和易读性，设计不当则可能导致错误的期望。

Conclusion: 美学元素，尤其是材料选择，不应被视为单纯的装饰，而应被看作是重要的交互信号。通过精心设计这些信号，设计师可以更有效地引导用户期望，提高机器人与人交互的清晰度和效率，并增强机器人的可解释性。

Abstract: Aesthetics - often treated as secondary to function-guides how people interpret robots' roles. A great deal of robot designs - both real and fictitious - use sleek industrial aesthetics. These feature hard glossy plastics, hiding as much of the underlying mechanical and electrical components as possible, resembling something akin to a nude humanoid figure. This leaves robots as something of a blank slate to which end-users apply coverings to, often based on media of fiction and non-fiction alike. We argue that designers can take cues from fashion to design interaction and set appropriate expectations. Rather than viewing appearance as decoration, we propose that color, texture, and material choices function as interaction signals. These signals can invite or discourage touch, clarify a robot's role, and help align user expectations with a robot's actual capabilities. When done thoughtfully, such cues can create familiarity and legibility; when done poorly, they can lead to wrong expectations.
