This preliminary paper proposes a framework describing how materials can create explainability by signaling expectations for interaction, task, and environment. We use this framework to do a content analysis of 6 robots.

</details>


### [468] [VertiAdaptor: Online Kinodynamics Adaptation for Vertically Challenging Terrain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06887)
*Tong Xu,Chenhui Pan,Aniket Datar,Xuesu Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为VertiAdaptor (VA) 的新在线自适应框架，通过整合高程和语义嵌入，实现了地形感知的运动动力学建模和规划，显著提高了在复杂越野环境中的导航鲁棒性和可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的运动动力学模型难以泛化到各种不同的地形类型，需要实时适应以确保越野环境中自动驾驶的安全性和可靠性。

Method: VA框架使用函数编码器，将高程信息与语义嵌入相结合，学习一个由神经常微分方程基函数组成的运动动力学空间。该框架可在离线训练后，通过高效的最小二乘计算，快速适应新环境。

Result: VA在Verti-Bench模拟器和实际的Verti-4-Wheeler平台上进行了评估。结果表明，VA提高了预测精度（高达23.9%），并将适应时间缩短了5倍。

Conclusion: VertiAdaptor (VA) 框架能够有效地学习并适应不同越野环境下的车辆-地形相互作用，从而提高自主机器人在复杂和动态环境中的鲁棒性和可靠性。

Abstract: Autonomous driving in off-road environments presents significant challenges due to the dynamic and unpredictable nature of unstructured terrain. Traditional kinodynamic models often struggle to generalize across diverse geometric and semantic terrain types, underscoring the need for real-time adaptation to ensure safe and reliable navigation. We propose VertiAdaptor (VA), a novel online adaptation framework that efficiently integrates elevation with semantic embeddings to enable terrain-aware kinodynamic modeling and planning via function encoders. VA learns a kinodynamic space spanned by a set of neural ordinary differential equation basis functions, capturing complex vehicle-terrain interactions across varied environments. After offline training, the proposed approach can rapidly adapt to new, unseen environments by identifying kinodynamics in the learned space through a computationally efficient least-squares calculation. We evaluate VA within the Verti-Bench simulator, built on the Chrono multi-physics engine, and validate its performance both in simulation and on a physical Verti-4-Wheeler platform. Our results demonstrate that VA improves prediction accuracy by up to 23.9% and achieves a 5X faster adaptation time, advancing the robustness and reliability of autonomous robots in complex and evolving off-road environments.

</details>


### [469] [Collaborative Planning with Concurrent Synchronization for Operationally Constrained UAV-UGV Teams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06898)
*Zihao Deng,Qianhuang Li,Peng Gao,Maggie Wigness,John Rogers,Donghyun Kim,Hao Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为CoPCS的学习方法，利用异构图Transformer进行操作约束下的任务编码，并结合Transformer解码器进行同步协同规划，实现了UAV和UGV的同步并发协同，提高了机器人团队的整体性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际复杂的大规模任务中，异构机器人团队（如UAV和UGV）需要协同规划能力来克服各自的局限性（UAV的飞行时间限制和UGV的地形限制），特别是需要实现在任务执行过程中同步进行充电。

Method: 提出了一种名为CoPCS（Collaborative Planning with Concurrent Synchronization）的学习方法。该方法整合了一个异构图Transformer来编码操作约束下的任务，并使用一个Transformer解码器进行联合、同步的协同规划。

Result: 实验结果表明，CoPCS提供了新颖的多机器人同步并发协同规划能力，并显著提高了机器人团队的整体性能。该方法在机器人仿真和实体机器人团队的实验中得到了验证。

Conclusion: CoPCS是一种有效的学习方法，能够实现异构机器人团队（UAV和UGV）在操作约束下的同步并发协同规划，解决了UAV的能量限制和UGV的地形限制问题，并能实现及时充电，从而提升了团队的整体任务完成效率。

Abstract: Collaborative planning under operational constraints is an essential capability for heterogeneous robot teams tackling complex large-scale real-world tasks. Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) offer rapid environmental coverage, but flight time is often limited by energy constraints, whereas Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs) have greater energy capacity to support long-duration missions, but movement is constrained by traversable terrain. Individually, neither can complete tasks such as environmental monitoring. Effective UAV-UGV collaboration therefore requires energy-constrained multi-UAV task planning, traversability-constrained multi-UGV path planning, and crucially, synchronized concurrent co-planning to ensure timely in-mission recharging. To enable these capabilities, we propose Collaborative Planning with Concurrent Synchronization (CoPCS), a learning-based approach that integrates a heterogeneous graph transformer for operationally constrained task encoding with a transformer decoder for joint, synchronized co-planning that enables UAVs and UGVs to act concurrently in a coordinated manner. CoPCS is trained end-to-end under a unified imitation learning paradigm. We conducted extensive experiments to evaluate CoPCS in both robotic simulations and physical robot teams. Experimental results demonstrate that our method provides the novel multi-robot capability of synchronized concurrent co-planning and substantially improves team performance. More details of this work are available on the project website: https://hcrlab.gitlab.io/project/CoPCS.

</details>


### [470] [SysNav: Multi-Level Systematic Cooperation Enables Real-World, Cross-Embodiment Object Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06914)
*Haokun Zhu,Zongtai Li,Zihan Liu,Kevin Guo,Zhengzhi Lin,Yuxin Cai,Guofei Chen,Chen Lv,Wenshan Wang,Jean Oh,Ji Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为SysNav的三级导航系统，用于解决真实世界中需要长距离规划和语义理解的物体导航问题。该系统将语义推理、导航规划和运动控制解耦，并在三种不同机器人上进行了部署和测试，取得了显著的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在真实世界环境中进行物体导航面临着复杂空间结构、长距离规划和语义理解等多重挑战。虽然视觉语言模型（VLM）在语义理解方面有潜力，但将其有效集成到真实世界导航系统中仍具挑战。

Method: SysNav系统分为三个层次：高层利用VLM进行语义理解和导航指导；中层采用分层房间导航策略，将VLM的推理能力保留用于房间级决策，以提高效率；低层通过特定于执行器的运动控制模块执行导航点。该系统解耦了语义推理、导航规划和运动控制。

Result: 该系统在三种不同机器人（轮式机器人、四足机器人、人形机器人）上进行了190次真实世界实验，成功率和导航效率均有显著提升。在四个模拟基准测试中也达到了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: SysNav是第一个能够可靠且高效地在复杂真实世界环境中完成建筑规模长距离物体导航的系统。该系统通过解耦和分层策略，有效地结合了VLM的语义能力和传统的导航技术，实现了在真实世界中的鲁棒性和泛化性。

Abstract: Object navigation (ObjectNav) in real-world environments is a complex problem that requires simultaneously addressing multiple challenges, including complex spatial structure, long-horizon planning and semantic understanding. Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer promising capabilities for semantic understanding, yet effectively integrating them into real-world navigation systems remains a non-trivial challenge. In this work, we formulate real-world ObjectNav as a system-level problem and introduce SysNav, a three-level ObjectNav system designed for real-world crossembodiment deployment. SysNav decouples semantic reasoning, navigation planning and motion control to ensure robustness and generalizability. At the high-level, we summarize the environment into a structured scene representation and leverage VLMs to provide semantic-grounded navigation guidance. At the mid-level, we introduce a hierarchical room-based navigation strategy that reserves VLM guidance for room-level decisions, which effectively utilizes its reasoning ability while ensuring system efficiency. At the low-level, planned waypoints are executed through different embodiment-specific motion control modules. We deploy our system on three embodiments, a custom-built wheeled robot, the Unitree Go2 quadruped and the Unitree G1 humanoid, and conduct 190 real-world experiments. Our system achieves substantial improvements in both success rate and navigation efficiency. To the best of our knowledge, SysNav is the first system capable of reliably and efficiently completing building-scale long-range object navigation in complex real-world environments. Furthermore, extensive experiments on four simulation benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. Project page is available at: https://cmu-vln.github.io/.

</details>


### [471] [T2Nav Algebraic Topology Aware Temporal Graph Memory and Loop Detection for ZeroShot Visual Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06918)
*Quang-Anh N. D.,Duc Pham,Minh-Anh Nguyen,Tung Doan,Tuan Dang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: T2Nav 是一种零样本导航系统，通过整合异构数据和图推理，实现了在未知环境中高效且鲁棒的导航，能够处理以参考图像为目标的导航任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统导航学习方法在处理新任务时需要大量数据、频繁调整甚至重新训练，难以扩展和灵活。而现有的基于基础模型的零样本方法在输入类型、推理能力和对环境细节的利用方面存在不足。

Method: T2Nav 系统整合了异构数据，并采用基于图的推理。它将视觉信息直接融入图结构，并与环境进行匹配。这种方法实现了在探索和达成目标之间的平衡，从而提高了避障、回环检测和路径规划的鲁棒性和效率。

Result: T2Nav 系统能够处理以具体目标实例的参考图像作为导航目标的任务，并在实验中表现出高效性，能够很好地适应未知环境，实现了零样本实例图像导航。

Conclusion: T2Nav 系统通过整合视觉信息和图推理，克服了现有方法的局限性，为实现实用的零样本实例图像导航提供了有效解决方案，能够灵活应对未知环境中的导航挑战。

Abstract: Deploying autonomous agents in real world environments is challenging, particularly for navigation, where systems must adapt to situations they have not encountered before. Traditional learning approaches require substantial amounts of data, constant tuning, and, sometimes, starting over for each new task. That makes them hard to scale and not very flexible. Recent breakthroughs in foundation models, such as large language models and vision language models, enable systems to attempt new navigation tasks without requiring additional training. However, many of these methods only work with specific input types, employ relatively basic reasoning, and fail to fully exploit the details they observe or the structure of the spaces. Here, we introduce T2Nav, a zeroshot navigation system that integrates heterogeneous data and employs graph-based reasoning. By directly incorporating visual information into the graph and matching it to the environment, our approach enables the system to strike a good balance between exploration and goal attainment. This strategy allows robust obstacle avoidance, reliable loop closure detection, and efficient path planning while eliminating redundant exploration patterns. The system demonstrates flexibility by handling goals specified using reference images of target object instances, making it particularly suitable for scenarios in which agents must navigate to visually similar yet spatially distinct instances. Experiments demonstrate that our approach is efficient and adapts well to unknown environments, moving toward practical zero-shot instance-image navigation capabilities.

</details>


### [472] [SurgSync: Time-Synchronized Multi-Modal Data Collection Framework and Dataset for Surgical Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06919)
*Haoying Zhou,Chang Liu,Yimeng Wu,Junlin Wu,Zijian Wu,Yu Chung Lee,Sara Martuscelli,Spetimiu E. Salcudean,Gregory S. Fischer,Peter Kazanzides*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出 SurgSync 框架，一个多模态数据收集系统，用于为机器人手术训练 AI 模型，支持实时推理和离线同步，并在 dVRK 上实现，提供高质量数据和用户研究验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人手术系统多为“人机协同”模式，缺乏足够的数据训练更高级别的自主控制AI，限制了机器人手术的发展。

Method: 提出 SurgSync 框架，包括双模式同步录制器、高质量立体内窥镜、侧视摄像头和电容式接触传感器，并提供后处理工具箱（深度估计、光流、运动学重投影）。在 dVRK 上实现，并进行用户研究收集数据。

Result: 通过用户研究收集了包含 214 个经过验证的实例的、跨多个训练任务的临床真实数据集。展示了使用该数据集进行手术技能评估网络训练。

Conclusion: SurgSync 框架成功收集了高质量的多模态数据，可用于训练机器人手术AI模型，并为未来的研究提供了开放的软件和数据资源。

Abstract: Most existing robotic surgery systems adopt a human-in-the-loop paradigm, often with the surgeon directly teleoperating the robotic system. Adding intelligence to these robots would enable higher-level control, such as supervised autonomy or even full autonomy. However, artificial intelligence (AI) requires large amounts of training data, which is currently lacking. This work proposes SurgSync, a multi-modal data collection framework with offline and online synchronization to support training and real-time inference, respectively. The framework is implemented on a da Vinci Research Kit (dVRK) and introduces (1) dual-mode (online/offline-matching) synchronized recorders, (2) a modern stereo endoscope to achieve image quality on par with clinical systems, and (3) additional sensors such as a side-view camera and a novel capacitive contact sensor to provide ground truth contact data. The framework also incorporates a post-processing toolbox for tasks such as depth estimation, optical flow, and a practical kinematic reprojection method using Gaussian heatmap. User studies with participants of varying skill levels are performed with ex-vivo tissue to provide clinically realistic data, and a network for surgical skill assessment is employed to demonstrate utilization of the collected data. Through the user study experiments, we obtained a dataset of 214 validated instances across multiple canonical training tasks. All software and data are available at surgsync.github.io.

</details>


### [473] [CN-CBF: Composite Neural Control Barrier Function for Safe Robot Navigation in Dynamic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06921)
*Bojan Derajić,Sebastian Bernhard,Wolfgang Hönig*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的神经控制障碍函数（CBF）设计方法，用于在动态和不确定的环境中实现安全导航，通过组合多个CBF并利用Hamilton-Jacobi可达性框架进行训练，实验结果表明在成功率上有所提升且不会增加保守性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习和模型的方法在设计易于部署但难于设计的CBF方面存在不足，特别是在动态和不确定的环境中，机器人安全导航仍然是一个核心挑战。

Method: 采用复合CBF的思想，将多个神经CBF组合成一个单一的CBF。单个CBF通过Hamilton-Jacobi可达性框架训练，以逼近单个移动障碍物的最优安全集。此外，利用残差神经网络结构，确保估计的安全集不与相应的失效集相交。

Result: 在地面机器人和四旋翼飞行器的仿真实验中，与多个基线方法相比，成功率提高了18%。硬件实验也验证了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提出的神经CBF设计方法简单有效，能够提高机器人动态环境下的安全导航能力，并且在提升性能的同时并未增加运动的保守性。

Abstract: Safe navigation of autonomous robots remains one of the core challenges in the field, especially in dynamic and uncertain environments. One of the prevalent approaches is safety filtering based on control barrier functions (CBFs), which are easy to deploy but difficult to design. Motivated by the shortcomings of existing learning- and model-based methods, we propose a simple yet effective neural CBF design method for safe robot navigation in dynamic environments. We employ the idea of a composite CBF, where multiple neural CBFs are combined into a single CBF. The individual CBFs are trained via the Hamilton-Jacobi reachability framework to approximate the optimal safe set for single moving obstacles. Additionally, we use the residual neural architecture, which guarantees that the estimated safe set does not intersect with the corresponding failure set. The method is extensively evaluated in simulation experiments for a ground robot and a quadrotor, comparing it against several baseline methods. The results show improved success rates of up to 18\% compared to the best baseline, without increasing the conservativeness of the motion. Also, the method is demonstrated in hardware experiments for both types of robots.

</details>


### [474] [LIPP: Load-Aware Informative Path Planning with Physical Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06924)
*Hojune Kim,Guangyao Shi,Gaurav S. Sukhatme*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了负载感知信息路径规划 (LIPP) 方法，用于解决机器人进行物理样本采集时，样本质量会影响后续运动成本的问题，与传统的仅考虑路径长度的 C-IPP 不同，LIPP 考虑了信息增益与负载相关遍历成本之间的耦合关系，并将其表述为混合整数二次规划问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的 C-IPP 模型在机器人采集物理样本时存在不足，因为它忽略了样本收集增加的质量对后续运动能量成本的影响，可能导致路径虽然距离短但能量消耗大，无法最优地利用能量预算采集更多样本和数据。

Method: 本文提出了负载感知信息路径规划 (LIPP) 方法，将其表述为一个混合整数二次规划 (MIQP) 问题，该问题联合优化了路径规划、访问顺序和每个地点的采样数量，同时考虑了能量预算。当样本单位质量趋近于零时，LIPP 可退化为 C-IPP。

Result: 研究表明 LIPP 是 C-IPP 的严格推广。通过理论分析，得出了 LIPP 相对于 C-IPP 路径长度增加的边界，并量化了能量效率提升的权衡。模拟实验显示，在零样本质量时 LIPP 与 C-IPP 行为一致，随着样本质量增加，LIPP 在单位能量消耗下的不确定性降低能力逐步提高。

Conclusion: LIPP 方法能够有效地解决物理样本采集任务中的能量优化问题，通过考虑样本负载对运动成本的影响，可以更高效地利用能量预算，实现更好的数据采集效果。该方法在不同样本质量下都能表现出优越性。

Abstract: In classical Informative Path Planning (C-IPP), robots are typically modeled as mobile sensors that acquire digital measurements such as images or radiation levels. In this model - since making a measurement leaves the robot's physical state unchanged - traversal costs are determined solely by the path taken. This is a natural assumption for many missions, but does not extend to settings involving physical sample collection, where each collected sample adds mass and increases the energy cost of all subsequent motion. As a result, IPP formulations that ignore this coupling between information gain and load-dependent traversal cost can produce plans that are distance-efficient but energy-suboptimal, collecting fewer samples and less data than the energy budget would permit. In this paper, we introduce Load-aware Informative Path Planning (LIPP ), a generalization of C-IPP that explicitly models this coupling and the resulting order-dependent traversal costs. We formulate LIPP as a Mixed-Integer Quadratic Program (MIQP) that jointly optimizes routing, visitation order, and per-location sampling count under an energy budget. We show that LIPP strictly generalizes C-IPP: as sample unit mass $λ\to 0$, the load-dependent energy model reduces exactly to the classical distance budget constraint, recovering C-IPP as a special case. We further derive theoretical bounds on the path-length increase of LIPP relative to C-IPP, characterizing the trade-off for improved energy efficiency. Finally, through extensive simulations across 2000 diverse mission scenarios, we demonstrate that LIPP matches the behavior of C-IPP at zero sample mass and progressively achieves higher uncertainty reduction per unit energy as sample mass increases.

</details>


### [475] [A Contrastive Fewshot RGBD Traversability Segmentation Framework for Indoor Robotic Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06927)
*Qiyuan An,Tuan Dang,Fillia Makedon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种结合RGB图像和稀疏1D激光雷达深度信息的室内可通行区域分割方法，并引入负对比学习来提高对薄障碍物的检测能力，在少样本学习场景下表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纯视觉方法难以检测细小障碍物（如椅腿），存在安全风险；同时，标注大量室内可通行区域数据集成本高昂，希望在少样本情况下提升泛化能力。

Method: 提出多模态（RGB+1D激光雷达深度）分割框架；采用少样本分割（FSS）范式；引入负对比学习（NCL）分支，利用负样本（障碍物）原型来优化可通行区域预测；设计两阶段注意力深度模块来对齐1D深度和RGB图像。

Result: 在自建的室内RGB-D可通行区域数据集上，该方法在1-shot和5-shot设置下均优于现有的FSS和RGB-D分割基线，mIoU最高提升9%。

Conclusion: 利用负样本原型和稀疏深度信息能够实现鲁棒且高效的室内可通行区域分割，并且在少样本场景下具有良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: Indoor traversability segmentation aims to identify safe, navigable free space for autonomous agents, which is critical for robotic navigation. Pure vision-based models often fail to detect thin obstacles, such as chair legs, which can pose serious safety risks. We propose a multi-modal segmentation framework that leverages RGB images and sparse 1D laser depth information to capture geometric interactions and improve the detection of challenging obstacles. To reduce the reliance on large labeled datasets, we adopt the few-shot segmentation (FSS) paradigm, enabling the model to generalize from limited annotated examples. Traditional FSS methods focus solely on positive prototypes, often leading to overfitting to the support set and poor generalization. To address this, we introduce a negative contrastive learning (NCL) branch that leverages negative prototypes (obstacles) to refine free-space predictions. Additionally, we design a two-stage attention depth module to align 1D depth vectors with RGB images both horizontally and vertically. Extensive experiments on our custom-collected indoor RGB-D traversability dataset demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art FSS and RGB-D segmentation baselines, achieving up to 9\% higher mIoU under both 1-shot and 5-shot settings. These results highlight the effectiveness of leveraging negative prototypes and sparse depth for robust and efficient traversability segmentation.

</details>


### [476] [Failure Mechanisms and Risk Estimation for Legged Robot Locomotion on Granular Slopes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06928)
*Xingjue Liao,Feifei Qian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究人员使用六足机器人和可倾斜的沙床进行实验，测量了在沙坡上行走的力和速度。他们发现，坡度越大，阻力越小，但机器人前进也越慢。基于实验数据，他们建立了一个模型，可以预测机器人行走时的表现和失败的风险，并为在不平坦地面上安全行走提供指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在沙地等颗粒介质斜坡上行走对腿式机器人来说是一个基本挑战，因为颗粒介质的剪切强度降低和重力引起的各向异性屈服。因此，需要理解和预测机器人在这种环境下的运动性能和潜在的失效机制。

Method: 使用六足机器人和可倾斜的颗粒介质（沙床）进行系统性测量。记录机器人的运动速度、斜坡相关的法向和切向颗粒阻力。基于实验数据，开发了一个简化的机器人-地形交互模型，用于预测锚定时间、步长和机器人速度。

Result: 法向穿透阻力几乎不随坡度变化，但切向阻力随坡度增加而显著减小。模型预测，坡度导致的性能下降主要是由于锚定延迟和向后滑动增加，而不是过度的下沉。分析表明，斜坡引起的性能损失主要归因于锚定延迟和向后滑动，而非过度的下沉。

Conclusion: 该研究开发了一个物理学驱动的框架，可以预测颗粒介质斜坡上的机器人行走性能和失效模式（下沉或滑动）。该框架能够对机器人操作进行定量风险评估，并为在变形斜坡上实现更安全、更鲁棒的机器人操作提供指导。

Abstract: Locomotion on granular slopes such as sand dunes remains a fundamental challenge for legged robots due to reduced shear strength and gravity-induced anisotropic yielding of granular media. Using a hexapedal robot on a tiltable granular bed, we systematically measure locomotion speed together with slope-dependent normal and shear granular resistive forces. While normal penetration resistance remains nearly unchanged with inclination, shear resistance decreases substantially as slope angle increases. Guided by these measurements, we develop a simple robot-terrain interaction model that predicts anchoring timing, step length, and resulting robot speed, as functions of terrain strength and slope angle. The model reveals that slope-induced performance loss is primarily governed by delayed anchoring and increased backward slip rather than excessive sinkage. By extending the model to generalized terrain conditions, we construct failure phase diagrams that identify sinkage- and slippage-induced failure regimes, enabling quantitative risk estimation for locomotion on granular slopes. This physics-informed framework provides predictive insight into terrain-dependent failure mechanisms and offers guidance for safer and more robust robot operation on deformable inclines.

</details>


### [477] [Feasibility Restoration under Conflicting STL Specifications with Pareto-Optimal Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06947)
*Tianhao Wu,Yiwei Lyu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两阶段框架，用于处理机器人领域中信号时序逻辑（STL）规范冲突导致的模型预测控制（MPC）不可行问题。该框架首先通过最小化松弛恢复可行性，然后将其视为价值感知的多目标优化问题进行优化，并使用ε-约束法近似帕累托前沿，以分析不同目标之间的权衡。实验表明，该方法能有效避免在STL规范冲突下的死锁，并在自动驾驶案例研究中实现了可解释的决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际应用中，机器人领域的STL规范（如安全规则、交通法规和任务目标）可能存在冲突，导致传统的基于STL约束的模型预测控制（MPC）变得不可行，并采取保守的冻结策略，这在安全关键场景下会增加风险。因此，需要一种新的方法来处理这些冲突。

Method: 提出一个统一的两阶段框架。第一阶段：通过最小化松弛恢复STL规范的可行性。第二阶段：将恢复可行性的问题表述为一个价值感知的多目标优化问题，并使用ε-约束法近似帕累托前沿，从而分析不同目标之间的权衡，并进行反事实分析。

Result: 该方法能够避免在STL规范冲突下的死锁情况。通过自动驾驶案例研究，证明了该方法在安全关键应用中能够实现可解释的决策。

Conclusion: 所提出的两阶段框架能够有效地处理信号时序逻辑（STL）规范冲突导致的问题，通过最小化松弛恢复可行性，并提供价值感知的多目标优化方法来分析和权衡不同目标，从而在安全关键场景下实现鲁棒且可解释的控制。

Abstract: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is expressive formal language that specifies spatio-temporal requirements in robotics. Its quantitative robustness semantics can be easily integrated with optimization-based control frameworks. However, STL specifications may become conflicting in real-world applications, where safety rules, traffic regulations, and task objectives can be cannot be satisfied together. In these situations, traditional STL-constrained Model Predictive Control (MPC) becomes infeasible and default to conservative behaviors such as freezing, which can largely increase risks in safety-critical scenarios. In this paper, we proposes a unified two-stage framework that first restores feasibility via minimal relaxation, then refine the feasible solution by formulating it as a value-aware multi-objective optimization problem. Using $\varepsilon$-constraint method, we approximate the Pareto front of the multi-objective optimization, which allows analysis of tradeoffs among competing objectives and counterfactual analysis of alternative actions. We demonstrate that the proposed approach avoids deadlock under conflicting STL specifications and enables interpretable decision-making in safety-critical applications by conducting a case study in autonomous driving.

</details>


### [478] [Energy-Efficient Collaborative Transport of Tether-Suspended Payloads via Rotating Equilibrium](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06955)
*Eric Foss,Andrew Tai,Carlo Bosio,Mark W. Mueller*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 通过让多旋翼无人机系统以旋转方式悬吊和运输系绳载荷，可以利用离心力来提供水平拉力，从而使无人机仅需产生垂直推力，从而将功率消耗降低高达 20%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的系绳载荷协作式空中运输受限于空间、能源和重量，并且传统方法依靠静态平衡，需要无人机产生水平推力来维持队形，这会造成显著的能源损失。

Method: 提出一种旋转平衡操作模式，通过让整个系统进行稳定圆周运动，利用产生的离心力来提供系绳所需的水平张力，从而使每个无人机只需产生垂直推力。

Result: 与静态提升相比，旋转平衡可以将功率消耗降低高达 20%，并且允许使用更宽范围的系绳配置而不会牺牲效率。

Conclusion: 旋转平衡是一种更有效率的系绳载荷协作式空中运输方法，可以显著降低功率需求，使其在实际应用中更具可行性。

Abstract: Collaborative aerial transportation of tethered payloads is fundamentally limited by space, power, and weight constraints. Conventional approaches rely on static equilibrium conditions, where each vehicle tilts to generate the forces that ensure they maintain a formation geometry that avoids aerodynamic interactions and collision. This horizontal thrust component represents a significant energy penalty compared to the ideal case in which each vehicle produces purely vertical thrust to lift the payload. Operating in tighter tether configurations can minimize this effect, but at the cost of either having to fly the vehicles in closer proximity, which risks collision, or significantly increasing the length of the tether, which increases complexity and reduces potential use-cases. We propose operating the tether-suspended flying system at a rotating equilibrium. By maintaining steady circular motion, centrifugal forces provide the necessary horizontal tether tension, allowing each quadrotor to generate purely vertical thrust and thus reducing the total force (and power) required compared to an equilibrium where the thrusts are not vertical. It also allows for a wider range of tether configurations to be used without sacrificing efficiency. Results demonstrate that rotating equilibria can reduce power consumption relative to static lifting by up to 20%, making collaborative aerial solutions more practically relevant.

</details>


### [479] [Is Your Safe Controller Actually Safe? A Critical Review of CBF Tautologies and Hidden Assumptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06954)
*Taekyung Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本教程批判性地回顾了控制势垒函数（CBF）在机器人安全中的实际应用，指出了理论假设与输入受限系统中的实际控制器实现之间的差距，并提供了构建可实现的安全论证的实用指南。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理论上的控制势垒函数（CBF）已被充分研究，但其在存在输入约束的机器人系统中的实际应用存在理论假设与实际控制器实现之间的差距，这促使了本研究。

Method: 通过分析系统动力学、执行器限制和类K函数之间的相互作用，区分了候选CBF和有效CBF。通过回顾低维示例，展示了CBF公式在何时提供有效安全保证以及何时因常见误用而失败。最后，提供构建可实现安全论证的实用指南，并辅以开源交互式Web演示。

Result: 识别出在具有输入约束的系统中，CBF理论假设与实际控制器实现之间存在的普遍差距。分析表明，某些安全机器人策略的演示仅限于具有被动安全特性的系统。提供了指导原则，以处理那些没有被动安全特性的系统。

Conclusion: 本教程旨在弥合理论保证与实际机器人安全系统实现之间的差距，通过提供清晰的指导方针和直观的演示，帮助研究人员和工程师在实际应用中正确使用CBF。

Abstract: This tutorial provides a critical review of the practical application of Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) in robotic safety. While the theoretical foundations of CBFs are well-established, I identify a recurring gap between the mathematical assumption of a safe controller's existence and its constructive realization in systems with input constraints. I highlight the distinction between candidate and valid CBFs by analyzing the interplay of system dynamics, actuation limits, and class-K functions. I further show that some purported demonstrations of safe robot policies or controllers are limited to passively safe systems, such as single integrators or kinematic manipulators, where safety is already inherited from the underlying physics and even naive geometric hard constraints suffice to prevent collisions. By revisiting simple low-dimensional examples, I show when CBF formulations provide valid safety guarantees and when they fail due to common misuses. I then provide practical guidelines for constructing realizable safety arguments for systems without such passive safety. The goal of this tutorial is to bridge the gap between theoretical guarantees and actual implementation, supported by an open-source interactive web demonstration that visualizes these concepts intuitively.

</details>


### [480] [Foundational World Models Accurately Detect Bimanual Manipulator Failures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06987)
*Isaac R. Ward,Michelle Ho,Houjun Liu,Aaron Feldman,Joseph Vincent,Liam Kruse,Sean Cheong,Duncan Eddy,Mykel J. Kochenderfer,Mac Schwager*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种基于预训练视觉基础模型压缩潜在空间中的概率性、历史信息世界模型，用于检测双臂操作机器人的异常故障。该模型输出不确定性估计，并将其用作符合性预测框架中的不合格分数，从而实现运行时监控。研究在一个模拟环境和一个新的数据中心维护数据集上进行了测试，结果表明该方法优于现有技术，并且参数效率更高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在规模化部署视觉运动机器人时，异常故障可能导致性能下降、损坏或危险，尤其是在状态空间巨大的双臂操作机器人上。显式定义故障模式在这样的高维状态空间中是不可行的。因此，需要一种有效的方法来检测和缓解这些异常故障。

Method: 研究者训练了一个概率性的、历史信息的世界模型，该模型运行在预训练的视觉基础模型（NVIDIA Cosmos Tokenizer）的压缩潜在空间中。模型输出的预测不确定性被用作符合性预测框架中的不合格分数。这些分数被用来开发一个运行时监控器，将高不确定性时期与异常故障相关联。

Result: 该方法在模拟的Push-T环境和新引入的双臂电缆操作数据集上进行了测试。结果表明，该方法显著优于现有的异常检测和分布外检测方法的基线。与参数量最多的学习方法相比，本研究的方法参数量减少了约二十倍，但故障检测率提高了3.8%。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于压缩潜在空间世界模型和符合性预测的方法能够有效地检测双臂操作机器人的异常故障，并且在参数效率和性能上都优于现有技术，为在需要高可靠性的真实世界环境中安全部署操作机器人铺平了道路。

Abstract: Deploying visuomotor robots at scale is challenging due to the potential for anomalous failures to degrade performance, cause damage, or endanger human life. Bimanual manipulators are no exception; these robots have vast state spaces comprised of high-dimensional images and proprioceptive signals. Explicitly defining failure modes within such state spaces is infeasible. In this work, we overcome these challenges by training a probabilistic, history informed, world model within the compressed latent space of a pretrained vision foundation model (NVIDIA's Cosmos Tokenizer). The model outputs uncertainty estimates alongside its predictions that serve as non-conformity scores within a conformal prediction framework. We use these scores to develop a runtime monitor, correlating periods of high uncertainty with anomalous failures. To test these methods, we use the simulated Push-T environment and the Bimanual Cable Manipulation dataset, the latter of which we introduce in this work. This new dataset features trajectories with multiple synchronized camera views, proprioceptive signals, and annotated failures from a challenging data center maintenance task. We benchmark our methods against baselines from the anomaly detection and out-of-distribution detection literature, and show that our approach considerably outperforms statistical techniques. Furthermore, we show that our approach requires approximately one twentieth of the trainable parameters as the next-best learning-based approach, yet outperforms it by 3.8% in terms of failure detection rate, paving the way toward safely deploying manipulator robots in real-world environments where reliability is non-negotiable.

</details>


### [481] [VSL-Skin: Individually Addressable Phase-Change Voxel Skin for Variable-Stiffness and Virtual Joints Bridging Soft and Rigid Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06979)
*Zihan Oliver Zeng,Jiajun An,Preston Luk,Upinder Kaur*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为VSL-Skin的可变刚度晶格皮肤系统，实现了厘米级精度下单个体素尺度的形态控制，能够显著调节刚度，实现高达30%的轴向压缩，并通过热循环实现组件级自修复，为机器人提供了形态智能和可重构性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软机器人缺乏结构强度，硬机器人则缺乏适应性。现有的可变刚度系统通常在较大尺度上操作，难以精确控制刚度分布和虚拟关节的位置。研究的动机是开发一种能够实现精细化、体素级别刚度控制的系统，以弥合软硬机器人的差距，并赋予机器人更强的形态适应性和鲁棒性。

Method: 本文提出了一种名为VSL-Skin的可变刚度晶格皮肤系统。该系统采用逐个体素（voxel）控制的方法，通过激活特定体素来改变材料的刚度。系统集成了能够实现约两个数量级的刚度调节（在轴向、剪切、弯曲和扭转模式下），并实现了30%的轴向压缩。此外，它还支持通过热循环实现组件级自修复，消除了疲劳累积，并允许进行可编程的牺牲关节设计。该平台集成了闭式设计模型和有限元分析，用于预测性地合成刚度模式和关节位置。实验验证了该系统的各项性能。

Result: VSL-Skin系统实现了：1) 在轴向、剪切、弯曲和扭转模式下，刚度可调范围近两个数量级，且具有厘米级空间控制能力；2) 在相变系统中首次实现了30%的轴向压缩，同时保持结构完整性；3) 通过热循环实现组件级自修复，消除疲劳累积，并实现了可预测的失效管理；4) 通过选择性体素激活，可以创建六种基本类型的虚拟关节，在激活区域可编程地调节顺应性，而在非激活区域保持结构完整性；5) 实验验证了30%的轴向收缩，75秒的循环热切换，以及在修剪后仍能保持可寻址性的切割集成能力。

Conclusion: VSL-Skin系统是第一个能够实现体素级别形态控制的系统，赋予了机器人以厘米级精度调节刚度、实现显著变形和自修复的能力。该框架将形态智能视为一种可工程化的系统属性，推动了自主可重构机器人的发展，为设计更具适应性和鲁棒性的机器人提供了新的途径。

Abstract: Soft robots are compliant but often cannot support loads or hold their shape, while rigid robots provide structural strength but are less adaptable. Existing variable-stiffness systems usually operate at the scale of whole segments or patches, which limits precise control over stiffness distribution and virtual joint placement. This paper presents the Variable Stiffness Lattice Skin (VSL-Skin), the first system to enable individually addressable voxel-level morphological control with centimeter-scale precision. The system provides three main capabilities: nearly two orders of magnitude stiffness modulation across axial (15-1200 N/mm), shear (45-850 N/mm), bending (8*10^2 - 3*10^4 N/deg), and torsional modes with centimeter-scale spatial control; the first demonstrated 30% axial compression in phase-change systems while maintaining structural integrity; and autonomous component-level self-repair through thermal cycling, which eliminates fatigue accumulation and enables programmable sacrificial joints for predictable failure management. Selective voxel activation creates six canonical virtual joint types with programmable compliance while preserving structural integrity in non-activated regions. The platform incorporates closed-form design models and finite element analysis for predictive synthesis of stiffness patterns and joint placement. Experimental validation demonstrates 30% axial contraction, thermal switching in 75-second cycles, and cut-to-fit integration that preserves addressability after trimming. The row-column architecture enables platform-agnostic deployment across diverse robotic systems without specialized infrastructure. This framework establishes morphological intelligence as an engineerable system property and advances autonomous reconfigurable robotics.

</details>


### [482] [Robodimm: A Physics-Grounded Framework for Automated Actuator Sizing in Scalable Modular Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06864)
*J. L. Torres,M. Munoz,J. D. Alvarez,J. L. Blanco,A. Gimenez*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Robodimm 是一个用于机器人驱动器尺寸自动化的软件框架，特别针对具有闭环运动链的模块化机器人。它利用 Pinocchio 和 Pink 进行动力学和逆运动学计算，并通过 KKT 公式处理约束逆动力学。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器人设计中，选择合适的电机-齿轮箱组合至关重要，因为它直接影响成本、质量和动态性能。这对于具有闭环运动链的模块化机器人尤其具有挑战性，因为关节扭矩是耦合的，并且执行器惯量会通过机构传播。

Method: 该框架利用 Pinocchio 进行动力学计算，Pink 进行逆运动学计算，并使用 Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) 公式来处理约束逆动力学。它支持参数化缩放、通过 Jog 模式进行交互式轨迹编程，以及一个解决执行器自重效应的两轮验证流程。

Result: Robodimm 能够自动进行驱动器尺寸的调整，支持模块化机器人的可扩展架构，并考虑了执行器自重等复杂因素。

Conclusion: Robodimm 提供了一个自动化解决方案，以应对模块化机器人（特别是具有闭环运动链的机器人）在驱动器选型方面的挑战，通过集成先进的动力学和逆运动学工具，提高了设计的效率和准确性。

Abstract: Selecting an appropriate motor-gearbox combination is a critical design task in robotics because it directly affects cost, mass, and dynamic performance. This process is especially challenging in modular robots with closed kinematic chains, where joint torques are coupled and actuator inertia propagates through the mechanism. We present Robodimm, a software framework for automated actuator sizing in scalable robot architectures. By leveraging Pinocchio for dynamics and Pink for inverse kinematics, Robodimm uses a Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) formulation for constrained inverse dynamics. The platform supports parametric scaling, interactive trajectory programming through jog modes, and a two-round validation workflow that addresses actuator self-weight effects.

</details>


### [483] [SSP: Safety-guaranteed Surgical Policy via Joint Optimization of Behavioral and Spatial Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07032)
*Jianshu Hu,ZhiYuan Guan,Lei Song,Kantaphat Leelakunwet,Hesheng Wang,Wei Xiao,Qi Dou,Yutong Ban*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为SSP（Safety-guaranteed Surgical Policy）的框架，结合了不确定性感知动力学模型和基于控制障碍函数（CBF）的安全控制器，用于在机器人辅助手术中实现数据驱动的自主性和形式化安全保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据驱动的机器人手术策略（如RL/IL）缺乏形式化的安全保证，这阻碍了其在临床中的应用。需要一种方法来弥合数据驱动的通用性和形式化安全之间的差距。

Method: 利用神经常微分方程（Neural ODE）从演示数据中学习不确定性感知动力学模型。该模型用于一个鲁棒的控制障碍函数（CBF）安全控制器，该控制器最小化地修改手术策略的动作，以确保在不确定性下的严格安全。控制器包含行为约束（限制任务空间）和空间约束（定义禁区）。

Result: 在SurRoL模拟和dVRK平台上进行了验证。SSP框架在RL、IL和CLF策略下均表现良好，实现了接近零的约束违反率，同时保持了与无约束基线相比高任务成功率。

Conclusion: SSP框架成功地将不确定性感知动力学模型与CBF安全控制器相结合，为机器人辅助手术提供了数据驱动的通用性和形式化的安全保证，在保证安全的同时维持了任务性能。

Abstract: The paradigm of robot-assisted surgery is shifting toward data-driven autonomy, where policies learned via Reinforcement Learning (RL) or Imitation Learning (IL) enable the execution of complex tasks. However, these ``black-box" policies often lack formal safety guarantees, a critical requirement for clinical deployment. In this paper, we propose the Safety-guaranteed Surgical Policy (SSP) framework to bridge the gap between data-driven generality and formal safety. We utilize Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (Neural ODEs) to learn an uncertainty-aware dynamics model from demonstration data. This learned model underpins a robust Control Barrier Function (CBF) safety controller, which minimally alters the actions of a surgical policy to ensure strict safety under uncertainty. Our controller enforces two constraint categories: behavioral constraints (restricting the task space of the agent) and spatial constraints (defining surgical no-go zones). We instantiate the SSP framework with surgical policies derived from RL, IL and Control Lyapunov Functions (CLF). Validation on in both the SurRoL simulation and da Vinci Research Kit (dVRK) demonstrates that our method achieves a near-zero constraint violation rate while maintaining high task success rates compared to unconstrained baselines.

</details>


### [484] [Two-Stage Path Following for Mobile Manipulators via Dimensionality-Reduced Graph Search and Numerical Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07003)
*Fuyu Guo,Yuting Mei,Yuyao Zhang,Qian Tang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效的两阶段配置规划框架，通过将8自由度问题分解为2自由度基础优化，结合IRMN和L-BFGS算法，解决了移动机械臂的路径跟随问题，并在仿真和实验中验证了其鲁棒性和高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动机械臂在高效路径跟随方面受到高维配置空间和运动学约束的限制。

Method: 该框架分为两个阶段：第一阶段，利用IRM将任务空间路径离散化为多层图，并使用基于Dijkstra的动态规划算法提取初始可行路径；第二阶段，将可行基础区域转换为凸包，并使用L-BFGS算法进行连续优化，以最大化轨迹平滑度并满足可达性约束。

Result: 仿真结果显示，该方法在仿真中实现了亚毫米级的运动学精度。物理实验验证了该框架的鲁棒性和实际应用性。

Conclusion: 所提出的两阶段配置规划框架能够有效地解决移动机械臂的路径跟随问题，在保证计算效率和全局最优性的同时，实现高精度和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Efficient path following for mobile manipulators is often hindered by high-dimensional configuration spaces and kinematic constraints. This paper presents a robust two-stage configuration planning framework that decouples the 8-DoF planning problem into a tractable 2-DoF base optimization under a yaw-fixed base planning assumption. In the first stage, the proposed approach utilizes IRM to discretize the task-space path into a multi-layer graph, where an initial feasible path is extracted via a Dijkstra-based dynamic programming approach to ensure computational efficiency and global optimality within the discretized graph. In the second stage, to overcome discrete search quantization, feasible base regions are transformed into convex hulls, enabling subsequent continuous refinement via the L-BFGS algorithm to maximize trajectory smoothness while strictly enforcing reachability constraints. Simulation results demonstrate the theoretical precision of the proposed method by achieving sub-millimeter kinematic accuracy in simulation, and physical experiments on an omnidirectional mobile manipulator further validate the framework's robustness and practical applicability.

</details>


### [485] [GuideTWSI: A Diverse Tactile Walking Surface Indicator Dataset from Synthetic and Real-World Images for Blind and Low-Vision Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07060)
*Hochul Hwang,Soowan Yang,Anh N. H. Nguyen,Parth Goel,Krisha Adhikari,Sunghoon I. Lee,Joydeep Biswas,Nicholas A. Giudice,Donghyun Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究指出了当前用于盲人和低视力行人（BLV）的安全设施——触觉行走表面指示器（TWSIs）的标注数据不足和视角偏差问题，特别是现有数据集对圆顶形（truncated domes）指示器的忽视，导致模型泛化能力差，在实际应用中可能造成安全隐患。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: BLV行人依赖TWSIs定位过路处和危险区域，其可靠性和准确性至关重要。现有数据集对TWSIs的覆盖不足，且存在视角和地理区域的偏差（偏向东亚的条形指示器），忽视了在北美和欧洲广泛使用的圆顶形指示器，这影响了模型的泛化能力。

Method: 通过与BLV导盲犬使用者、训练师和一位定向行走（O&M）专家的观察访谈，确认了TWSIs准确分割对BLV导航辅助的重要性。文章指出了现有数据集的局限性，包括缺乏机器人相关的视角（如以自身为中心或俯视视角）以及地理偏差。

Result: 现有模型在仅使用条形指示器数据训练时，难以泛化到基于圆顶形指示器的识别，导致在安全关键环境中可能出现漏检和错误停车。

Conclusion: 需要大规模、视角多样且包含不同类型（如条形和圆顶形）TWSIs的标注数据，以开发能够可靠识别各种TWSIs并提高BLV导航辅助系统性能的模型。

Abstract: Tactile Walking Surface Indicators (TWSIs) are safety-critical landmarks that blind and low-vision (BLV) pedestrians use to locate crossings and hazard zones. From our observation sessions with BLV guide dog handlers, trainers, and an O&M specialist, we confirmed the critical importance of reliable and accurate TWSI segmentation for navigation assistance of BLV individuals. Achieving such reliability requires large-scale annotated data. However, TWSIs are severely underrepresented in existing urban perception datasets, and even existing dedicated paving datasets are limited: they lack robot-relevant viewpoints (e.g., egocentric or top-down) and are geographically biased toward East Asian directional bars - raised parallel strips used for continuous guidance along sidewalks. This narrow focus overlooks truncated domes - rows of round bumps used primarily in North America and Europe as detectable warnings at curbs, crossings, and platform edges. As a result, models trained only on bar-centric data struggle to generalize to dome-based warnings, leading to missed detections and false stops in safety-critical environments.

</details>


### [486] [TacDexGrasp: Compliant and Robust Dexterous Grasping with Tactile Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07040)
*Yubin Ke,Jiayi Chen,Hang Lv,Xiao Zhou,He Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于触觉反馈和二阶锥规划（SOCP）的控制器，用于解决多指灵巧手抓取未知物体时面临的力分配和防止旋转滑移的挑战，无需显式扭矩建模或滑移检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多指灵巧手在抓取未知物体时具有巨大的潜力，但其高维力控制，特别是分配多接触力以抵抗重力以及防止由重力扭矩引起的旋转滑移，是主要挑战。

Method: 作者利用触觉反馈，结合二阶锥规划（SOCP）控制器，主动限制每个接触点的切向力与法向力之比低于估计的摩擦系数。这种方法利用了旋转滑移必然导致部分接触点发生平移滑移的洞察，并将接触力的切法向力比作为早期稳定性的指示器。

Result: 实验表明，所提出的控制器能够有效地对抗平移和旋转滑移，保持抓取的稳定性。在12种不同物体上的真实世界实验验证了该方法的鲁棒性和顺应性。

Conclusion: 通过主动约束接触点的切向力与法向力之比，该方法能够有效地实现多指灵巧手对未知物体的稳定抓取，解决了力分配和防止旋转滑移的关键问题，并且无需复杂的模型或检测器。

Abstract: Multi-fingered hands offer great potential for compliant and robust grasping of unknown objects, yet their high-dimensional force control presents a significant challenge. This work addresses two key problems: (1) distributing forces across multiple contacts to counteract an object's weight, and (2) preventing rotational slip caused by gravitational torque when a grasp is distant from the object's center of mass. We address these challenges via tactile feedback and a Second-Order Cone Programming (SOCP)-based controller, without explicit torque modeling or slip detection. Our key insights are (1) rotational slip inevitably induces translational slip at some contact points for a multi-fingered grasp, and (2) the ratio of tangential to normal force at each contact is an effective early stability indicator. By actively constraining this ratio for each finger below the estimated friction coefficient, our controller maintains grasp stability against both translational and rotational slip. Real-world experiments on 12 diverse objects demonstrate the robustness and compliance of our approach.

</details>


### [487] [ACLM: ADMM-Based Distributed Model Predictive Control for Collaborative Loco-Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07095)
*Ziyi Zhou,Pengyuan Shu,Ruize Cao,Yuntian Zhao,Ye Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于ADMM的分布式模型预测控制框架，用于四足机器人团队的协同 loco-manipulation，实现了可扩展性、实时性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的集中式 loco-manipulation 规划方法计算量大，难以实时应用；而分散式方法又常忽略动力学耦合，导致保守行为。因此需要一种能够平衡实时性和协同性的方法。

Method: 利用ADMM将全局最优控制问题分解为并行的机器人级子问题，并引入共识约束。采用滚动时域优化，通过少量ADMM迭代快速收敛。使用力感知全身控制器执行规划的轨迹，同时跟踪运动和交互力。

Result: 通过最多四台机器人的广泛模拟，证明了该框架在可扩展性、实时性能和对模型不确定性的鲁棒性方面表现优异。

Conclusion: 所提出的ADMM驱动的分布式MPC框架能够有效地解决多机器人协同 loco-manipulation 问题，在复杂环境中实现高效、实时的任务执行。

Abstract: Collaborative transportation of heavy payloads via loco-manipulation is a challenging yet essential capability for legged robots operating in complex, unstructured environments. Centralized planning methods, e.g., holistic trajectory optimization, capture dynamic coupling among robots and payloads but scale poorly with system size, limiting real-time applicability. In contrast, hierarchical and fully decentralized approaches often neglect force and dynamic interactions, leading to conservative behavior. This study proposes an Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM)-based distributed model predictive control framework for collaborative loco-manipulation with a team of quadruped robots with manipulators. By exploiting the payload-induced coupling structure, the global optimal control problem is decomposed into parallel individual-robot-level subproblems with consensus constraints. The distributed planner operates in a receding-horizon fashion and achieves fast convergence, requiring only a few ADMM iterations per planning cycle. A wrench-aware whole-body controller executes the planned trajectories, tracking both motion and interaction wrenches. Extensive simulations with up to four robots demonstrate scalability, real-time performance, and robustness to model uncertainty.

</details>


### [488] [Morphology-Independent Facial Expression Imitation for Human-Face Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07068)
*Xu Chen,Rui Gao,Che Sun,Zhehang Liu,Yuwei Wu,Shuo Yang,Yunde Jia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种与面部形态无关的表情模仿方法，通过解耦表情语义与形态信息，提高了人脸机器人的表情模仿真实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有2D人脸表情模仿方法易受面部形态干扰，导致性能下降，亟需一种能克服形态影响的表情模仿方法。

Method: 构建表情解耦模块，通过自监督学习将表情表示与形态表示解耦；设计表情迁移模块，通过感知表情错误的目标将表情表示映射到机器人执行器指令。

Result: 所提出的方法能够有效消除面部形态的影响，使人脸机器人能够准确地再现各种类人表情。

Conclusion: 该方法实现了与形态无关的表情模仿，显著提升了人脸机器人的表情模仿真实性，为实现更自然的机器人交互奠定了基础。

Abstract: Accurate facial expression imitation on human-face robots is crucial for achieving natural human-robot interaction. Most existing methods have achieved photorealistic expression imitation through mapping 2D facial landmarks to a robot's actuator commands. Their imitation of landmark trajectories is susceptible to interference from facial morphology, which would lead to a performance drop. In this paper, we propose a morphology-independent expression imitation method that decouples expressions from facial morphology to eliminate morphological influence and produce more realistic expressions for human-face robots. Specifically, we construct an expression decoupling module to learn expression semantics by disentangling the expression representation from the morphology representation in a self-supervised manner. We devise an expression transfer module to map the representations to the robot's actuator commands through a learning objective of perceiving expression errors, producing accurate facial expressions based on the learned expression semantics. To support experimental validation, a custom-designed and highly expressive human-face robot, namely Pengrui, is developed to serve as an experimental platform for realistic expression imitation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method enables the human-face robot to reproduce a wide range of human-like expressions effectively. All code and implementation details of the robot will be released.

</details>


### [489] [Tutorial on Aided Inertial Navigation Systems: A Modern Treatment Using Lie-Group Theoretical Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07143)
*Soulaimane Berkane*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该教程提供了基于李群的辅助惯性导航系统（AINS）的控制导向介绍，重点是SE_2(3)群，旨在提供一个清晰、面向实现的几何框架，并明确不变性和对称性的作用，讨论了近期扩展并提供系统理论视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提供一个清晰、面向实现的几何框架，明确不变性和对称性的作用，并为理解和实际使用现代AINS方法提供一个连贯的系统理论视角。

Method: 使用以扩展特殊欧几里得群SE_2(3)为中心的李群方法，开发一个几何框架来融合惯性测量和辅助信息，并讨论了高阶状态表示、同步观测器设计和等变滤波等近期扩展。

Result: 提供了一个关于AINS的控制导向介绍，其核心是一个基于李群的几何框架，并且明确了不变性和对称性的作用，讨论了与该框架相关的最新研究方向。

Conclusion: 该教程为读者提供了一个连贯的系统理论视角，该视角支持对现代辅助惯性导航方法的理解和实际应用。

Abstract: This tutorial presents a control-oriented introduction to aided inertial navigation systems using a Lie-group formulation centered on the extended Special Euclidean group SE_2(3). The focus is on developing a clear and implementation-oriented geometric framework for fusing inertial measurements with aiding information, while making the role of invariance and symmetry explicit. Recent extensions, including higher-order state representations, synchronous observer designs, and equivariant filtering methods, are discussed as natural continuations of the same underlying principles. The goal is to provide readers with a coherent system-theoretic perspective that supports both understanding and practical use of modern aided inertial navigation methods.

</details>


### [490] [Underwater Embodied Intelligence for Autonomous Robots: A Constraint-Coupled Perspective on Planning, Control, and Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07393)
*Jingzehua Xu,Guanwen Xie,Jiwei Tang,Shuai Zhang,Xiaofan Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本综述文章提出了一种“约束耦合”的视角来理解水下自主智能体的规划与控制，认为感知、通信、协调和资源等方面的约束是相互关联的，并提出了克服这些约束的研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管在学习驱动的规划和控制方面取得了快速进展，但真实海洋环境中的可靠自主性仍受物理限制的严格制约。而流体动力学不确定性、部分可观测性、带宽限制的通信和能源稀缺等挑战相互耦合并相互放大，因此需要一种新的视角来理解和解决这些问题。

Method: 文章采用“约束耦合”的视角，综合了强化学习、基于信念的规划、混合控制、多机器人协调和基础模型集成等最新进展。通过分析环境监测、检查、勘探和合作任务等应用场景，展示了跨层耦合的应力特征。最后，引入了跨层故障分类法，并分析了不确定性下误差如何跨自主层级传播。

Result: 文章通过对不同应用场景的分析，揭示了感知、规划、控制、通信和资源等各层级约束之间的耦合关系如何影响水下自主系统的性能。提出了一种跨层故障分类法，能够识别并分析误差在不同自主层级间的传播。

Conclusion: 文章认为，通过内化约束耦合而非将其视为外部干扰，水下自主智能体可以从以性能驱动的适应转向在真实海洋条件下实现弹性、可扩展和可验证的自主性。未来的研究应着重于物理约束下的世界模型、可验证的学习控制、通信感知协调以及面向部署的系统设计。

Abstract: Autonomous underwater robots are increasingly deployed for environmental monitoring, infrastructure inspection, subsea resource exploration, and long-horizon exploration. Yet, despite rapid advances in learning-based planning and control, reliable autonomy in real ocean environments remains fundamentally constrained by tightly coupled physical limits. Hydrodynamic uncertainty, partial observability, bandwidth-limited communication, and energy scarcity are not independent challenges; they interact within the closed perception-planning-control loop and often amplify one another over time. This Review develops a constraint-coupled perspective on underwater embodied intelligence, arguing that planning and control must be understood within tightly coupled sensing, communication, coordination, and resource constraints in real ocean environments. We synthesize recent progress in reinforcement learning, belief-aware planning, hybrid control, multi-robot coordination, and foundation-model integration through this embodied perspective. Across representative application domains, we show how environmental monitoring, inspection, exploration, and cooperative missions expose distinct stress profiles of cross-layer coupling. To unify these observations, we introduce a cross-layer failure taxonomy spanning epistemic, dynamic, and coordination breakdowns, and analyze how errors cascade across autonomy layers under uncertainty. Building on this structure, we outline research directions toward physics-grounded world models, certifiable learning-enabled control, communication-aware coordination, and deployment-aware system design. By internalizing constraint coupling rather than treating it as an external disturbance, underwater embodied intelligence may evolve from performance-driven adaptation toward resilient, scalable, and verifiable autonomy under real ocean conditions.

</details>


### [491] [The Talking Robot: Distortion-Robust Acoustic Models for Robot-Robot Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07072)
*Hanlong Li,Karishma Kamalahasan,Jiahui Li,Kazuhiro Nakadai,Shreyas Kousik*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Artoo是一个为机器人设计的端到端学习声学通信系统，通过共训练的神经网络取代了手工设计的信号处理，能够在资源受限的平台上高效运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人间的声学通信系统依赖于手工设计的信号处理，效率低下且难以适应复杂环境。研究的目的是开发一种更高效、更鲁棒的通信系统。

Method: 提出了一种端到端的声学通信系统Artoo，包括一个轻量级的文本转语音（TTS）发射器和一个基于conformer的自动语音识别（ASR）接收器。系统通过一个可微分的信道进行联合优化，并采用三阶段的共训练课程。

Result: Artoo系统在噪声环境下表现出色，在0 dB SNR时实现了8.3%的词错误率（CER），优于基线。整个系统参数量仅为2.1M（8.4 MB），端到端运行时间低于13 ms，适用于资源受限的机器人平台。

Conclusion: Artoo是一个高效、鲁棒且资源消耗低的机器人声学通信系统，通过端到端学习解决了传统方法面临的挑战，并为机器人间的通信开辟了新的可能性。

Abstract: We present Artoo, a learned acoustic communication system for robots that replaces hand-designed signal processing with end-to-end co-trained neural networks. Our system pairs a lightweight text-to-speech (TTS) transmitter (1.18M parameters) with a conformer-based automatic speech recognition (ASR) receiver (938K parameters), jointly optimized through a differentiable channel. Unlike human speech, robot-to-robot communication is paralinguistics-free: the system need not preserve timbre, prosody, or naturalness, only maximize decoding accuracy under channel distortion. Through a three-phase co-training curriculum, the TTS transmitter learns to produce distortion-robust acoustic encodings that surpass the baseline under noise, achieving 8.3% CER at 0 dB SNR. The entire system requires only 2.1M parameters (8.4 MB) and runs in under 13 ms end-to-end on a CPU, making it suitable for deployment on resource-constrained robotic platforms.

</details>


### [492] [Viewpoint-Agnostic Grasp Pipeline using VLM and Partial Observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07866)
*Dilermando Almeida,Juliano Negri,Guilherme Lazzarini,Thiago H. Segreto,Ranulfo Bezerra,Ricardo V. Godoy,Marcelo Becker*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种端到端的语言引导抓取流水线，用于在杂乱、非结构化环境中实现鲁棒抓取，通过开放词汇目标选择和安全抓取执行，显著提高了对遮挡和部分观测的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在杂乱、非结构化环境中，移动机器人进行鲁棒抓取面临挑战，原因包括遮挡导致的部分观测、不可靠的深度估计以及对无碰撞、执行可行方法的需要。

Method: 该系统接收自然语言指令，通过开放词汇检测和可提示实例分割在 RGB 中进行目标定位，从 RGB-D 中提取以物体为中心的点云，并通过反投影深度补偿和两阶段点云补全来提高几何可靠性。然后生成并进行碰撞过滤 6-DoF 抓取候选，并使用考虑可达性、接近可行性和净空的面向安全性的启发式方法来选择可执行的抓取。

Result: 在杂乱的桌面场景下，该方法取得了 90% 的总体成功率，而基线方法仅为 30%。

Conclusion: 所提出的方法在应对杂乱环境中的遮挡和部分观测方面表现出显著的鲁棒性提升。

Abstract: Robust grasping in cluttered, unstructured environments remains challenging for mobile legged manipulators due to occlusions that lead to partial observations, unreliable depth estimates, and the need for collision-free, execution-feasible approaches. In this paper we present an end-to-end pipeline for language-guided grasping that bridges open-vocabulary target selection to safe grasp execution on a real robot. Given a natural-language command, the system grounds the target in RGB using open-vocabulary detection and promptable instance segmentation, extracts an object-centric point cloud from RGB-D, and improves geometric reliability under occlusion via back-projected depth compensation and two-stage point cloud completion. We then generate and collision-filter 6-DoF grasp candidates and select an executable grasp using safety-oriented heuristics that account for reachability, approach feasibility, and clearance. We evaluate the method on a quadruped robot with an arm in two cluttered tabletop scenarios, using paired trials against a view-dependent baseline. The proposed approach achieves a 90% overall success rate (9/10) against 30% (3/10) for the baseline, demonstrating substantially improved robustness to occlusions and partial observations in clutter.

</details>


### [493] [Towards Scalable Probabilistic Human Motion Prediction with Gaussian Processes for Safe Human-Robot Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07096)
*Jinger Chong,Xiaotong Zhang,Kamal Youcef-Toumi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种结构化的多任务变分高斯过程（GP）框架，用于全身运动预测，该框架具有可扩展性、运动学一致性以及良好的不确定性校准。该模型在H3.6M数据集上表现出色，在KDE NLL和CRPS方面优于现有方法，同时参数量少且推理速度适中，适合实时应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人机协作（HRC）中，需要对人类运动进行准确预测并提供可靠的不确定性估计，以确保安全。现有方法在预测精度和不确定性校准方面仍有待提高，并且在处理高维运动数据时存在可扩展性问题。

Method: 提出了一种结构化的多任务变分高斯过程（GP）框架。该框架利用了：1. 全身运动预测；2. 时间相关性捕获；3. 联合维度级因子分解以实现可扩展性；4. 连续6D旋转表示以保持运动学一致性。

Result: 在H3.6M数据集上，该模型实现了比现有方法低50%的KDE NLL，0.021m的平均CRPS，确定性MAE比竞争性深度学习方法高3-18%。模型具有良好的置信区间覆盖率，即使在较长预测时间跨度下校准漂移也较小。模型参数量少（0.24-0.35M），推理时间适中。

Conclusion: 提出的GP模型在预测精度和不确定性估计方面都具有竞争力，并且模型具有可扩展性和实时部署的潜力，可用于下游机器人任务，如运动规划和避碰。

Abstract: Accurate human motion prediction with well-calibrated uncertainty is critical for safe human-robot collaboration (HRC), where robots must anticipate and react to human movements in real time. We propose a structured multitask variational Gaussian Process (GP) framework for full-body human motion prediction that captures temporal correlations and leverages joint-dimension-level factorization for scalability, while using a continuous 6D rotation representation to preserve kinematic consistency. Evaluated on Human3.6M (H3.6M), our model achieves up to 50 lower kernel density estimate negative log-likelihood (KDE NLL) than strong baselines, a mean continuous ranked probability score (CRPS) of 0.021 m, and deterministic mean angle error (MAE) that is 3-18% higher than competitive deep learning methods. Empirical coverage analysis shows that the fraction of ground-truth outcomes contained within predicted confidence intervals gradually decreases with horizon, remaining conservative for lower-confidence intervals and near-nominal for higher-confidence intervals, with only modest calibration drift at longer horizons. Despite its probabilistic formulation, our model requires only 0.24-0.35 M parameters, roughly eight times fewer than comparable approaches, and exhibits modest inference times, indicating suitability for real-time deployment. Extensive ablation studies further validated the choice of 6D rotation representation and Matern 3/2 + Linear kernel, and guided the selection of the number of inducing points and latent dimensionality. These results demonstrate that scalable GP-based models can deliver competitive accuracy together with reliable and interpretable uncertainty estimates for downstream robotics tasks such as motion planning and collision avoidance.

</details>


### [494] [Aero-Promptness: Drag-Aware Aerodynamic Manipulability for Propeller-driven Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07998)
*Antonio Franchi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为“阻力感知气动可操作性”（DAAM）的几何框架，用于冗余多旋翼的控制分配，该框架通过考虑电机扭矩限制和气动阻力，显式地对阻力导致的饱和和推力损失进行惩罚，并提出了一种新的冗余度解析策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有控制分配方法在处理多旋翼中的电机扭矩限制和气动阻力时存在不足，尤其是在冗余情况下，这可能导致饱和和推力损失。因此，需要一种新的框架来更有效地管理这些因素。

Method: 提出了一种基于剩余对称加速度能力的黎曼度量，将该度量映射到广义力空间，得到一个与状态相关的可操作性体积。通过优化该体积，结合以其对数行列式为屏障函数的策略，来解决冗余度问题。

Result: DAAM框架能够有效惩罚阻力引起的饱和和低转速推力损失。证明了最优分配会在局部形成光滑嵌入流形，并刻画了由于执行器限制和转速符号变化产生的全局跳跃不连续性。

Conclusion: DAAM框架为冗余多旋翼的控制分配提供了一种新的几何方法，能够显式处理电机限制和气动阻力，并实现一种更鲁棒和高效的冗余度解析策略。

Abstract: This work introduces the Drag-Aware Aerodynamic Manipulability (DAAM), a geometric framework for control allocation in redundant multirotors. By equipping the propeller spin-rate space with a Riemannian metric based on the remaining symmetric acceleration capacity of each motor, the formulation explicitly accounts for motor torque limits and aerodynamic drag. Mapping this metric through the nonlinear thrust law to the generalized force space yields a state-dependent manipulability volume. The log-determinant of this volume acts as a natural barrier function, strictly penalizing drag-induced saturation and low-spin thrust loss. Optimizing this volume along the allocation fibers provides a redundancy resolution strategy inherently invariant to arbitrary coordinate scaling in the generalized-force space. Analytically, we prove that the resulting optimal allocations locally form smooth embedded manifolds, and we geometrically characterize the global jump discontinuities that inevitably arise from physical actuator limits and spin-rate sign transitions.

</details>


### [495] [Learning From Failures: Efficient Reinforcement Learning Control with Episodic Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07110)
*Chenyang Miao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为FEMA（Failure Episodic Memory Alert）的技术，用于解决强化学习在机器人学习中早期训练遇到的频繁终止问题，通过存储和利用失败经验来指导策略学习，提高了样本效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器人学习的强化学习训练中，早期阶段容易因为碰撞和跌倒等原因导致训练过早终止，产生短视、低回报的轨迹，阻碍了收敛和长时域探索。

Method: 提出了FEMA技术，通过一个经验记忆模块显式存储短时域的失败经验。在训练过程中，FEMA检索相似的失败经验，阻止机器人重复陷入不稳定状态，引导策略学习长时域、高回报的轨迹。

Result: FEMA可以轻松与无模型强化学习算法结合，在MuJoCo任务上使几种经典RL算法的样本效率提高了33.11%。将FEMA集成到并行PPO训练管道中，并在真实双足机器人任务上验证了其有效性。

Conclusion: FEMA是一种有效的方法，通过利用失败经验来提高机器人强化学习的样本效率和学习稳定性，尤其在处理挑战性的探索和接触丰富的动力学问题时效果显著。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning has achieved remarkable success in robot learning. However, under challenging exploration and contact-rich dynamics, early-stage training is frequently dominated by premature terminations such as collisions and falls. As a result, learning is overwhelmed by short-horizon, low-return trajectories, which hinder convergence and limit long-horizon exploration. To alleviate this issue, we propose a technique called Failure Episodic Memory Alert (FEMA). FEMA explicitly stores short-horizon failure experiences through an episodic memory module. During interactions, it retrieves similar failure experiences and prevents the robot from recurrently relapsing into unstable states, guiding the policy toward long-horizon trajectories with greater long-term value. FEMA can be combined easily with model-free reinforcement learning algorithms, and yields a substantial sample-efficiency improvement of 33.11% on MuJoCo tasks across several classical RL algorithms. Furthermore, integrating FEMA into a parallelized PPO training pipeline demonstrates its effectiveness on a real-world bipedal robot task.

</details>


### [496] [Adaptive Entropy-Driven Sensor Selection in a Camera-LiDAR Particle Filter for Single-Vessel Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08457)
*Andrei Starodubov,Yaqub Aris Prabowo,Andreas Hadjipieris,Ioannis Kyriakides,Roberto Galeazzi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种融合激光雷达和摄像头的多传感器融合粒子滤波器，并结合信息增益自适应传感策略，用于在固定沿海平台上的鲁棒单船只跟踪。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固定沿海平台上的单船只跟踪受限于相机（光照、视觉混乱）和激光雷达（距离、间歇性回波）的模态特定退化。

Method: 采用异构多传感器融合粒子滤波器，并引入信息增益（熵减少）自适应传感策略，在每个融合时间段选择最具信息量的传感器配置。在实际海上部署中进行了验证。

Result: 结果表明，激光雷达在近距离精度上占主导地位，当激光雷达不可用时，摄像头可以维持更长距离的覆盖。自适应策略通过基于信息增益切换模态，实现了精度-连续性的有利权衡。

Conclusion: 提出的自适应传感器配置避免了连续多流处理，为弹性且资源感知的海上监视提供了一个实用的基线。

Abstract: Robust single-vessel tracking from fixed coastal platforms is hindered by modality-specific degradations: cameras suffer from illumination and visual clutter, while LiDAR performance drops with range and intermittent returns. We present a heterogeneous multi-sensor fusion particle-filter tracker that incorporates an information-gain (entropy-reduction) adaptive sensing policy to select the most informative configuration at each fusion time bin. The approach is validated in a real maritime deployment at the CMMI Smart Marina Testbed (Ayia Napa Marina, Cyprus), using a shore-mounted 3D LiDAR and an elevated fixed camera to track a rigid inflatable boat with onboard GNSS ground truth. We compare LiDAR-only, camera-only, all-sensors, and adaptive configurations. Results show LiDAR dominates near-field accuracy, the camera sustains longer-range coverage when LiDAR becomes unavailable, and the adaptive policy achieves a favorable accuracy-continuity trade-off by switching modalities based on information gain. By avoiding continuous multi-stream processing, the adaptive configuration provides a practical baseline for resilient and resource-aware maritime surveillance.

</details>


### [497] [Efficient Trajectory Optimization for Autonomous Racing via Formula-1 Data-Driven Initialization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07126)
*Samir Shehadeh,Lukas Kutsch,Nils Dengler,Sicong Pan,Maren Bennewitz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于真实 F1 遥测数据训练的神经网络，用于预测赛车线偏移量，作为轨迹优化的初始化先验，以提高收敛速度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的轨迹优化方法对初始化敏感，容易收敛到局部最优解或收敛缓慢。利用专家驾驶行为作为初始化先验，可以解决这一限制。

Method: 首先，构建了一个包含 17 个赛道的 F1 赛车线数据集，并将噪声 GPS 遥测数据与标准化参考线对齐。然后，训练一个神经网络，该网络直接从局部赛道几何形状预测赛车线偏移量。最后，将预测的赛车线作为最小时间最优控制求解器的初始化。

Result: 与传统的基于几何的初始化方法相比，所提出的学习型初始化策略显著加快了求解器的收敛速度，并减少了运行时，同时保持了最终优化的单圈时间。

Conclusion: 基于专家驾驶行为的学习型初始化策略是一种有效的方法，可以提高赛车轨迹优化的效率和性能。

Abstract: Trajectory optimization is a central component of fast and efficient autonomous racing. However practical optimization pipelines remain highly sensitive to initialization and may converge slowly or to suboptimal local solutions when seeded with heuristic trajectories such as the centerline or minimum-curvature paths. To address this limitation, we leverage expert driving behavior as a initialization prior and propose a learning-informed initialization strategy based on real-world Formula 1 telemetry. To this end, we first construct a multi-track Formula~1 trajectory dataset by reconstructing and aligning noisy GPS telemetry to a standardized reference-line representation across 17 tracks. Building on this, we present a neural network that predicts an expert-like raceline offset directly from local track geometry, without explicitly modeling vehicle dynamics or forces. The predicted raceline is then used as an informed seed for a minimum-time optimal control solver. Experiments on all 17 tracks demonstrate that the learned initialization accelerates solver convergence and significantly reduces runtime compared to traditional geometric baselines, while preserving the final optimized lap time.

</details>


### [498] [VLN-Cache: Enabling Token Caching for VLN Models with Visual/Semantic Dynamics Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07080)
*Zihao Zheng,Zhihao Mao,Xingyue Zhou,Jiayu Chen,Maoliang Li,Xinhao Sun,Hailong Zou,Zhaobo Zhang,Xuanzhe Liu,Donggang Cao,Hong Mei,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为VLN-Cache的视觉-语言导航（VLN）推理加速框架，通过引入视图对齐重映射和任务相关性显著性过滤，解决了现有Token缓存方法在处理动态视角和语义变化时的局限性，并在R2R-CE模拟基准测试中实现了显著的加速，同时保持了导航成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大型视觉-语言模型在VLN任务中推理成本高，难以实时部署。Token缓存是一种有前景的策略，但现有方法未能解决VLN任务中固有的视觉动态（视角变化）和语义动态（任务阶段变化）问题。

Method: 提出VLN-Cache框架，包含：1) 视图对齐重映射（view-aligned remapping）用于恢复因视角变化而错位的Token的几何对应关系；2) 任务相关性显著性过滤（task-relevance saliency filter）用于在语义发生转变时阻止缓存状态的复用；3) 层自适应熵策略（layer-adaptive entropy policy）用于平衡每层的复用预算。

Result: 在R2R-CE模拟基准测试上，VLN-Cache实现了高达1.52倍的速度提升，同时保持了具有竞争力的导航成功率。

Conclusion: VLN-Cache是一个能够有效解决VLN任务中视觉和语义动态问题的Token缓存框架，显著提升了推理效率，并有望应用于实际的VLN部署。

Abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) increasingly relies on large vision-language models, but their inference cost conflicts with real-time deployment. Token caching is a promising training-free strategy that avoids redundant computation by reusing stable visual tokens across frames. However, existing methods assume a static camera and fixed semantic focus, assumptions that VLN fundamentally violates. We identify two failure modes: (1) visual dynamics, where viewpoint shift displaces token positions across frames, causing position-wise matching to pair misaligned content; (2) semantic dynamics, where token relevance shifts across task stages as navigation progresses, making cached states stale. We propose VLN-Cache, a visual-dynamic-aware and semantic-dynamic-aware caching framework that introduces view-aligned remapping to recover geometric correspondences and a task-relevance saliency filter to veto reuse at semantic transitions. A layer-adaptive entropy policy further balances the per-layer reuse budget. Experiments on the R2R-CE simulation benchmark show up to 1.52x speedup while maintaining competitive navigation success rates.

</details>


### [499] [DexKnot: Generalizable Visuomotor Policy Learning for Dexterous Bag-Knotting Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07136)
*Jiayuan Zhang,Ruihai Wu,Haojun Chen,Yuran Wang,Yifan Zhong,Ceyao Zhang,Yaodong Yang,Yuanpei Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为DexKnot的框架，结合关键点和扩散策略，实现了机器人抓取和打结塑料袋的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人抓取和打结塑料袋因其高自由度和复杂的物理动力学而具有挑战性，现有方法在处理未见过或变形的袋子时泛化能力不足。

Method: DexKnot框架通过真实世界的手动变形数据学习形状无关的袋子关键点表示。利用此表示匹配未见过袋子的关键点，并将这些关键点输入扩散 Transformer 模型，该模型基于少量人类演示生成机器人动作。

Result: DexKnot通过将观测空间降维至稀疏的关键点集，实现了有效的策略泛化。实验证明，该方法在各种未见过和变形的袋子上均表现出可靠且一致的打结性能。

Conclusion: DexKnot框架通过关键点表示和扩散策略的结合，成功克服了机器人打结塑料袋的泛化性挑战，能够处理未见过和变形的袋子实例。

Abstract: Knotting plastic bags is a common task in daily life, yet it is challenging for robots due to the bags' infinite degrees of freedom and complex physical dynamics. Existing methods often struggle in generalization to unseen bag instances or deformations. To address this, we present DexKnot, a framework that combines keypoint affordance with diffusion policy to learn a generalizable bag-knotting policy. Our approach learns a shape-agnostic representation of bags from keypoint correspondence data collected through real-world manual deformation. For an unseen bag configuration, the keypoints can be identified by matching the representation to a reference. These keypoints are then provided to a diffusion transformer, which generates robot action based on a small number of human demonstrations. DexKnot enables effective policy generalization by reducing the dimensionality of observation space into a sparse set of keypoints. Experiments show that DexKnot achieves reliable and consistent knotting performance across a variety of previously unseen instances and deformations.

</details>


### [500] [Model-based thermal drift compensation for high-precision hexapod robot actuators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07141)
*Clément Robert,Alain Vissiere,Olivier Company,Pierre Noire,Thierry Roux,Sébastien Krut*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通过对执行器表面关键点的温度进行建模来预测和补偿六足机器人热膨胀误差的方法，实验结果表明该方法可将热膨胀误差减少 80% 以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 六足机器人（Gough-Stewart 平台）的定位精度受到热膨胀的显著影响，这是由于温度变化导致零件膨胀，从而改变了其运动学模型，降低了机器人的精度和可重复性。

Method: 首先从理论上推导了一个模型，该模型将执行器任意时刻的膨胀状态与其表面选定点的温度联系起来。然后，在专门的测试平台上，利用高精度干涉测量系统进行了严谨的测量，并对模型的系数进行了实验调整。

Result: 实验验证表明，该方法可以将由热引起的执行器膨胀减少 80% 以上。

Conclusion: 该方法为整个六足机器人或其他类似机器人部件的热漂移校正提供了可行性，显著提高了机器人的精度和可重复性。

Abstract: Thermal expansion is a significant source of positioning error in high-precision hexapod robots (Gough-Stewart platforms). Any variation in the temperature of the hexapod's parts induces expansion, which alters their kinematic model and reduces the robot's accuracy and repeatability. These variations may arise from internal heat sources (such as motors, encoders, and electronics) or from environmental changes. In this study, a method is proposed to anticipate and therefore correct the thermal drift of one of the hexapod precision electro-mechanical actuators. This method is based on determining a model that links the expansion state of the actuator at any given moment to the temperature of some well-chosen points on its surface. This model was initially developed theoretically. Its coefficients were then adjusted experimentally on a specific test-bench, based on a rigorous measurement campaign of actuator expansion using a high-precision interferometric measurement system. Experimental validation demonstrates a reduction of thermally induced expansion by more than 80%. This paves the way for thermal drift correction across the entire robot or similar robotics parts.

</details>


### [501] [RoTri-Diff: A Spatial Robot-Object Triadic Interaction-Guided Diffusion Model for Bimanual Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07165)
*Zixuan Chen,Nga Teng Chan,Yiwen Hou,Chenrui Tie,Zixuan Liu,Haonan Chen,Junting Chen,Jieqi Shi,Yang Gao,Jing Huo,Lin Shao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为 RoTri-Diff 的模仿学习框架，通过显式建模机器人-物体三元交互（RoTri）来解决双臂操作中的协调性和碰撞问题，并在实验中取得了显著的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的双臂操作模仿学习方法忽略了双臂与物体之间的动态几何关系，导致了碰撞、抓握不稳定和性能下降等问题。

Method: 引入了机器人-物体三元交互（RoTri）表示，编码了双臂与物体之间的相对 6D 位姿，以捕捉它们的三元空间关系并建立几何约束。在此基础上，提出了 RoTri-Diff，一个基于扩散的模仿学习框架，结合 RoTri 约束、机器人关键姿态和物体运动，生成稳定协调的双臂操作轨迹。

Result: 在 RLBench2 的 11 个任务上，RoTri-Diff 的性能比现有最先进的方法提高了 10.2%，并在 4 个具有挑战性的真实世界双臂操作任务上实现了稳定的性能。

Conclusion: RoTri-Diff 通过显式建模三元几何关系，有效克服了现有模仿学习方法的局限性，能够生成稳定、协调的双臂操作轨迹，并泛化到不同的操作模式和真实世界任务。

Abstract: Bimanual manipulation is a fundamental robotic skill that requires continuous and precise coordination between two arms. While imitation learning (IL) is the dominant paradigm for acquiring this capability, existing approaches, whether robot-centric or object-centric, often overlook the dynamic geometric relationship among the two arms and the manipulated object. This limitation frequently leads to inter-arm collisions, unstable grasps, and degraded performance in complex tasks. To address this, in this paper we explicitly models the Robot-Object Triadic Interaction (RoTri) representation in bimanual systems, by encoding the relative 6D poses between the two arms and the object to capture their spatial triadic relationship and establish continuous triangular geometric constraints. Building on this, we further introduce RoTri-Diff, a diffusion-based imitation learning framework that combines RoTri constraints with robot keyposes and object motion in a hierarchical diffusion process. This enables the generation of stable, coordinated trajectories and robust execution across different modes of bimanual manipulation. Extensive experiments show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 10.2% on 11 representative RLBench2 tasks and achieves stable performance on 4 challenging real-world bimanual tasks. Project website: https://rotri-diff.github.io/.

</details>


### [502] [Vision-Guided MPPI for Agile Drone Racing: Navigating Arbitrary Gate Poses via Neural Signed Distance Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07199)
*Fangguo Zhao,Hanbing Zhang,Zhouheng Li,Xin Guan,Shuo Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种无需预设轨迹或精确门姿态估计，仅依赖视觉信息和模型预测最优控制的无人机竞速新框架，通过学习门的隐式符号距离场（Gate-SDF）实现高速、灵活、鲁棒的自主飞行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无人机竞速方法在应对空间扰动、赛道变化或传感器噪声时鲁棒性不足，而端到端学习方法泛化能力有限，因此需要一种更灵活、鲁棒且无需预先知识的自主飞行方案。

Method: 提出Gate-SDF，一种隐式学习的神经符号距离场，直接处理原始深度图像，提供避障和几何引导。将其集成到基于采样的模型预测路径积分（MPPI）控制器中，利用GPU并行处理，实现实时、连续的空间约束评估和轨迹规划。

Result: 该框架实现了高速、敏捷的飞行，并在存在严重未建模的门位移和姿态扰动的情况下，成功导航了未曾见过的赛道。在模拟和真实世界实验中均取得了优异表现。

Conclusion: 所提出的全板载、视觉引导的最优控制框架，通过Gate-SDF实现了参考自由的敏捷飞行，克服了现有方法的局限性，并证明了其在复杂和动态环境下的鲁棒性和高效性。

Abstract: Autonomous drone racing requires the tight coupling of perception, planning, and control under extreme agility. However, recent approaches typically rely on precomputed spatial reference trajectories or explicit 6-DoF gate pose estimation, rendering them brittle to spatial perturbations, unmodeled track changes, and sensor noise. Conversely, end-to-end learning policies frequently overfit to specific track layouts and struggle with zero-shot generalization. To address these fundamental limitations, we propose a fully onboard, vision guided optimal control framework that enables reference-free agile flight through arbitrarily placed and oriented gates. Central to our approach is Gate-SDF, a novel, implicitly learned neural signed distance field. Gate-SDF directly processes raw, noisy depth images to predict a continuous spatial field that provides both collision repulsion and active geometric guidance toward the valid traversal area. We seamlessly integrate this representation into a sampling-based Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) controller. By fully exploiting GPU parallelism, the framework evaluates these continuous spatial constraints across thousands of simulated trajectory rollouts simultaneously in real time. Furthermore, our formulation inherently maintains spatial consistency, ensuring robust navigation even under severe visual occlusion during aggressive maneuvers. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that the proposed system achieves high-speed agile flight and successfully navigates unseen tracks subject to severe unmodeled gate displacements and orientation perturbations. Videos are available at https://zhaofangguo.github.io/vision_guided_mppi/

</details>


### [503] [Kinematics-Aware Latent World Models for Data-Efficient Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07264)
*Jiazhuo Li,Linjiang Cao,Qi Liu,Xi Xiong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种用于自动驾驶的运动学感知隐式世界模型框架，通过将车辆运动学信息融入观察编码器并利用几何感知监督来正则化隐式状态，从而提高长期预测的保真度和策略优化的稳定性，并在模拟环境中取得了优于现有方法的样本效率和驾驶性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在自动驾驶领域，由于大规模真实世界交互的高成本和安全风险，数据高效学习仍然是一个核心挑战。现有的基于世界模型的强化学习方法虽然可以通过隐式想象进行策略优化，但通常缺乏编码驾驶任务所必需的空间和运动学结构的机制。

Method: 研究工作基于循环状态空间模型（RSSM），提出了一种运动学感知的隐式世界模型框架。将车辆运动学信息集成到观察编码器中，以使隐式转换基于物理上可行的运动动力学；同时，使用几何感知监督来规范RSSM的隐式状态，使其捕捉像素重建之外的任务相关空间结构。

Result: 提出的结构化隐式动力学模型提高了长期想象的保真度并稳定了策略优化。在驾驶模拟基准测试中，与模型无关和基于像素的世界模型基线相比，在样本效率和驾驶性能方面均实现了持续的提升。消融研究进一步证实，所提出的设计增强了隐式空间中的空间表示质量。

Conclusion: 将运动学信息集成到基于RSSM的世界模型中，为自动驾驶策略学习提供了一种可扩展且物理上可置信的范式，能够显著提高数据效率和任务性能。

Abstract: Data-efficient learning remains a central challenge in autonomous driving due to the high cost and safety risks of large-scale real-world interaction. Although world-model-based reinforcement learning enables policy optimization through latent imagination, existing approaches often lack explicit mechanisms to encode spatial and kinematic structure essential for driving tasks. In this work, we build upon the Recurrent State-Space Model (RSSM) and propose a kinematics-aware latent world model framework for autonomous driving. Vehicle kinematic information is incorporated into the observation encoder to ground latent transitions in physically meaningful motion dynamics, while geometry-aware supervision regularizes the RSSM latent state to capture task-relevant spatial structure beyond pixel reconstruction. The resulting structured latent dynamics improve long-horizon imagination fidelity and stabilize policy optimization. Experiments in a driving simulation benchmark demonstrate consistent gains over both model-free and pixel-based world-model baselines in terms of sample efficiency and driving performance. Ablation studies further verify that the proposed design enhances spatial representation quality within the latent space. These results suggest that integrating kinematic grounding into RSSM-based world models provides a scalable and physically grounded paradigm for autonomous driving policy learning.

</details>


### [504] [Soft Rigid Hybrid Gripper with Inflatable Silicone Pockets for Tunable Frictional Grasping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07308)
*Hoang Hiep Ly,Cong-Nhat Nguyen,Doan-Quang Tran,Quoc-Khanh Dang,Ngoc Duy Tran,Thi Thoa Mac,Anh Nguyen,Xuan-Thuan Nguyen,Tung D. Ta*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究提出了一种软硬混合的机器人手指，通过调节内部气压来改变表面摩擦力，从而在不增加抓取力的情况下稳定抓取各种物体，包括重物、易滑物和易碎物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的刚性夹爪在抓取具有不同机械特性（如重、滑、易碎）的物体时面临挑战，强制增加正压力可能损坏易碎物体。因此，需要一种能够安全抓取多种物体的解决方案。

Method: 设计并实现了一种软硬混合的机器人手指，其结合了刚性外壳和可充气的硅胶口袋。通过改变硅胶口袋内的气压来主动调节夹爪表面的摩擦系数，从而实现抓取。

Result: 实验证明，增加内部气压可以按比例增加有效摩擦系数。该混合夹爪能够稳定地抓取重物、易滑物体（如鸡蛋、豆腐、水果）以及易碎、可变形物体（如纸杯），且损伤最小。

Conclusion: 软硬混合夹爪通过摩擦力而非蛮力抓取，能够有效解决机器人抓取多样化物体时的难题，尤其在处理易碎和易滑物体方面表现出色，同时降低了对物体的损伤。

Abstract: Grasping objects with diverse mechanical properties, such as heavy, slippery, or fragile items, remains a significant challenge in robotics. Conventional rigid grippers typically rely on increasing the normal forces to secure an object, however, this can cause damage to fragile objects due to excessive force. To address this limitation, we propose a soft rigid hybrid gripper finger that combines rigid structural shells with soft, inflatable silicone pockets, which could be integrated into a conventional gripper. The hybrid gripper can actively modulate its surface friction by varying the internal air pressure of the silicone pockets, enabling the gripper to securely grasp objects without increasing the gripping force. This is demonstrated by fundamental experimental results, in which an increase in internal pressure leads to a proportional increase in the effective coefficient of friction. The gripping experiments also show that the integrated gripper can stably lift heavy and slippery objects or fragile, deformable objects, such as eggs, tofu, fruits, and paper cups, with minimal damage by increasing friction rather than applying high force.

</details>


### [505] [Perceptive Variable-Timing Footstep Planning for Humanoid Locomotion on Disconnected Footholds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07400)
*Zhaoyang Xiang,Upama Pant,Ayonga Hereid*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于感知和混合整数模型预测控制的框架，用于在有障碍物和不安全区域的复杂地形上规划机器人的足部落点和步态时长，实现了地形适应性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中的行走场景常包含障碍物和不安全区域（如湿滑或杂乱区域），导致可达落点分散，形成类似“踏脚石”的区域。现有的方法难以应对这种不规则地形，需要更鲁棒的规划方法。

Method: 作者提出了一种车载的、基于感知的混合整数模型预测控制（MIQP）框架，该框架联合规划足部落点和步态时长，利用运动的发散分量（DCM）动力学。具体方法包括：1. 将深度图像融合到概率局部高度图；2. 从高度图中提取可落足的凸区域集合；3. 使用二元变量在MIQP中强制执行区域成员约束；4. 通过引入DCM空间的捕获性边界（一步横向条件和无穷步内侧边界）来保证优化可行性和安全性；5. 通过反向传播瞬时DCM来更新初始DCM，实现步内重规划以提高鲁棒性。

Result: 在模拟环境中（包括带外部推搡的随机踏脚石地形），该方法能够生成地形感知、动力学一致的落足序列，并实现自适应的时长规划。优化求解时间达到毫秒级。

Conclusion: 所提出的MIQP框架能够有效地在复杂、不规则地形上实现机器人行走的足部落点和步态时长联合规划，具有良好的地形适应性和对扰动的鲁棒性，且计算效率高。
