Next, mathematical analysis shows: 1) conditions under which cost minimization and reward maximization are equivalent, 2) conditions for equivalence of single-shot goal termination and infinite-horizon episodic learning, and 3) conditions under which discounting causes goal achievement to fail. The paper then advocates for defining and optimizing truecost, rather than inserting arbitrary parameters to guide operations. Performance studies are then extended to the stochastic case, using planning-oriented criteria and comparing value iteration to RL with learning rates and greediness factors.

</details>


### [541] [Choose What to Observe: Task-Aware Semantic-Geometric Representations for Visuomotor Policy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07875)
*Haoran Ding,Liang Ma,Yaxun Yang,Wen Yang,Tianyu Liu,Anqing Duan,Xiaodan Liang,Dezhen Song,Ivan Laptev,Yoshihiko Nakamura*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究提出了一种任务感知的观察接口，通过将原始RGB图像转换为统一的语义-几何表示，来提高模仿学习策略对外观变化的鲁棒性，而无需修改策略本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从演示中学习到的视觉运动策略常常会过拟合于原始RGB观测中的非关键视觉因素，导致在背景变化、物体颜色改变等外观变化下表现脆弱。

Method: 使用SAM3分割目标物体和机器人/夹爪，然后将分割出的实体用预定义的语义颜色重绘在恒定背景上，形成L0观测。对于需要几何线索的任务，通过Depth Anything 3注入单目深度信息，生成统一的语义-几何观测（L1）。

Result: 在RoboMimic、ManiSkill YCB、RLBench和实际的Franka机器人任务中，所提出的接口在保持分布内性能的同时，显著提高了策略在分布外视觉变化下的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 任务感知的观察接口能够有效地将视觉输入规范化为共享表示，从而提升模仿学习策略在面对外观变化时的鲁棒性，同时保持标准图像输入格式。

Abstract: Visuomotor policies learned from demonstrations often overfit to nuisance visual factors in raw RGB observations, resulting in brittle behavior under appearance shifts such as background changes and object recoloring. We propose a task-aware observation interface that canonicalizes visual input into a shared representation, improving robustness to out-of-distribution (OOD) appearance changes without modifying or fine-tuning the policy. Given an RGB image and an open-vocabulary specification of task-relevant entities, we use SAM3 to segment the target object and robot/gripper. We construct an L0 observation by repainting segmented entities with predefined semantic colors on a constant background. For tasks requiring stronger geometric cues, we further inject monocular depth from Depth Anything 3 into the segmented regions via depth-guided overwrite, yielding a unified semantic--geometric observation (L1) that remains a standard 3-channel, image-like input. We evaluate on RoboMimic (Lift), ManiSkill YCB grasping under clutter, four RLBench tasks under controlled appearance shifts, and two real-world Franka tasks (ReachX and CloseCabinet). Across benchmarks and policy backbones (Flow Matching Policy and SmolVLA), our interface preserves in-distribution performance while substantially improving robustness under OOD visual shifts.

</details>


### [542] [Identifying Influential Actions in Human-Robot Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07885)
*Haoyang Jiang,Chenfei Xu,Yuya Okadome,Yukata Nakamura*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种使用迁移熵（Transfer Entropy, TE）识别机器人关键动作的方法，该方法应用于分析机器人临近行为对人类对话行为的影响，以期改进机器人系统的设计和适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了更好地理解和优化人机协作系统，研究者需要识别出能够显著影响人类行为的机器人动作。现有的方法可能无法有效地捕捉人机交互中复杂、非线性的动态关系。

Method: 研究者采用了迁移熵（Transfer Entropy, TE）作为一种衡量时间序列之间定向信息传递的统计量，来识别有影响力的机器人动作。该方法被应用于分析一个远程控制的机器人化身在对话场景中，机器人动作（特别是临近行为）如何影响人类的反应。

Result: 通过应用迁移熵分析，研究表明该方法能够成功识别出对人类反应产生关键影响的机器人动作。具体而言，机器人临近行为被证明是影响人类行为的重要因素。

Conclusion: 迁移熵是一种有效的工具，能够识别复杂的、非线性的交互，并在此研究中成功地识别了对人类行为有影响的机器人关键动作。这项工作为设计和开发更具适应性的机器人系统提供了有价值的见解。

Abstract: Human-robot interaction combines robotics, cognitive science, and human factors to study collaborative systems. This paper introduces a method for identifying influential robot actions using transfer entropy, a statistic that measures directed information transfer between time series. TE is effective for capturing complex, nonlinear interactions. We apply this method to analyze how robot actions affect human behavior during a conversation with a remotely controlled robot avatar. By focusing on the impact of proximity, our approach demonstrates TE's capability to identify key actions influencing human responses, highlighting its potential to improve the design and adaptability of robotic systems.

</details>


### [543] [RoboRouter: Training-Free Policy Routing for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07892)
*Yiteng Chen,Zhe Cao,Hongjia Ren,Chenjie Yang,Wenbo Li,Shiyi Wang,Yemin Wang,Li Zhang,Yanming Shao,Zhenjun Zhao,Huiping Zhuang,Qingyao Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR:  RoboRouter 是一个无需训练的框架，通过智能路由选择最适合执行新任务的现有机器人策略（如 VLA、VA、代码组合），提高了泛化能力和成功率，并且易于集成新策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的机器人策略（如 VLA、VA、代码组合）在特定任务上表现良好，但泛化能力有限。研究者希望通过结合不同策略的优点来提高机器人系统的整体能力。

Method: RoboRouter 维护一个包含多种异构策略的池。对于新任务，它会构建任务的语义表示，检索相似任务的历史记录，并预测最优策略，无需试错。它还利用结构化反馈来改进未来的路由决策。集成新策略只需要轻量级评估，无需训练。

Result: 在模拟和真实世界评估中，RoboRouter 的平均成功率分别提高了 3% 和 13%，优于单个策略，同时保持了执行效率。

Conclusion: 通过在异构的、现成的策略之间进行智能路由，可以为构建更强大的机器人系统提供一条实用且可扩展的途径。

Abstract: Research on robotic manipulation has developed a diverse set of policy paradigms, including vision-language-action (VLA) models, vision-action (VA) policies, and code-based compositional approaches. Concrete policies typically attain high success rates on specific task distributions but lim-ited generalization beyond it. Rather than proposing an other monolithic policy, we propose to leverage the complementary strengths of existing approaches through intelligent policy routing. We introduce RoboRouter, a training-free framework that maintains a pool of heterogeneous policies and learns to select the best-performing policy for each task through accumulated execution experience. Given a new task, RoboRouter constructs a semantic task representation, retrieves historical records of similar tasks, predicts the optimal policy choice without requiring trial-and-error, and incorporates structured feedback to refine subsequent routing decisions. Integrating a new policy into the system requires only lightweight evaluation and incurs no training overhead. Across simulation benchmark and real-world evaluations, RoboRouter consistently outperforms than in-dividual policies, improving average success rate by more than 3% in simulation and over 13% in real-world settings, while preserving execution efficiency. Our results demonstrate that intelligent routing across heterogeneous, off-the-shelf policies provides a practical and scalable pathway toward building more capable robotic systems.

</details>


### [544] [NaviDriveVLM: Decoupling High-Level Reasoning and Motion Planning for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07901)
*Ximeng Tao,Pardis Taghavi,Dimitar Filev,Reza Langari,Gaurav Pandey*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为NaviDriveVLM的解耦框架，用于解决现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在自动驾驶中推理能力与运动规划之间权衡的挑战。该框架通过一个大型导航器（Navigator）负责高级推理，一个轻量级驱动器（Driver）负责动作生成，从而在保持强大推理能力的同时降低了训练成本，并为下游规划提供了可解释的中间表示。实验结果表明，NaviDriveVLM在nuScenes基准测试中优于大型VLM基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于VLM的自动驾驶系统在高级推理和运动规划之间存在权衡：大型模型虽然语义理解能力强，但难以高效地适应精确控制；小型模型虽然训练成本低，但推理能力往往较弱。研究旨在解决这一痛点，提出一种在保持推理能力的同时降低训练成本并实现精确控制的方案。

Method: 提出NaviDriveVLM框架，采用解耦设计，将推理与动作生成分离。该框架包含一个大型的导航器（Navigator）负责高级语义推理和决策，以及一个轻量级、可训练的驱动器（Driver）负责将导航器的输出转化为具体的运动指令。这种设计能够保留强大的推理能力，降低训练和适应成本，并生成可解释的中间表示。

Result: 在nuScenes基准数据集上的实验表明，NaviDriveVLM在端到端运动规划任务上表现优于现有的大型VLM基线模型。

Conclusion: NaviDriveVLM框架通过解耦推理和动作生成，成功克服了现有VLM在自动驾驶中面临的推理与控制之间的权衡问题，实现了更优的性能和更高的效率，并提供了可解释性。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have emerged as a promising direction for end-to-end autonomous driving (AD) by jointly modeling visual observations, driving context, and language-based reasoning. However, existing VLM-based systems face a trade-off between high-level reasoning and motion planning: large models offer strong semantic understanding but are costly to adapt for precise control, whereas small VLM models can be fine-tuned efficiently but often exhibit weaker reasoning. We propose NaviDriveVLM, a decoupled framework that separates reasoning from action generation using a large-scale Navigator and a lightweight trainable Driver. This design preserves reasoning ability, reduces training cost, and provides an explicit interpretable intermediate representation for downstream planning. Experiments on the nuScenes benchmark show that NaviDriveVLM outperforms large VLM baselines in end-to-end motion planning.

</details>


### [545] [Long-Short Term Agents for Pure-Vision Bronchoscopy Robotic Autonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07909)
*Junyang Wu,Mingyi Luo,Fangfang Xie,Minghui Zhang,Hanxiao Zhang,Chunxi Zhang,Junhao Wang,Jiayuan Sun,Yun Gu,Guang-Zhong Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种仅依赖视觉的自主支气管镜导航框架，可在无外部追踪的情况下，利用术前 CT 和实时内窥镜视频进行长期导航，并在模拟和活体动物实验中证明了其可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人辅助内镜介入手术中，准确的术中导航至关重要，但现有技术受限于有限的视野、动态伪影以及外部定位技术的复杂性和易受解剖不匹配影响的缺点。

Method: 提出了一种分层的长期-短期自主导航框架。短期反应式代理用于低延迟运动控制，长期策略式代理用于解决解剖歧义点。当两者建议冲突时，使用世界模型评论家预测未来视觉状态并选择最佳动作。该框架不依赖外部追踪。

Result: 在气道模型、离体猪肺和活体猪模型中进行了评估。在模型中成功到达所有计划的靶点，离体猪肺中成功率达到八代，活体猪模型中导航性能与专家支气管镜医生相当。

Conclusion: 该传感器无关的自主支气管镜导航框架在临床前可行性上得到了支持，为实现更安全、更精准的内镜介入手术提供了新的方向。

Abstract: Accurate intraoperative navigation is essential for robot-assisted endoluminal intervention, but remains difficult because of limited endoscopic field of view and dynamic artifacts. Existing navigation platforms often rely on external localization technologies, such as electromagnetic tracking or shape sensing, which increase hardware complexity and remain vulnerable to intraoperative anatomical mismatch. We present a vision-only autonomy framework that performs long-horizon bronchoscopic navigation using preoperative CT-derived virtual targets and live endoscopic video, without external tracking during navigation. The framework uses hierarchical long-short agents: a short-term reactive agent for continuous low-latency motion control, and a long-term strategic agent for decision support at anatomically ambiguous points. When their recommendations conflict, a world-model critic predicts future visual states for candidate actions and selects the action whose predicted state best matches the target view. We evaluated the system in a high-fidelity airway phantom, three ex vivo porcine lungs, and a live porcine model. The system reached all planned segmental targets in the phantom, maintained 80\% success to the eighth generation ex vivo, and achieved in vivo navigation performance comparable to the expert bronchoscopist. These results support the preclinical feasibility of sensor-free autonomous bronchoscopic navigation.

</details>


### [546] [Omnidirectional Humanoid Locomotion on Stairs via Unsafe Stepping Penalty and Sparse LiDAR Elevation Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07928)
*Yuzhi Jiang,Yujun Liang,Junhao Li,Han Ding,Lijun Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种用于人形机器人安全全向楼梯步行的单阶段训练框架，该框架通过密集的危险踏步惩罚、改进的点云映射系统和边缘引导的U-Net来实现，并在仿真和真实机器人实验中取得了优异的安全步频率和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人由于自由度高、重心高而固有地不稳定，且现有方法在楼梯全向运动感知和落脚点选择方面存在盲区和效率低下问题。

Method: 提出了一种单阶段训练框架，引入了密集的危险踏步惩罚。构建了一个滚动的点云建图系统，具有时空置信度衰减和自保护区机制，并使用边缘引导的不对称U-Net（EGAU）来细化局部地图，以解决楼梯立面点稀疏导致的重建失真问题。

Result: 在仿真中实现了近100%的安全踏步率，在真实机器人实验中也保持了很高的安全踏步率。成功完成了复杂户外地形的连续长距离行走测试，证明了其良好的仿真到现实迁移能力和长期稳定性。

Conclusion: 所提出的框架能够实现安全、高效的全向楼梯步态，并且在地复杂地形上也表现出优异的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为人形机器人在复杂地形上的安全运动提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Humanoid robots, characterized by numerous degrees of freedom and a high center of gravity, are inherently unstable. Safe omnidirectional locomotion on stairs requires both omnidirectional terrain perception and reliable foothold selection. Existing methods often rely on forward-facing depth cameras, which create blind zones that restrict omnidirectional mobility. Furthermore, sparse post-contact unsafe stepping penalties lead to low learning efficiency and suboptimal strategies. To realize safe stair-traversal gaits, this paper introduces a single-stage training framework incorporating a dense unsafe stepping penalty that provides continuous feedback as the foot approaches a hazardous placement. To obtain stable and reliable elevation maps, we build a rolling point-cloud mapping system with spatiotemporal confidence decay and a self-protection zone mechanism, producing temporally consistent local maps. These maps are further refined by an Edge-Guided Asymmetric U-Net (EGAU), which mitigates reconstruction distortion caused by sparse LiDAR returns on stair risers. Simulation and real-robot experiments show that the proposed method achieves a near-100\% safe stepping rate on stair terrains in simulation, while maintaining a remarkably high safe stepping rate in real-world deployments. Furthermore, it completes a continuous long-distance walking test on complex outdoor terrains, demonstrating reliable sim-to-real transfer and long-term stability.

</details>


### [547] [Unified Structural-Hydrodynamic Modeling of Underwater Underactuated Mechanisms and Soft Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07939)
*Chenrui Zhang,Yiyuan Zhang,Yunfei Ye,Junkai Chen,Haozhe Wang,Cecilia Laschi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种轨迹驱动的全局优化框架，用于统一识别水下多体系统的结构和流体动力学参数，从而实现对欠驱动和软体机器人的高保真建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下欠驱动和软体机器人系统在海洋探索和操作中具有优势，但其精确建模因需要识别高维度的结构和流体动力学参数而具有挑战性。

Method: 受协方差矩阵自适应进化策略 (CMA-ES) 启发，提出了一种轨迹驱动的全局优化框架，通过匹配仿真和实验运动的轨迹来同时识别耦合的内部弹性、阻尼和分布式流体动力学参数。

Result: 该框架在欠驱动多体机构上验证了其准确识别分布式流体动力学系数的能力，端部效应器位置误差低于 5%。该方法成功应用于章鱼状软体手臂，实现了强大的真实到仿真一致性，且无需手动重新调整。将八个识别的软体手臂组装成游泳章鱼机器人，统一的参数集实现了逼真的整体行为。

Conclusion: 所提出的结构-流体动力学建模框架具有可扩展性和可转移性，可应用于水下欠驱动和软体机器人系统，无需额外的参数校准即可实现高保真建模和逼真行为。

Abstract: Underwater robots are widely deployed for ocean exploration and manipulation. Underactuated mechanisms are particularly advantageous in aquatic environments, as reducing actuator count lowers the risk of motor leakage while introducing inherent mechanical compliance. However, accurate modeling of underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems remains challenging because it requires identifying a high-dimensional set of internal structural and external hydrodynamic parameters. In this work, we propose a trajectory-driven global optimization framework for unified structural-hydrodynamic modeling of underwater multibody systems. Inspired by the Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES), the proposed approach simultaneously identifies coupled internal elastic, damping, and distributed hydrodynamic parameters through trajectory-level matching between simulation and experimental motion. This enables high-fidelity reproduction of both underactuated mechanisms and compliant soft robotic systems in underwater environments. We first validate the framework on a link-by-link underactuated multibody mechanism, demonstrating accurate identification of distributed hydrodynamic coefficients, with a normalized end effector position error below 5% across multiple trajectories, varying initial conditions, and both active-passive and fully passive configurations. The identified modeling strategy is then transferred to a single octopus-inspired soft arm, showing strong real-to-sim consistency without manual retuning. Finally, eight identified arms are assembled into a swimming octopus robot, where the unified parameter set enables realistic whole body behavior without additional parameter calibration. These results demonstrate the scalability and transferability of the proposed structural-hydrodynamic modeling framework across underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems.

</details>


### [548] [VORL-EXPLORE: A Hybrid Learning Planning Approach to Multi-Robot Exploration in Dynamic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07973)
*Ning Liu,Sen Shen,Zheng Li,Sheng Liu,Dongkun Han,Shangke Lyu,Thomas Braunl*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为 VORL-EXPLORE 的混合学习和规划框架，用于解决传统分层多机器人探索中任务分配与局部导航解耦的问题，通过引入“执行保真度”信号来耦合两者，提高了在密集动态环境下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的机器人探索方法将任务分配和局部导航分离开来，导致在密集和动态环境中系统易于变得脆弱。分配器缺乏对执行难度的直接感知，可能导致机器人聚集在瓶颈处，引发不必要的重规划，并造成重复覆盖。因此，需要一种能将任务分配与运动执行紧密结合的方法。

Method: VORL-EXPLORE 框架引入了“执行保真度”信号，该信号表示局部可导航性的共享估计。该信号被整合到一个耦合了保真度的 Voronoi 目标函数中，并加入机器人间的排斥项以减少潜在冲突。同时，它驱动一个风险感知的自适应仲裁机制，该机制在全局 A* 导航和基于强化学习的局部反应策略之间进行权衡。此外，该框架支持使用近期进展和安全结果产生的伪标签进行在线自监督重校准，以适应非稳态障碍物。

Result: 在随机网格和 Gazebo 工厂场景的广泛实验中，VORL-EXPLORE 实现了较高的成功率、更短的路径长度、更低的重叠覆盖率以及可靠的避碰能力。在专门的严重交通消融实验中，也验证了其在线自监督重校准的能力。

Conclusion: VORL-EXPLORE 通过引入执行保真度信号，成功地将任务分配与运动执行相结合，显著提高了多机器人探索在复杂环境下的鲁棒性和效率，并能自适应地处理动态环境变化。

Abstract: Hierarchical multi-robot exploration commonly decouples frontier allocation from local navigation, which can make the system brittle in dense and dynamic environments. Because the allocator lacks direct awareness of execution difficulty, robots may cluster at bottlenecks, trigger oscillatory replanning, and generate redundant coverage. We propose VORL-EXPLORE, a hybrid learning and planning framework that addresses this limitation through execution fidelity, a shared estimate of local navigability that couples task allocation with motion execution. This fidelity signal is incorporated into a fidelity-coupled Voronoi objective with inter-robot repulsion to reduce contention before it emerges. It also drives a risk-aware adaptive arbitration mechanism between global A* guidance and a reactive reinforcement learning policy, balancing long-range efficiency with safe interaction in confined spaces. The framework further supports online self-supervised recalibration of the fidelity model using pseudo-labels derived from recent progress and safety outcomes, enabling adaptation to non-stationary obstacles without manual risk tuning. We evaluate this capability separately in a dedicated severe-traffic ablation. Extensive experiments in randomized grids and a Gazebo factory scenario show high success rates, shorter path length, lower overlap, and robust collision avoidance. The source code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

</details>


### [549] [Dual-Horizon Hybrid Internal Model for Low-Gravity Quadrupedal Jumping with Hardware-in-the-Loop Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07999)
*Haozhe Xu,Yifei Zhao,Wenhao Feng,Zhipeng Wang,Hongrui Sang,Cheng Cheng,Xiuxian Li,Zhen Yin,Bin He*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种用于月球重力下连续四足跳跃的混合模型（Dual-Horizon Hybrid Internal Model），仅使用本体感觉信息，并在名为MATRIX的硬件在环仿真平台上进行了验证，成功实现了在模拟月球地形上的稳定连续跳跃。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 月球重力下的跳跃式移动面临着长时间飞行、着陆冲击大、姿态不稳定以及现有方法缺乏连续地形适应性和硬件验证等挑战。

Method: 提出了一种双时域混合内部模型，包含一个短时域分支（用于垂直动力学和速度估计）和一个长时域分支（用于水平运动和质心高度）。该模型利用本体感觉输入，通过融合不同时间尺度的信息来应对月球重力下的长飞行阶段。研究还开发了一个名为MATRIX的硬件在环仿真平台，通过滑轮配重系统模拟月球重力，并结合数字孪生技术实现了逼真的月球地形仿真。

Result: 在MATRIX平台上，该四足机器人成功实现了在模拟月球重力下的稳定、连续的跳跃，能够跨越模拟的陨石坑月球地形。

Conclusion: 所提出的双时域混合内部模型能够有效地解决月球重力下四足机器人连续跳跃的挑战，并且通过MATRIX硬件在环仿真平台验证了其在复杂地形上的有效性。

Abstract: Locomotion under reduced gravity is commonly realized through jumping, yet continuous pronking in lunar gravity remains challenging due to prolonged flight phases and sparse ground contact. The extended aerial duration increases landing impact sensitivity and makes stable attitude regulation over rough planetary terrain difficult. Existing approaches primarily address single jumps on flat surfaces and lack both continuous-terrain solutions and realistic hardware validation. This work presents a Dual-Horizon Hybrid Internal Model for continuous quadrupedal jumping under lunar gravity using proprioceptive sensing only. Two temporal encoders capture complementary time scales: a short-horizon branch models rapid vertical dynamics with explicit vertical velocity estimation, while a long-horizon branch models horizontal motion trends and center-of-mass height evolution across the jump cycle. The fused representation enables stable and continuous jumping under extended aerial phases characteristic of lunar gravity. To provide hardware-in-the-loop validation, we develop the MATRIX (Mixed-reality Adaptive Testbed for Robotic Integrated eXploration) platform, a digital-twin-driven system that offloads gravity through a pulley-counterweight mechanism and maps Unreal Engine lunar terrain to a motion platform and treadmill in real time. Using MATRIX, we demonstrate continuous jumping of a quadruped robot under lunar-gravity emulation across cratered lunar-like terrain.

</details>


### [550] [Vector Field Augmented Differentiable Policy Learning for Vision-Based Drone Racing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08019)
*Yang Su,Feng Yu,Yu Hu,Xinze Niu,Linzuo Zhang,Fangyu Sun,Danping Zou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为DiffRacing的新型框架，通过结合可微分损失和向量场，解决了无人机竞速中门穿越和避障的挑战，实现了高效且稳定的训练，并具有良好的sim-to-real迁移能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的基于物理的可微分策略学习在无人机竞速中面临挑战，因为像门穿越这样的关键目标难以表示为光滑、可微分的损失函数，导致训练不稳定和效率低下。

Method: 提出DiffRacing框架，该框架将可微分损失与向量场相结合，为策略学习提供连续稳定的梯度信号。此外，还引入了可微分Delta Action Model来补偿动力学不匹配，实现高效的sim-to-real迁移。

Result: DiffRacing在模拟和真实世界实验中均表现出优越的样本效率、更快的收敛速度和鲁棒的飞行性能，成功实现了高速门穿越和避障。

Conclusion: 向量场可以有效地增强传统的基于梯度的策略学习，通过引入特定任务的几何先验，为解决无人机竞速等复杂问题提供了一种新颖有效的方法。

Abstract: Autonomous drone racing in complex environments requires agile, high-speed flight while maintaining reliable obstacle avoidance. Differentiable-physics-based policy learning has recently demonstrated high sample efficiency and remarkable performance across various tasks, including agile drone flight and quadruped locomotion. However, applying such methods to drone racing remains difficult, as key objective like gate traversal are inherently hard to express as smooth, differentiable losses. To address these challenges, we propose DiffRacing, a novel vector field-augmented differentiable policy learning framework. DiffRacing integrates differentiable losses and vector fields into the training process to provide continuous and stable gradient signals, balancing obstacle avoidance and high-speed gate traversal. In addition, a differentiable Delta Action Model compensates for dynamics mismatch, enabling efficient sim-to-real transfer without explicit system identification. Extensive simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that DiffRacing achieves superior sample efficiency, faster convergence, and robust flight performance, thereby demonstrating that vector fields can augment traditional gradient-based policy learning with a task-specific geometric prior.

</details>


### [551] [See and Switch: Vision-Based Branching for Interactive Robot-Skill Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08057)
*Petr Vanc,Jan Kristof Behrens,Václav Hlaváč,Karla Stepanova*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为See & Switch的交互式教学与执行框架，该框架使用基于视觉的方法，通过眼视相机捕捉的图像来自动选择执行路径中的分支，并检测需要新演示的异常情况，从而解决了现有机器人演示编程（PbD）在处理现实世界多样性方面的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的编程机器人演示（PbD）框架在应对真实世界的复杂性和多样性方面存在困难。虽然条件任务图（conditional task graphs）表现力强且易于增量定义，但其执行需要可靠的、基于感知的在线分支选择，而这正是现有方法所缺乏的。

Method: 该研究提出了一种名为See & Switch的框架，使用用户可扩展的技能部分图来表示任务，并通过决策状态（DS）连接，实现执行过程中的条件分支。其核心在于一个基于眼视相机图像（高维信息）的“Switcher”，能够自动选择竞争性的后续技能部分，并检测需要新演示的异常情况。该框架还通过一个输入模态抽象层集成了体感示教、操纵杆控制和手势，实现了教学模态的独立性。

Result: 该方法在三个具有挑战性的灵巧操作任务上进行了验证。在用户研究中，对于新手用户，该方法在分支选择上达到了90.7%的准确率，在异常检测上达到了87.9%的准确率，总计576次机器人运行。

Conclusion: See & Switch框架通过其基于视觉的感知能力，有效地解决了现有PbD方法在处理复杂任务分支和异常情况时的不足，实现了教学模态的独立性，并提高了机器人在面对多样性时的鲁棒性，为机器人演示编程提供了一种更高效、更易用的解决方案。

Abstract: Programming robots by demonstration (PbD) is an intuitive concept, but scaling it to real-world variability remains a challenge for most current teaching frameworks. Conditional task graphs are very expressive and can be defined incrementally, which fits very well with the PbD idea. However, acting using conditional task graphs requires reliable perception-grounded online branch selection. In this paper, we present See & Switch, an interactive teaching-and-execution framework that represents tasks as user-extendable graphs of skill parts connected via decision states (DS), enabling conditional branching during replay. Unlike prior approaches that rely on manual branching or low-dimensional signals (e.g., proprioception), our vision-based Switcher uses eye-in-hand images (high-dimensional) to select among competing successor skill parts and to detect out-of-distribution contexts that require new demonstrations. We integrate kinesthetic teaching, joystick control, and hand gestures via an input-modality-abstraction layer and demonstrate that our proposed method is teaching modality-independent, enabling efficient in-situ recovery demonstrations. The system is validated in experiments on three challenging dexterous manipulation tasks. We evaluate our method under diverse conditions and furthermore conduct user studies with 8 participants. We show that the proposed method reliably performs branch selection and anomaly detection for novice users, achieving 90.7 % and 87.9 % accuracy, respectively, across 576 real-robot rollouts. We provide all code and data required to reproduce our experiments at http://imitrob.ciirc.cvut.cz/publications/seeandswitch.

</details>


### [552] [Adaptive Vision-Based Control of Redundant Robots with Null-Space Interaction for Human-Robot Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08089)
*Xiangjie Yan,Chen Chen,Xiang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于冗余机器人的新型自适应视觉伺服与交互式零空间控制方案，实现了在未知环境中无需标定的自主任务执行，并能与人类安全有效地交互，以应对突发情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现人机协作超越单独个体（人或机器人）的性能，以及在未知环境中安全有效地进行人机交互，仍是开放性问题。

Method: 提出了一种新的控制方案，包括任务空间的自适应视觉伺服控制项和零空间的交互式控制项。利用李雅普诺夫方法严格证明了闭环系统的稳定性，并保证了任务空间位置误差和零空间阻尼模型的收敛性。

Result: 该控制方案使得机器人能够在未知环境中自主执行任务，同时通过零空间交互处理不可预见的事件（如潜在碰撞、临时需求），且不影响末端执行器主任务。通过增强现实（AR）引导的机器人机械臂实验验证了该控制方案的性能。

Conclusion: 所提出的控制方案能够实现冗余机器人在未知环境中的自主任务执行以及与人类的安全有效交互，从而在人机协作领域取得突破。

Abstract: Human-robot collaboration aims to extend human ability through cooperation with robots. This technology is currently helping people with physical disabilities, has transformed the manufacturing process of companies, improved surgical performance, and will likely revolutionize the daily lives of everyone in the future. Being able to enhance the performance of both sides, such that human-robot collaboration outperforms a single robot/human, remains an open issue. For safer and more effective collaboration, a new control scheme has been proposed for redundant robots in this paper, consisting of an adaptive vision-based control term in task space and an interactive control term in null space. Such a formulation allows the robot to autonomously carry out tasks in an unknown environment without prior calibration while also interacting with humans to deal with unforeseen changes (e.g., potential collision, temporary needs) under the redundant configuration. The decoupling between task space and null space helps to explore the collaboration safely and effectively without affecting the main task of the robot end-effector. The stability of the closed-loop system has been rigorously proved with Lyapunov methods, and both the convergence of the position error in task space and that of the damping model in null space are guaranteed. The experimental results of a robot manipulator guided with the technology of augmented reality (AR) are presented to illustrate the performance of the control scheme.

</details>


### [553] [AffordGrasp: Cross-Modal Diffusion for Affordance-Aware Grasp Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08021)
*Xiaofei Wu,Yi Zhang,Yumeng Liu,Yuexin Ma,Yujiao Shi,Xuming He*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为 AffordGrasp 的基于扩散的模型框架，用于生成物理上稳定且语义上忠实的人类抓取姿势，能够同时考虑物体几何形状和用户指定的交互语义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义抓取方法在 3D 物体表示和文本指令之间存在显著的模态差异，并且缺乏明确的空间或语义约束，导致抓取姿势无效或不一致。因此，需要一种能够弥合这些差距并生成更准确、更稳定抓取姿势的方法。

Method: AffordGrasp 框架首先建立一个自动化的注释流程，为手-物体交互数据集添加结构化的语言标签，捕捉交互意图。然后，该框架将手部姿势的潜在表示与双重条件扩散过程相结合，使模型能够同时推理物体几何、空间功能（affordances）和指令语义。此外，还包含一个分布调整模块，以强制执行物理接触一致性和语义对齐。

Result: 在四个基准测试（来自 HO-3D、OakInk、GRAB 和 AffordPose 的指令增强版本）上进行评估，AffordGrasp 在抓取质量、语义准确性和多样性方面均取得了显著优于现有最先进方法的改进。

Conclusion: AffordGrasp 框架通过集成结构化语言注释、考虑物体几何、空间功能和指令语义的扩散模型，成功地生成了高质量、物理稳定且语义准确的人类抓取姿势，解决了现有方法的局限性。

Abstract: Generating human grasping poses that accurately reflect both object geometry and user-specified interaction semantics is essential for natural hand-object interactions in AR/VR and embodied AI. However, existing semantic grasping approaches struggle with the large modality gap between 3D object representations and textual instructions, and often lack explicit spatial or semantic constraints, leading to physically invalid or semantically inconsistent grasps. In this work, we present AffordGrasp, a diffusion-based framework that produces physically stable and semantically faithful human grasps with high precision. We first introduce a scalable annotation pipeline that automatically enriches hand-object interaction datasets with fine-grained structured language labels capturing interaction intent. Building upon these annotations, AffordGrasp integrates an affordance-aware latent representation of hand poses with a dual-conditioning diffusion process, enabling the model to jointly reason over object geometry, spatial affordances, and instruction semantics. A distribution adjustment module further enforces physical contact consistency and semantic alignment. We evaluate AffordGrasp across four instruction-augmented benchmarks derived from HO-3D, OakInk, GRAB, and AffordPose, and observe substantial improvements over state-of-the-art methods in grasp quality, semantic accuracy, and diversity.

</details>


### [554] [DeReCo: Decoupling Representation and Coordination Learning for Object-Adaptive Decentralized Multi-Robot Cooperative Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08111)
*Kazuki Shibata,Ryosuke Sota,Shandil Dhiresh Bosch,Yuki Kadokawa,Tsurumine Yoshihisa,Takamitsu Matsubara*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为DeReCo的新型多机器人强化学习框架，通过解耦物体表征学习和协调策略学习，提升了在不同形状和物理属性物体上的合作运输能力，提高了样本效率和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在去中心化执行的多机器人合作运输任务中，如何处理物体形状和物理属性的多样性，以及在部分可观测和非平稳的多智能体强化学习（MARL）环境下进行有效的表征学习和协调策略学习是一个核心挑战。现有方法将两者联合优化，但存在相互干扰，导致训练效率低下和泛化能力差。

Method: DeReCo框架采用三阶段训练策略：1. 使用特权物体信息进行集中式协调学习；2. 从局部观测重构物体表征；3. 逐步移除特权信息以实现去中心化执行。这种解耦方式旨在减轻表征学习和协调学习之间的干扰。

Result: 在模拟环境中，DeReCo在三个训练过的物体上表现优于基线方法，并能泛化到六个未见过的物体（具有不同的质量和摩擦系数）。在真实机器人实验中，DeReCo在两个未见过的物体上取得了更优越的性能。

Conclusion: DeReCo框架通过解耦表示学习和协调学习，有效地解决了多机器人合作运输中物体多样性和去中心化执行的挑战，显著提高了样本效率和跨物体泛化能力，并在模拟和真实机器人实验中得到了验证。

Abstract: Generalizing decentralized multi-robot cooperative transport across objects with diverse shapes and physical properties remains a fundamental challenge. Under decentralized execution, two key challenges arise: object-dependent representation learning under partial observability and coordination learning in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) under non-stationarity. A typical approach jointly optimizes object-dependent representations and coordinated policies in an end-to-end manner while randomizing object shapes and physical properties during training. However, this joint optimization tightly couples representation and coordination learning, introducing bidirectional interference: inaccurate representations under partial observability destabilize coordination learning, while non-stationarity in MARL further degrades representation learning, resulting in sample-inefficient training. To address this structural coupling, we propose DeReCo, a novel MARL framework that decouples representation and coordination learning for object-adaptive multi-robot cooperative transport, improving sample efficiency and generalization across objects and transport scenarios. DeReCo adopts a three-stage training strategy: (1) centralized coordination learning with privileged object information, (2) reconstruction of object-dependent representations from local observations, and (3) progressive removal of privileged information for decentralized execution. This decoupling mitigates interference between representation and coordination learning and enables stable and sample-efficient training. Experimental results show that DeReCo outperforms baselines in simulation on three training objects, generalizes to six unseen objects with varying masses and friction coefficients, and achieves superior performance on two unseen objects in real-robot experiments.

</details>


### [555] [Towards Human-Like Manipulation through RL-Augmented Teleoperation and Mixture-of-Dexterous-Experts VLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08122)
*Tutian Tang,Xingyu Ji,Wanli Xing,Ce Hao,Wenqiang Xu,Lin Shao,Cewu Lu,Qiaojun Yu,Jiangmiao Pang,Kaifeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为MoDE-VLA的集成框架，用于解决Vision-Language-Action (VLA)模型在处理需要高精度接触操作的双臂灵巧操控任务时的挑战，通过引入IMCopilot技能助手和MoDE-VLA架构，有效融合了触觉和力觉信息，提升了任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在机器人灵巧操作，特别是双臂、高精度接触操作方面存在局限，主要体现在数据获取、多技能学习和多模态感知融合的挑战。

Method: 提出IMCopilot，一套强化学习训练的原子技能，用于简化数据收集和作为VLA的低层执行单元；提出MoDE-VLA架构，利用残差注入机制将力觉和触觉模态集成到预训练的VLA模型中，实现接触感知。

Result: 在四项复杂度递增的任务上进行了验证，结果显示，在灵巧的接触丰富任务上，相较于基线模型，成功率提高了两倍。

Conclusion: 所提出的集成框架有效解决了VLA模型在处理复杂双臂灵巧操控任务中的数据获取、多技能学习和多模态感知融合问题，并通过IMCopilot和MoDE-VLA架构实现了接触感知的性能提升。

Abstract: While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated remarkable success in robotic manipulation, their application has largely been confined to low-degree-of-freedom end-effectors performing simple, vision-guided pick-and-place tasks. Extending these models to human-like, bimanual dexterous manipulation-specifically contact-rich in-hand operations-introduces critical challenges in high-fidelity data acquisition, multi-skill learning, and multimodal sensory fusion. In this paper, we propose an integrated framework to address these bottlenecks, built upon two components. First, we introduce IMCopilot (In-hand Manipulation Copilot), a suite of reinforcement learning-trained atomic skills that plays a dual role: it acts as a shared-autonomy assistant to simplify teleoperation data collection, and it serves as a callable low-level execution primitive for the VLA. Second, we present MoDE-VLA (Mixture-of-Dexterous-Experts VLA), an architecture that seamlessly integrates heterogeneous force and tactile modalities into a pretrained VLA backbone. By utilizing a residual injection mechanism, MoDE-VLA enables contact-aware refinement without degrading the model's pretrained knowledge. We validate our approach on four tasks of escalating complexity, demonstrating doubled success rate improvement over the baseline in dexterous contact-rich tasks.

</details>


### [556] [SaiVLA-0: Cerebrum--Pons--Cerebellum Tripartite Architecture for Compute-Aware Vision-Language-Action](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08124)
*Xiang Shi,Wenlong Huang,Menglin Zou,Xinhai Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种受神经科学启发的 Vision-Language-Action (VLA) 模型，将大脑皮层（Cerebrum）作为高层多模态先验，脑桥适配器（Pons Adapter）整合实时本体感受信息，小脑（ParaCAT）进行快速分类解码以实现在线控制。模型设计模块化，并引入了特征缓存机制以提高效率和可复现性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索一种受神经科学启发的 VLA 模型，以整合高层多模态信息和实时本体感受输入，并实现高效、稳定、可复现的在线控制。

Method: 该模型受到大脑结构（Cerebrum, Pons, Cerebellum）的启发。Cerebrum 提供稳定的高层先验，Pons Adapter 整合本体感受输入并编译执行指令，Cerebellum (ParaCAT) 进行快速的分类解码。引入了特征缓存、固定比例调度、基于主动注视视觉的区域感兴趣（ROI）处理等技术。

Result: 通过特征缓存，在 LIBERO 数据集上的训练时间从 7.5 小时减少到 4.5 小时，平均成功率从 86.5% 提高到 92.5%。SaiVLA0 模型达到了 99.0% 的平均成功率。

Conclusion: 该神经科学启发的 VLA 模型在整合多模态信息、实现高效和可复现的在线控制方面显示出潜力。模块化设计和特征缓存机制是其关键优势。

Abstract: We revisit Vision-Language-Action through a neuroscience-inspired triad. Biologically, the Cerebrum provides stable high-level multimodal priors and remains frozen; the Pons Adapter integrates these cortical features with real-time proprioceptive inputs and compiles intent into execution-ready tokens; and the Cerebellum (ParaCAT) performs fast, parallel categorical decoding for online control, with hysteresis/EMA/temperature/entropy for stability. A fixed-ratio schedule and two-stage feature caching make the system compute-aware and reproducible. Inspired by active, foveated vision, our wrist ROIs are geometrically tied to the end-effector via calibrated projection, providing a movement-stabilized, high-resolution view that is sensitive to fine-grained pose changes and complements the global context of the main view.
  The design is modular: upgrading the Cerebrum only retrains the Pons; changing robots only trains the Cerebellum; cerebellum-only RL can further refine control without touching high-level semantics. As a concept-and-protocol paper with preliminary evidence, we outline a timing protocol under matched conditions (GPU, resolution, batch) to verify anticipated efficiency gains. We also report preliminary LIBERO evidence showing that split feature caching reduces training time (7.5h to 4.5h) and improves average success (86.5% to 92.5%) under official N1.5 head-only training, and that SaiVLA0 reaches 99.0% mean success.

</details>


### [557] [UniGround: Universal 3D Visual Grounding via Training-Free Scene Parsing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08131)
*Jiaxi Zhang,Yunheng Wang,Wei Lu,Taowen Wang,Weisheng Xu,Shuning Zhang,Yixiao Feng,Yuetong Fang,Renjing Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了UniGround，一种用于3D视觉地面定位（3DVG）的训练无关方法，通过场景候选构建和多尺度视觉提示来实现开放世界的3DVG，并在ScanRefer和EmbodiedScan数据集上取得了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大规模预训练模型在3DVG任务上虽然取得了进展，但其感知和推理能力受限于预训练知识，难以泛化到未见的空间关系和分布外场景。

Method: UniGround采用两阶段方法：1. 全局候选过滤：通过训练无关的3D拓扑和多视图语义编码构建场景候选。2. 局部精度地面定位：利用多尺度视觉提示和结构化推理精确定位目标对象。

Result: UniGround在ScanRefer上取得了46.1%/34.1%的Acc@0.25/0.5，在EmbodiedScan上取得了28.7%的Acc@0.25，在EmbodiedScan上成为零样本方法中的新SOTA，且无需3D监督。在真实世界环境下的评估也显示了其鲁棒的泛化能力。

Conclusion: UniGround通过训练无关的视觉和几何推理，实现了超越训练数据的开放世界3DVG，并在各种场景下表现出鲁棒性，为机器人和AR等应用提供了更通用的3DVG解决方案。

Abstract: Understanding and localizing objects in complex 3D environments from natural language descriptions, known as 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG), is a foundational challenge in embodied AI, with broad implications for robotics, augmented reality, and human-machine interaction. Large-scale pre-trained foundation models have driven significant progress on this front, enabling open-vocabulary 3DVG that allows systems to locate arbitrary objects in a given scene. However, their reliance on pre-trained models constrains 3D perception and reasoning within the inherited knowledge boundaries, resulting in limited generalization to unseen spatial relationships and poor robustness to out-of-distribution scenes. In this paper, we replace this constrained perception with training-free visual and geometric reasoning, thereby unlocking open-world 3DVG that enables the localization of any object in any scene beyond the training data. Specifically, the proposed UniGround operates in two stages: a Global Candidate Filtering stage that constructs scene candidates through training-free 3D topology and multi-view semantic encoding, and a Local Precision Grounding stage that leverages multi-scale visual prompting and structured reasoning to precisely identify the target object. Experiments on ScanRefer and EmbodiedScan show that UniGround achieves 46.1\%/34.1\% Acc@0.25/0.5 on ScanRefer and 28.7\% Acc@0.25 on EmbodiedScan, establishing a new state-of-the-art among zero-shot methods on EmbodiedScan without any 3D supervision. We further evaluate UniGround in real-world environments under uncontrolled reconstruction conditions and substantial domain shift, showing training-free reasoning generalizes robustly beyond curated benchmarks.

</details>


### [558] [TRIAGE: Type-Routed Interventions via Aleatoric-Epistemic Gated Estimation in Robotic Manipulation and Adaptive Perception -- Don't Treat All Uncertainty the Same](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08128)
*Divake Kumar,Sina Tayebati,Devashri Naik,Patrick Poggi,Amanda Sofie Rios,Nilesh Ahuja,Amit Ranjan Trivedi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级的后处理框架，该框架将预测不确定性分解为偶然不确定性和认识不确定性，并利用这些信号在推理时调节系统响应，从而在机器人控制和感知任务中取得了改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的不确定性感知机器人系统通常将预测不确定性聚合成单一标量，并采用统一的纠正措施，这会掩盖不确定性的来源（传感器噪声还是模型与实际系统动力学的不匹配），导致纠正措施应用错误，性能下降。

Method: 该框架通过以下方式分解不确定性：1. 使用 Mahalanobis 密度模型从观测分布的偏差中估计偶然不确定性。2. 使用对噪声鲁棒的前向动力学集成来检测认识不确定性，将模型不匹配与测量损坏分离开来。然后，利用这两种信号来指导特定类型的响应：高偶然不确定性触发观测恢复，高认识不确定性则调节控制动作。该框架还可以通过指导模型容量选择来进行自适应感知。

Result: 实验结果表明，在机器人操控任务中，分解后的控制器在复合扰动下的任务成功率从 59.4% 提高到 80.4%，并且比联合不确定性基线提高了高达 21.0%。在 MOT17 上的自适应跟踪推理任务中，不确定性引导的模型选择相比固定的高容量检测器，将平均计算量减少了 58.2%，同时检测质量仅下降 0.4%。

Conclusion: 通过将不确定性分解为偶然不确定性和认识不确定性，并根据不同类型的不确定性采取特定的响应措施，该框架能够显著提高机器人控制和感知任务的性能，并实现更高效的计算资源利用。

Abstract: Most uncertainty-aware robotic systems collapse prediction uncertainty into a single scalar score and use it to trigger uniform corrective responses. This aggregation obscures whether uncertainty arises from corrupted observations or from mismatch between the learned model and the true system dynamics. As a result, corrective actions may be applied to the wrong component of the closed loop, degrading performance relative to leaving the policy unchanged. We introduce a lightweight post hoc framework that decomposes uncertainty into aleatoric and epistemic components and uses these signals to regulate system responses at inference time. Aleatoric uncertainty is estimated from deviations in the observation distribution using a Mahalanobis density model, while epistemic uncertainty is detected using a noise robust forward dynamics ensemble that isolates model mismatch from measurement corruption. The two signals remain empirically near orthogonal during closed loop execution and enable type specific responses. High aleatoric uncertainty triggers observation recovery, while high epistemic uncertainty moderates control actions. The same signals also regulate adaptive perception by guiding model capacity selection during tracking inference. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across both control and perception tasks. In robotic manipulation, the decomposed controller improves task success from 59.4% to 80.4% under compound perturbations and outperforms a combined uncertainty baseline by up to 21.0%. In adaptive tracking inference on MOT17, uncertainty-guided model selection reduces average compute by 58.2% relative to a fixed high capacity detector while preserving detection quality within 0.4%. Code and demo videos are available at https://divake.github.io/uncertainty-decomposition/.

</details>


### [559] [Multifingered force-aware control for humanoid robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08142)
*Pasquale Marra,Gabriele M. Caddeo,Ugo Pattacini,Lorenzo Natale*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种考虑力的机器人多指手控制和力分配方法，通过估计接触力来适应机器人本体、手臂、手腕和手指的运动，以维持与不同质量分布或不稳定接触物体的稳定接触。该方法通过训练接触力估计器，并采用以质心为基础的控制器，成功应用于多物体平衡任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人需要能够稳定地操纵具有不同质量分布或不稳定接触的物体，这需要精确的力控制和分配。现有方法可能无法处理这些复杂情况，因此需要一种能够感知并适应接触力的控制策略。

Method: 1. 收集包含Xela磁传感器触觉信号和真实力测量数据的数据集，并训练接触力估计器。2. 设计一种基于模型的控制方案，通过最小化压力中心（CoP）与指尖接触多边形质心之间的距离来控制机器人。3. 该控制器可以调整机器人本体、手臂、手腕和手指的运动。

Result: 在五种不同质量分布的物体平衡任务中，成功率达到82.7%。在多物体场景下，准确率达到80%。

Conclusion: 该方法通过利用估计的接触力，而非原始触觉信号，可以应用于任何能够进行力估计的传感器。该框架能够有效地实现多指手在复杂接触场景下的力控制和分配，并成功应用于平衡任务。

Abstract: In this paper, we address force-aware control and force distribution in robotic platforms with multi-fingered hands. Given a target goal and force estimates from tactile sensors, we design a controller that adapts the motion of the torso, arm, wrist, and fingers, redistributing forces to maintain stable contact with objects of varying mass distribution or unstable contacts. To estimate forces, we collect a dataset of tactile signals and ground-truth force measurements using five Xela magnetic sensors interacting with indenters, and train force estimators. We then introduce a model-based control scheme that minimizes the distance between the Center of Pressure (CoP) and the centroid of the fingertips contact polygon. Since our method relies on estimated forces rather than raw tactile signals, it has the potential to be applied to any sensor capable of force estimation. We validate our framework on a balancing task with five objects, achieving a $82.7\%$ success rate, and further evaluate it in multi-object scenarios, achieving $80\%$ accuracy. Code and data can be found here https://github.com/hsp-iit/multifingered-force-aware-control.

</details>


### [560] [POIROT: Investigating Direct Tangible vs. Digitally Mediated Interaction and Attitude Moderation in Multi-party Murder Mystery Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08136)
*Wen Chen,Rongxi Chen,Shankai Chen,Huiyang Gong,Minghui Guo,Yingri Xu,Xintong Wu,Xinyi Fu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究发现，社交机器人在多人游戏中扮演游戏主持人时，其物理交互方式并不一定能提升用户体验。用户对机器人的负面态度（NARS）是关键的调节因素，高NARS用户在物理交互下叙事沉浸感会显著降低，而低NARS用户则不受影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究挑战了“物理交互普遍优于用户体验”的观点，特别是在社交机器人承担复杂角色（如游戏主持人）时，并旨在识别物理交互效果的边界条件。

Method: 通过一项包含67名参与者的被试间实验，比较了机器人游戏主持人通过直接物理交互和数字媒介界面传递线索的效果。使用多变量方差分析（MANOVA）和多层线性模型（MLM）进行定量分析，并结合定性访谈来理解用户体验。

Result: 多变量方差分析未发现传递模态的主效应。多层线性模型显示，用户对机器人的负面态度（NARS）会显著调节物理交互的效果：高NARS用户在物理交互下叙事沉浸感明显降低，而低NARS用户则没有这种负面影响。

Conclusion: 物理交互的优势并非普遍适用，用户的负面态度是影响其效果的关键因素。对于对机器人持负面态度的用户，数字媒介界面可以作为一种社交缓冲。未来的研究应关注开发能够根据用户偏好自适应调整交互方式的系统。

Abstract: As social robots take on increasingly complex roles like game masters (GMs) in multi-party games, the expectation that physicality universally enhances user experience remains debated. This study challenges the "one-size-fits-all" view of tangible interaction by identifying a critical boundary condition: users' Negative Attitudes towards Robots (NARS). In a between-subjects experiment (N = 67), a custom-built robot GM facilitated a multi-party murder mystery game (MMG) by delivering clues either through direct tangible interaction or a digitally mediated interface. Baseline multivariate analysis (MANOVA) showed no significant main effect of delivery modality, confirming that tangibility alone does not guarantee superior engagement. However, primary analysis using multilevel linear models (MLM) revealed a reliable moderation: participants high in NARS experienced markedly lower narrative immersion under tangible delivery, whereas those with low NARS scores showed no such decrement. Qualitative findings further illuminate this divergence: tangibility provides novelty and engagement for some but imposes excessive proxemic friction for anxious users, for whom the digital interface acts as a protective social buffer. These results advance a conditional model of HRI and emphasize the necessity for adaptive systems that can tailor interaction modalities to user predispositions.

</details>


### [561] [A General Lie-Group Framework for Continuum Soft Robot Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08232)
*Lingxiao Xun,Benoît Rosa,Jérôme Szewczyk,Brahim Tamadazte*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于李群的软体机器人建模框架，结合了Cosserat杆理论和SE(3)上的累积参数化，实现了统一的运动学、静力学和动力学分析，并支持复杂结构和实时计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软体机器人建模方法存在局限性，如基于应变和构型的方法。本文旨在提供一种更通用的、具备几何局部控制能力、消除单位四元数约束的建模框架。

Method: 采用Cosserat杆理论，结合李群SE(3)上的累积参数化，推导出运动学、静力学和动力学的解析表达式，包括雅可比矩阵的递归计算和能量守恒积分器。框架可扩展至复合、分支、嵌套等复杂机器人结构。

Result: 该框架能够处理大变形杆、同心管机器人、并联机器人、线驱动机器人和关节手指等多种场景，展示了其有效性、通用性和计算效率。研究结果提高了建模的灵活性和数值性能。

Conclusion: 本文提出的李群框架为软体机器人提供了一种强大而通用的建模工具，能够克服现有方法的不足，支持复杂结构的设计与控制，并提升模拟的实时性和效率。

Abstract: This paper introduces a general Lie group framework for modeling continuum soft robots, employing Cosserat rod theory combined with cumulative parameterization on the Lie group SE(3). This novel approach addresses limitations present in current strain-based and configuration-based methods by providing geometric local control and eliminating unit quaternion constraints. The paper derives unified analytical expressions for kinematics, statics, and dynamics, including recursive Jacobian computations and an energy-conserving integrator suitable for real-time simulation and control. Additionally, the framework is extended to handle complex robotic structures, including segmented, branched, nested, and rigid-soft composite configurations, facilitating a modular and unified modeling strategy. The effectiveness, generality, and computational efficiency of the proposed methodology are demonstrated through various scenarios, including large-deformation rods, concentric tube robots, parallel robots, cable-driven robots, and articulated fingers. This work enhances modeling flexibility and numerical performance, providing an improved toolset for designing, simulating, and controlling soft robotic systems.

</details>


### [562] [FlowTouch: View-Invariant Visuo-Tactile Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08255)
*Seongjin Bien,Carlo Kneissl,Tobias Jülg,Frank Fundel,Thomas Ressler-Antal,Florian Walter,Björn Ommer,Gitta Kutyniok,Wolfram Burgard*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FlowTouch 提出了一种新颖的视图不变的视觉-触觉预测模型，它利用物体的局部 3D 网格来编码丰富信息，从而预测触觉模式，并能桥接仿真到真实世界的差距，泛化到新的传感器实例，并可用于后续的抓握稳定性预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的触觉传感器只能在接触物体时提供读数，这限制了它们在任务规划和初始执行阶段的应用。通过从视觉信息预测触觉信息，可以弥补这一差距。然而，现有的方法高度依赖于特定的设置和相机捕捉能力。

Method: FlowTouch 模型利用物体的局部 3D 网格来编码触觉信息，并抽象化场景细节。它整合了场景重建和基于 Flow Matching 的图像生成模型，实现了视图不变的预测。

Result: FlowTouch 能够成功桥接仿真到真实世界的差距，并泛化到新的传感器实例。生成的触觉图像可用于后续的抓握稳定性预测。

Conclusion: FlowTouch 提出了一种有效的视图不变的视觉-触觉预测方法，克服了现有方法的局限性，并为触觉感知和机器人控制开辟了新的可能性。

Abstract: Tactile sensation is essential for contact-rich manipulation tasks. It provides direct feedback on object geometry, surface properties, and interaction forces, enhancing perception and enabling fine-grained control. An inherent limitation of tactile sensors is that readings are available only when an object is touched. This precludes their use during planning and the initial execution phase of a task. Predicting tactile information from visual information can bridge this gap. A common approach is to learn a direct mapping from camera images to the output of vision-based tactile sensors. However, the resulting model will depend strongly on the specific setup and on how well the camera can capture the area where an object is touched. In this work, we introduce FlowTouch, a novel model for view-invariant visuo-tactile prediction. Our key idea is to use an object's local 3D mesh to encode rich information for predicting tactile patterns while abstracting away from scene-dependent details. FlowTouch integrates scene reconstruction and Flow Matching-based models for image generation. Our results show that FlowTouch is able to bridge the sim-to-real gap and generalize to new sensor instances. We further show that the resulting tactile images can be used for downstream grasp stability prediction. Our code, datasets and videos are available at https://flowtouch.github.io/

</details>


### [563] [Seed2Scale: A Self-Evolving Data Engine for Embodied AI via Small to Large Model Synergy and Multimodal Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08260)
*Cong Tai,Zhaoyu Zheng,Haixu Long,Hansheng Wu,Zhengbin Long,Haodong Xiang,Rong Shi,Zhuo Cui,Shizhuang Zhang,Gang Qiu,He Wang,Ruifeng Li,Biao Liu,Zhenzhe Sun,Tao Shen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Seed2Scale是一个自演进数据引擎，通过小模型收集、大模型评估和目标模型学习的异构协同，解决了现有数据生成方法的局限性，实现了通用具身AI的规模化开发。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据生成方法存在探索极限、具身鸿沟和低信噪比问题，导致自迭代过程中性能下降。为了克服这些挑战，需要一种新的数据生成方法。

Method: Seed2Scale利用一个轻量级的Vision-Language-Action模型（SuperTiny）作为数据收集器，并结合预训练的Vision-Language模型作为评估器（Verifer）来判断轨迹的成功/失败和质量评分。这种方法通过“小模型收集、大模型评估、目标模型学习”的异构协同来实现。

Result: Seed2Scale展现了显著的扩展潜力，目标模型的成功率随着迭代次数的增加呈稳健上升趋势，性能提升了131.2%。与现有数据增强方法相比，Seed2Scale表现更优。

Conclusion: Seed2Scale能够有效缓解模型崩溃，确保自演进过程的稳定性，并为通用具身AI的大规模开发提供了一条可扩展且经济高效的途径。

Abstract: Existing data generation methods suffer from exploration limits, embodiment gaps, and low signal-to-noise ratios, leading to performance degradation during self-iteration. To address these challenges, we propose Seed2Scale, a self-evolving data engine that overcomes the data bottleneck through a heterogeneous synergy of "small-model collection, large-model evaluation, and target-model learning". Starting with as few as four seed demonstrations, the engine employs the lightweight Vision-Language-Action model, SuperTiny, as a dedicated collector, leveraging its strong inductive bias for robust exploration in parallel environments. Concurrently, a pre-trained Vision-Language Model is integrated as a Verifer to autonomously perform success/failure judgment and quality scoring for the massive generated trajectories. Seed2Scale effectively mitigates model collapse, ensuring the stability of the self-evolution process. Experimental results demonstrate that Seed2Scale exhibits signifcant scaling potential: as iterations progress, the success rate of the target model shows a robust upward trend, achieving a performance improvement of 131.2%. Furthermore, Seed2Scale signifcantly outperforms existing data augmentation methods, providing a scalable and cost-effective pathway for the large-scale development of Generalist Embodied AI. Project page: https://terminators2025.github.io/Seed2Scale.github.io

</details>


### [564] [SAIL: Test-Time Scaling for In-Context Imitation Learning with VLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08269)
*Makoto Sato,Yusuke Iwasawa,Yujin Tang,So Kuroki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为SAIL的框架，通过迭代优化来改进机器人模仿学习中的单次轨迹生成，并证明了增加测试时间计算量可以提高成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的一发轨迹生成在环境变化下表现脆弱，需要更鲁棒的方法来提高机器人模仿学习的泛化能力。

Method: SAIL框架将机器人模仿学习视为一个迭代精炼问题，利用蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）来生成和优化轨迹。其核心组件包括：一个自动存档成功轨迹的机制、一个基于视觉语言模型的轨迹评估器，以及一个提供逐级反馈的评分机制，用于迭代精炼。

Result: 在六个模拟和真实世界的操纵任务中，SAIL在增加测试时间计算量后，成功率稳步提高，在复杂任务上最高可达95%。

Conclusion: 轨迹级别的测试时间计算量扩展是实现更通用机器人代理的一个有效途径，SAIL框架通过迭代优化显著提升了机器人模仿学习的性能和鲁棒性。

Abstract: In-context imitation learning allows robots to acquire skills from demonstrations, yet one-shot trajectory generation remains fragile under environmental variation. We propose SAIL, a framework that reframes robot imitation as an iterative refinement problem capable of scaling with test-time compute. SAIL utilizes Monte Carlo Tree Search, where each node is a complete trajectory and edges correspond to trajectory refinements. The process is guided by three core components: an automated archive of successful trajectories for contextually relevant retrieval, a vision language model-based scoring mechanism for trajectory evaluation, and a step-level feedback that provides trajectory-aligned scores for iterative refinement. Experiments across six diverse manipulation tasks in simulation and real-world validation clearly demonstrate that increasing test-time compute consistently improves success rates, achieving up to 95% on complex tasks. Our results suggest that trajectory-level test-time scaling is a robust path toward more generalizable robotic agents.

</details>


### [565] [Less is More: Robust Zero-Communication 3D Pursuit-Evasion via Representational Parsimony](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08273)
*Jialin Ying,Zhihao Li,Zicheng Dong,Guohua Wu,Yihuan Liao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为CGCA的通信无关的去中心化追踪协调方法，通过简化代理观测和贡献门控信用分配，提高了在通信延迟、部分可观测性和非完整性约束下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在通信延迟、部分可观测性和非完整性约束下，不对称的3D追逐-逃避任务具有挑战性。现有多智能体强化学习方法（MARL）依赖于丰富的代理间耦合或集中式信号，这在通信延迟或噪声时容易变得脆弱。研究动机是探究表示的简洁性是否能提高通信无关的协调能力。

Method: 文章基于一种继承的路径引导的去中心化追逐框架，提出了两种方法：（1）简洁的Actor观测接口，移除了团队耦合通道（从83维降至50维）；（2）贡献门控信用分配（CGCA），一种局部感知的信用结构，用于通信受阻情况下的协作。

Result: 在Stage-5评估中（4个追逐者 vs. 1个逃避者），所提出的方法达到了0.753 +/- 0.091的成功率和0.223 +/- 0.066的碰撞率，优于83维的全观测基线（0.721 +/- 0.071成功率，0.253 +/- 0.089碰撞率）。该方法在速度/偏航/噪声/延迟的压力测试下表现出优雅的性能下降，并在城市峡谷地图上实现了稳健的零样本迁移（密度为0.24时约61%的成功率）。

Conclusion: 研究结果支持了一种实用的范式转变：显式地切断冗余的跨代理通道可以抑制复合误差级联，提高在易延迟部署中的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Asymmetric 3D pursuit-evasion in cluttered voxel environments is difficult under communication latency, partial observability, and nonholonomic maneuver limits. While many MARL methods rely on richer inter-agent coupling or centralized signals, these dependencies can become fragility sources when communication is delayed or noisy. Building on an inherited path-guided decentralized pursuit scaffold, we study a robustness-oriented question: can representational parsimony improve communication-free coordination? We instantiate this principle with (i) a parsimonious actor observation interface that removes team-coupled channels (83-D to 50-D), and (ii) Contribution-Gated Credit Assignment (CGCA), a locality-aware credit structure for communication-denied cooperation. In Stage-5 evaluation (4 pursuers vs. 1 evader), our configuration reaches 0.753 +/- 0.091 success and 0.223 +/- 0.066 collision, outperforming the 83-D FULL OBS counterpart (0.721 +/- 0.071, 0.253 +/- 0.089). It further shows graceful degradation under speed/yaw/noise/delay stress tests and resilient zero-shot transfer on urban-canyon maps (about 61% success at density 0.24). These results support a practical paradigm shift: explicitly severing redundant cross-agent channels can suppress compounding error cascades and improve robustness in latency-prone deployment.

</details>


### [566] [Hierarchical Multi-Modal Planning for Fixed-Altitude Sparse Target Search and Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08336)
*Lingpeng Chen,Yuchen Zheng,Apple Pui-Yi Chui,Junfeng Wu,Ziyang Hong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为 HIMoS 的分层信息多模态搜索框架，用于高效搜索和采样稀疏的珊瑚礁，通过结合全局和局部规划以及多传感器，提高了任务效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的详尽覆盖策略对于监控稀疏的海底现象（如珊瑚）效率低下，而现有的自适应采样方法则需要代价高昂的垂直机动。

Method: 提出了一种名为 HIMoS (Hierarchical Informative Multi-Modal Search) 的固定高度框架。该系统集成了异构传感器套件，并采用两层规划架构：全局规划器优化拓扑路线以最大化潜在发现；局部规划器利用可微分信念传播生成考虑声学探索、视觉搜索和近距离采样之间权衡的运动轨迹。

Result: 在基于真实珊瑚礁调查的高保真模拟中验证，HIMoS 在任务效率方面优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: HIMoS 框架有效解决了在水下航行器上监控稀疏珊瑚礁的挑战，通过多模态传感器和分层规划提高了任务效率。

Abstract: Efficient monitoring of sparse benthic phenomena, such as coral colonies, presents a great challenge for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles. Traditional exhaustive coverage strategies are energy-inefficient, while recent adaptive sampling approaches rely on costly vertical maneuvers. To address these limitations, we propose HIMoS (Hierarchical Informative Multi-Modal Search), a fixed-altitude framework for sparse coral search-and-sample missions. The system integrates a heterogeneous sensor suite within a two-layer planning architecture. At the strategic level, a Global Planner optimizes topological routes to maximize potential discovery. At the tactical level, a receding-horizon Local Planner leverages differentiable belief propagation to generate kinematically feasible trajectories that balance acoustic substrate exploration, visual coral search, and close-range sampling. Validated in high-fidelity simulations derived from real-world coral reef benthic surveys, our approach demonstrates superior mission efficiency compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [567] [EndoSERV: A Vision-based Endoluminal Robot Navigation System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08324)
*Junyang Wu,Fangfang Xie,Minghui Zhang,Hanxiao Zhang,Jiayuan Sun,Yun Gu,Guang-Zhong Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为EndoSERV的新型机器人辅助内腔手术导航方法，通过分割到结构和真实到虚拟映射，解决了内腔导航中因组织变形和缺乏明显地标导致的定位误差问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 内腔解剖结构的复杂性（狭窄、曲折）给机器人导航带来巨大挑战，现有基于视觉的定位方法因组织变形、体内伪影和缺乏明显地标而易出错。

Method: EndoSERV方法包含两个主要部分：1) 分割到结构（Segment-to-structure）：将复杂结构划分为小段，独立估计里程计；2) 真实到虚拟映射（Real-to-Virtual mapping）：利用迁移技术将真实图像特征映射到虚拟域，以利用虚拟姿态的真实标签。训练过程包括离线预训练（提取纹理无关特征）和在线适应（适应真实世界条件）。

Result: 在公共和临床数据集上的广泛实验表明，即使没有真实的姿态标签，EndoSERV方法也能有效地进行导航。

Conclusion: EndoSERV是一种有效的机器人辅助内腔手术定位方法，通过解决组织变形和标签不足的问题，提高了在复杂内腔环境下的导航精度。

Abstract: Robot-assisted endoluminal procedures are increasingly used for early cancer intervention. However, the intricate, narrow and tortuous pathways within the luminal anatomy pose substantial difficulties for robot navigation. Vision-based navigation offers a promising solution, but existing localization approaches are error-prone due to tissue deformation, in vivo artifacts and a lack of distinctive landmarks for consistent localization. This paper presents a novel EndoSERV localization method to address these challenges. It includes two main parts, \textit{i.e.}, \textbf{SE}gment-to-structure and \textbf{R}eal-to-\textbf{V}irtual mapping, and hence the name. For long-range and complex luminal structures, we divide them into smaller sub-segments and estimate the odometry independently. To cater for label insufficiency, an efficient transfer technique maps real image features to the virtual domain to use virtual pose ground truth. The training phases of EndoSERV include an offline pretraining to extract texture-agnostic features, and an online phase that adapts to real-world conditions. Extensive experiments based on both public and clinical datasets have been performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method even without any real pose labels.

</details>


### [568] [PhaForce: Phase-Scheduled Visual-Force Policy Learning with Slow Planning and Fast Correction for Contact-Rich Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08342)
*Mingxin Wang,Zhirun Yue,Renhao Lu,Yizhe Li,Zihan Wang,Guoping Pan,Kangkang Dong,Jun Cheng,Yi Cheng,Houde Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为PhaForce的阶段性视觉-力控制策略，通过协调低速率规划和高速度校正，实现了对接触丰富操作的精准控制，显著提高了成功率和操作质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的生成式视觉-力控制策略受限于低频更新和推理延迟，无法充分利用力/力矩信息进行高速反馈。现有的一些力感知方法也缺乏显式的力调度机制，无法区分任务阶段并适当地施加力。

Method: PhaForce策略包含三个主要部分：（1）接触感知阶段预测器（CAP），用于估计接触概率和阶段置信度；（2）慢速扩散规划器，通过双门控视觉-力融合和正交残差注入来融合视觉和力信息，同时保留视觉语义；（3）快速校正器，以控制速率将阶段导向的残差应用于可解释的校正子空间，实现块内的微调。

Result: 在多个机器人接触丰富任务上，PhaForce取得了86%的平均成功率（比基线高40个百分点），并显著提高了操作质量，通过调节交互力来控制接触力，同时表现出对未见过的几何变化的鲁棒适应性。

Conclusion: PhaForce是一种有效的阶段性视觉-力策略，能够克服现有方法的局限性，通过整合低速率和高速度控制，以及显式的阶段调度，在接触丰富操作中实现了更高的成功率和更好的接触质量。

Abstract: Contact-rich manipulation requires not only vision-dominant task semantics but also closed-loop reactions to force/torque (F/T) transients. Yet, generative visuomotor policies are typically constrained to low-frequency updates due to inference latency and action chunking, underutilizing F/T for control-rate feedback. Furthermore, existing force-aware methods often inject force continuously and indiscriminately, lacking an explicit mechanism to schedule when / how much / where to apply force across different task phases. We propose PhaForce, a phase-scheduled visual--force policy that coordinates low-rate chunk-level planning and high-rate residual correction via a unified contact/phase schedule. PhaForce comprises (i) a contact-aware phase predictor (CAP) that estimates contact probability and phase belief, (ii) a Slow diffusion planner that performs dual-gated visual--force fusion with orthogonal residual injection to preserve vision semantics while conditioning on force, and (iii) a Fast corrector that applies control-rate phase-routed residuals in interpretable corrective subspaces for within-chunk micro-adjustments. Across multiple real-robot contact-rich tasks, PhaForce achieves an average success rate of 86% (+40 pp over baselines), while also substantially improving contact quality by regulating interaction forces and exhibiting robust adaptability to OOD geometric shifts.

</details>


### [569] [Perception-Aware Communication-Free Multi-UAV Coordination in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08379)
*Manuel Boldrer,Michal Kamler,Afzal Ahmad,Martin Saska*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种在GNSS不可用（如森林）的复杂环境中，无需通信的多机器人安全协同导航方法，利用3D LiDAR进行SLAM、障碍物和机器人检测，并结合了感知感知的3D导航框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在GNSS信号不可用的复杂环境中（如森林），实现多机器人的安全协同导航的挑战。

Method: 使用车载各向异性3D LiDAR传感器进行SLAM、障碍物检测和邻近机器人检测。开发了一个感知感知的3D导航框架，以应对有限的传感器视场。

Result: 通过广泛的模拟和真实世界田野实验进行了评估，证明了该方法在复杂环境下的可扩展性、鲁棒性和可靠性。

Conclusion: 该通信自由的方法能够实现多机器人在GNSS不可用的复杂环境中安全高效地协同导航。

Abstract: We present a communication-free method for safe multi-robot coordination in complex environments such as forests with dense canopy cover, where GNSS is unavailable. Our approach relies on an onboard anisotropic 3D LiDAR sensor used for SLAM as well as for detecting obstacles and neighboring robots. We develop a novel perception-aware 3D navigation framework that enables robots to safely and effectively progress toward a goal region despite limited sensor field-of-view. The approach is evaluated through extensive simulations across diverse scenarios and validated in real-world field experiments, demonstrating its scalability, robustness, and reliability.

</details>


### [570] [MoMaStage: Skill-State Graph Guided Planning and Closed-Loop Execution for Long-Horizon Indoor Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08383)
*Chenxu Li,Zixuan Chen,Yetao Li,Jiapeng Xu,Hongyu Ding,Jieqi Shi,Jing Huo,Yang Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为 MoMaStage 的结构化视觉-语言框架，用于解决室内移动操作中的长时序执行挑战，通过结合视觉语言模型、分层技能库和技能-状态图，实现了逻辑一致且拓扑有效的规划，并通过闭环执行机制增强了鲁棒性，在模拟和真实环境中均取得了优于现有方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有室内移动操作（MoMA）方法在长时序执行方面存在挑战，易出现级联错误且泛化能力有限。基于学习的方法难以在长时序下保持逻辑一致性，而依赖显式场景表示的方法则限制了对动态环境的适应性。

Method: MoMaStage 框架将视觉语言模型（VLM）与分层技能库和拓扑感知的技能-状态图相结合，通过约束任务分解和技能组合在可行的过渡空间内，确保规划的逻辑一致性和拓扑有效性。此外，还引入了闭环执行机制，通过监控本体感觉反馈并在检测到偏差时触发受图约束的语义重规划，以保持规划技能与物理结果的一致性。

Result: 在物理模拟和真实环境中进行的广泛实验表明，MoMaStage 在规划成功率、降低 token 开销以及提高长时序移动操作的整体任务成功率方面，均显著优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: MoMaStage 框架通过结构化地将视觉语言模型与技能库和状态图相结合，并辅以闭环执行机制，有效地解决了长时序室内移动操作中的挑战，提高了任务的成功率和鲁棒性，无需显式场景映射。

Abstract: Indoor mobile manipulation (MoMA) enables robots to translate natural language instructions into physical actions, yet long-horizon execution remains challenging due to cascading errors and limited generalization across diverse environments. Learning-based approaches often fail to maintain logical consistency over extended horizons, while methods relying on explicit scene representations impose rigid structural assumptions that reduce adaptability in dynamic settings. To address these limitations, we propose MoMaStage, a structured vision-language framework for long-horizon MoMA that eliminates the need for explicit scene mapping. MoMaStage grounds a Vision-Language Model (VLM) within a Hierarchical Skill Library and a topology-aware Skill-State Graph, constraining task decomposition and skill composition within a feasible transition space. This structured grounding ensures that generated plans remain logically consistent and topologically valid with respect to the agent's evolving physical state. To enhance robustness, MoMaStage incorporates a closed-loop execution mechanism that monitors proprioceptive feedback and triggers graph-constrained semantic replanning when deviations are detected, maintaining alignment between planned skills and physical outcomes. Extensive experiments in physics-rich simulations and real-world environments demonstrate that MoMaStage outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving substantially higher planning success, reducing token overhead, and significantly improving overall task success rates in long-horizon mobile manipulation. Video demonstrations are available on the project website: https://chenxuli-cxli.github.io/MoMaStage/.

</details>


### [571] [Human-Aware Robot Behaviour in Self-Driving Labs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08420)
*Satheeshkumar Veeramani,Anna Kisil,Abigail Bentley,Hatem Fakhruldeen,Gabriella Pizzuto,Andrew I. Cooper*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种基于AI的感知方法，用于提高自主实验室中人类和机器人化学家之间的协作效率，通过预测人类意图来减少机器人等待时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前移动机器人化学家（MRCs）依赖于简单的障碍物检测，导致在与人类共享设备时效率低下，需要机器人被动等待，从而造成不必要的延迟。

Method: 提出了一种分层的、由AI驱动的具身感知方法，该方法能够预测人类的意图，区分是准备性等待还是短暂的设备使用，从而实现主动的人机交互。

Result: 该方法能够区分人类的不同行为，从而实现更主动的人机交互，提高协调效率，并有望提升自主科学实验室的整体效率。

Conclusion: 该研究展示了一种能够提升自主科学实验室人机协作效率的AI驱动感知方法，通过预测人类意图，减少了机器人不必要的等待，优化了工作流程。

Abstract: Self-driving laboratories (SDLs) are rapidly transforming research in chemistry and materials science to accelerate new discoveries. Mobile robot chemists (MRCs) play a pivotal role by autonomously navigating the lab to transport samples, effectively connecting synthesis, analysis, and characterisation equipment. The instruments within an SDL are typically designed or retrofitted to be accessed by both human and robotic chemists, ensuring operational flexibility and integration between manual and automated workflows. In many scenarios, human and robotic chemists may need to use the same equipment simultaneously. Currently, MRCs rely on simple LiDAR-based obstruction detection, which forces the robot to passively wait if a human is present. This lack of situational awareness leads to unnecessary delays and inefficient coordination in time-critical automated workflows in human-robot shared labs. To address this, we present an initial study of an embodied, AI-driven perception method that facilitates proactive human-robot interaction in shared-access scenarios. Our method features a hierarchical human intention prediction model that allows the robot to distinguish between preparatory actions (waiting) and transient interactions (accessing the instrument). Our results demonstrate that the proposed approach enhances efficiency by enabling proactive human-robot interaction, streamlining coordination, and potentially increasing the efficiency of autonomous scientific labs.

</details>


### [572] [StructBiHOI: Structured Articulation Modeling for Long--Horizon Bimanual Hand--Object Interaction Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08390)
*Zhi Wang,Liu Liu,Ruonan Liu,Dan Guo,Meng Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了StructBiHOI框架，用于解决长期双手机械臂与物体交互（HOI）生成中的挑战，通过解耦长期规划和帧级精炼，并引入基于Mamba的状态空间扩散模型，实现了更稳定、逼真且高效的生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D HOI生成方法主要集中于单手抓取，而双手机械臂操作更具挑战性，包括长期规划不稳定性、精细的关节协调以及跨手间的复杂配合，尤其是在多模态条件下，难以同时保证时间一致性、物理合理性和语义对齐。

Method: 提出StructBiHOI框架，核心思想是将长期联合规划与帧级操作精炼解耦。使用jointVAE对基于物体几何和任务语义的长期联合演化进行建模，然后使用maniVAE进行单帧级别的精细手部姿态精炼。为了实现稳定高效的长序列生成，引入了基于Mamba的状态空间扩散去噪器，该模型以线性复杂度捕捉长距离依赖关系。

Result: 在双手机械臂操作和单手抓取基准测试中，StructBiHOI实现了优于现有方法的长期稳定性、运动逼真性和计算效率。

Conclusion: StructBiHOI通过分层设计，成功地促进了双手的协同以及关节式物体交互，为解决长期双手机械臂HOI生成问题提供了一种有效且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent progress in 3D hand--object interaction (HOI) generation has primarily focused on single--hand grasp synthesis, while bimanual manipulation remains significantly more challenging. Long--horizon planning instability, fine--grained joint articulation, and complex cross--hand coordination make coherent bimanual generation difficult, especially under multimodal conditions. Existing approaches often struggle to simultaneously ensure temporal consistency, physical plausibility, and semantic alignment over extended sequences. We propose StructBiHOI, a Structured articulation modeling framework for long-horizon Bimanual HOI generation. Our key insight is to structurally disentangle temporal joint planning from frame--level manipulation refinement. Specifically, a jointVAE models long-term joint evolution conditioned on object geometry and task semantics, while a maniVAE refines fine-grained hand poses at the single--frame level. To enable stable and efficient long--sequence generation, we incorporate a state--space--inspired diffusion denoiser based on Mamba, which models long--range dependencies with linear complexity. This hierarchical design facilitates coherent dual-hand coordination and articulated object interaction. Extensive experiments on bimanual manipulation and single-hand grasping benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves superior long--horizon stability, motion realism, and computational efficiency compared to strong baselines.

</details>


### [573] [FoMo: A Multi-Season Dataset for Robot Navigation in Forêt Montmorency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08433)
*Matěj Boxan,Gabriel Jeanson,Alexander Krawciw,Effie Daum,Xinyuan Qiao,Sven Lilge,Timothy D. Barfoot,François Pomerleau*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Forêt Montmorency (FoMo) 是一个全面的多季节数据集，包含在北方森林中一年内收集的各种传感器数据（激光雷达、雷达、相机、IMU），并伴有高精度 GNSS 真值。该数据集具有独特的雪、植被生长和牵引限制等挑战性环境，旨在评估和改进机器人定位与建图（SLAM）技术在季节性变化下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大部分数据集并未充分考虑季节性环境变化对机器人定位与建图（SLAM）算法鲁棒性的影响。研究人员希望通过创建一个包含多样化传感器数据和具有挑战性的季节性特征（如大雪、植被生长）的数据集，来促进和推动对更鲁棒 SLAM 算法的开发。

Method: 在魁北克省的 Forêt Montmorency（FoMo）地区，使用配备了多种传感器（旋转激光雷达、固态激光雷达、FMCW 雷达、立体相机、单目相机、IMU）的无人地面车辆（UGV），在一年内收集了 64 公里以上的六种不同轨迹的数据。真值通过后处理三个 UGV 上的 GNSS 接收器和一个静态基站的 GNSS 数据获得。此外，还收集了气象站数据、相机内参和车辆功耗等元数据。通过对激光雷达-惯性、雷达-陀螺仪和视觉-惯性方法进行初步评估，以展示数据集的价值。

Result: 初步评估表明，季节性变化（如大雪和植被生长）对现有最先进的 SLAM 方法的重定位能力产生了严重影响。这凸显了在真实世界复杂和动态环境中开发更鲁棒定位算法的必要性。

Conclusion: Forêt Montmorency (FoMo) 数据集提供了一个独特的、跨越多个季节的环境，包含多种传感器数据和具有挑战性的自然条件，能够有效评估和提升机器人定位与建图算法在季节性变化下的鲁棒性。该数据集已公开，以促进相关领域的研究。

Abstract: The Forêt Montmorency (FoMo) dataset is a comprehensive multi-season data collection, recorded over the span of one year in a boreal forest. Featuring a unique combination of on- and off-pavement environments with significant environmental changes, the dataset challenges established odometry and SLAM pipelines. Some highlights of the data include the accumulation of snow exceeding 1 m, significant vegetation growth in front of sensors, and operations at the traction limits of the platform. In total, the FoMo dataset includes over 64 km of six diverse trajectories, repeated during 12 deployments throughout the year. The dataset features data from one rotating and one hybrid solid-state lidar, a Frequency Modulated Continuous Wave (FMCW) radar, full-HD images from a stereo camera and a wide lens monocular camera, as well as data from two IMUs. Ground Truth is calculated by post-processing three GNSS receivers mounted on the Uncrewed Ground Vehicle (UGV) and a static GNSS base station. Additional metadata, such as one measurement per minute from an on-site weather station, camera calibration intrinsics, and vehicle power consumption, is available for all sequences. To highlight the relevance of the dataset, we performed a preliminary evaluation of the robustness of a lidar-inertial, radar-gyro, and a visual-inertial localization and mapping techniques to seasonal changes. We show that seasonal changes have serious effects on the re-localization capabilities of the state-of-the-art methods. The dataset and development kit are available at https://fomo.norlab.ulaval.ca.

</details>


### [574] [Tactile Recognition of Both Shapes and Materials with Automatic Feature Optimization-Enabled Meta Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08423)
*Hongliang Zhao,Wenhui Yang,Yang Chen,Zhuorui Wang,Baiheng Liu,Longhui Qin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种自动特征优化原型网络（AFOP-ML）用于触觉感知元学习，能够快速适应新类别，并自动优化特征空间，显著提升了少样本学习的准确性和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器人操作中，触觉感知至关重要，尤其是在接触丰富的场景下。然而，深度学习方法在实际应用中面临训练数据稀缺和学习过程耗时的问题，因为收集大量触觉数据成本高昂且有时不可能。

Method: 提出了一种名为AFOP-ML的自动特征优化原型网络。该网络采用“学会学习”的元学习范式，能够快速适应新的、未见过的数据类别（少样本学习），并能自动确定最优特征空间。实验基于从触觉手指获取的四通道信号。

Result: 在36类别基准测试中，AFOP-ML在5路1样本（5-way-1-shot）场景下达到了96.08%的准确率，优于现有方法。在更具挑战性的36路1样本（36-way-1-shot）场景下，准确率仍保持在88.7%。该方法通过涉及未见过形状、材料以及力和速度扰动的实验，验证了其泛化能力。

Conclusion: AFOP-ML框架有效地实现了触觉感知的元学习，能够以极少的样本快速适应新任务，并自动优化特征空间，从而显著提高了识别准确性和泛化能力。该研究还为识别任务和触觉传感器设计提供了新的见解。

Abstract: Tactile perception is indispensable for robots to implement various manipulations dexterously, especially in contact-rich scenarios. However, alongside the development of deep learning techniques, it meanwhile suffers from training data scarcity and a time-consuming learning process in practical applications since the collection of a large amount of tactile data is costly and sometimes even impossible. Hence, we propose an automatic feature optimization-enabled prototypical network to realize meta-learning, i.e., AFOP-ML framework. As a ``learn to learn" network, it not only adapts to new unseen classes rapidly with few-shot, but also learns how to determine the optimal feature space automatically. Based on the four-channel signals acquired from a tactile finger, both shapes and materials are recognized. On a 36-category benchmark, it outperforms several existing approaches by attaining an accuracy of 96.08% in 5-way-1-shot scenario, where only 1 example is available for training. It still remains 88.7% in the extreme 36-way-1-shot case. The generalization ability is further validated through three groups of experiment involving unseen shapes, materials and force/speed perturbations. More insights are additionally provided by this work for the interpretation of recognition tasks and improved design of tactile sensors.

</details>


### [575] [R2F: Repurposing Ray Frontiers for LLM-free Object Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08475)
*Francesco Argenziano,John Mark Alexis Marcelo,Michele Brienza,Abdel Hakim Drid,Emanuele Musumeci,Daniele Nardi,Domenico D. Bloisi,Vincenzo Suriani*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种名为 R2F-VLN 的无 LLM 框架，用于零样本开放词汇室内导航，通过将射线视作方向条件语义假设，将导航简化为嵌入式边界评分和目标跟踪，实现了实时执行和有竞争力的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于 VLM/LLM 的开放词汇导航系统存在推理时多次查询大模型带来的延迟和计算开销问题，限制了实时部署。

Method: 将射线边界（R2F）重新用于构建一个无 LLM 的框架。射线边界被解释为方向条件的语义假设，作为导航目标。通过将语言对齐特征沿着超出范围的射线稀疏存储在边界区域，并利用嵌入式边界评分和目标跟踪来完成导航。R2F-VLN 进一步通过句法解析和关系验证来支持自由形式的语言指令。

Result: 在 Habitat-sim 和真实机器人平台上，R2F-VLN 实现了具有竞争力的零样本性能，并且运行时速度比基于 VLM 的方法快 6 倍，实现了实时执行。

Conclusion: 所提出的 R2F-VLN 框架能够实现高效、实时的零样本开放词汇室内导航，克服了现有方法的延迟和计算开销问题，并达到了与最先进方法相当的性能。

Abstract: Zero-shot open-vocabulary object navigation has progressed rapidly with the emergence of large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and Large Language Models (LLMs), now widely used as high-level decision-makers instead of end-to-end policies. Although effective, such systems often rely on iterative large-model queries at inference time, introducing latency and computational overhead that limit real-time deployment. To address this problem, we repurpose ray frontiers (R2F), a recently proposed frontier-based exploration paradigm, to develop an LLM-free framework for indoor open-vocabulary object navigation. While ray frontiers were originally used to bias exploration using semantic cues carried along rays, we reinterpret frontier regions as explicit, direction-conditioned semantic hypotheses that serve as navigation goals. Language-aligned features accumulated along out-of-range rays are stored sparsely at frontiers, where each region maintains multiple directional embeddings encoding plausible unseen content. In this way, navigation then reduces to embedding-based frontier scoring and goal tracking within a classical mapping and planning pipeline, eliminating iterative large-model reasoning. We further introduce R2F-VLN, a lightweight extension for free-form language instructions using syntactic parsing and relational verification without additional VLM or LLM components. Experiments in Habitat-sim and on a real robotic platform demonstrate competitive state-of-the-art zero-shot performance with real-time execution, achieving up to 6 times faster runtime than VLM-based alternatives.

</details>


### [576] [LAR-MoE: Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts in Robotic Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08476)
*Ariel Rodriguez,Chenpan Li,Lorenzo Mazza,Rayan Younis,Ortrun Hellig,Sebastian Bodenstedt,Martin Wagner,Stefanie Speidel*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为LAR-MoE的两阶段框架，用于在具有异构动力学的多任务模仿学习中，通过解耦无监督技能发现和策略学习来解决现有模型平均化行为模式的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模仿学习方法在处理具有异构动力学的多任务时面临挑战，模型倾向于平均化演示中的不同行为模式。现有的Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)架构需要有意义的技能分解才能进行专家路由，而这通常难以获得。

Method: LAR-MoE是一个两阶段框架。第一阶段（预训练）通过师生联合训练学习观察和未来动作之间的联合潜在表示。第二阶段（后训练）正则化专家路由以跟随学习到的潜在空间的结构，从而防止专家崩溃并保持参数效率。

Result: 在LIBERO基准测试中，LAR-MoE达到了95.2%的平均成功率，仅使用1.5亿参数。在手术肠道抓取和牵拉任务中，LAR-MoE与有监督MoE基线相当，且无需任何阶段标注，并能零样本迁移到离体猪组织。

Conclusion: 潜在对齐路由（LAR-MoE）提供了一种原则性的替代有监督技能分解的方法，能够从无标签的演示中实现结构化的专家专业化，从而更有效地处理多任务模仿学习中的异构动力学问题。

Abstract: Imitation learning enables robots to acquire manipulation skills from demonstrations, yet deploying a policy across tasks with heterogeneous dynamics remains challenging, as models tend to average over distinct behavioral modes present in the demonstrations. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures address this by activating specialized subnetworks, but requires meaningful skill decompositions for expert routing. We introduce Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts (LAR-MoE), a two-stage framework that decouples unsupervised skill discovery from policy learning.
