In pre-training, we learn a joint latent representation between observations and future actions through student-teacher co-training. In a post-training stage, the expert routing is regularized to follow the structure of the learned latent space, preventing expert collapse while maintaining parameter efficiency. We evaluate LAR-MoE in simulation and on hardware. On the LIBERO benchmark, our method achieves a 95.2% average success rate with 150M parameters. On a surgical bowel grasping and retraction task, LAR-MoE matches a supervised MoE baseline without requiring any phase annotations, and transfers zero-shot to ex vivo porcine tissue. Our findings suggest that latent-aligned routing provides a principled alternative to supervised skill decomposition, enabling structured expert specialization from unlabeled demonstrations.

</details>


### [577] [STRIDE: Structured Lagrangian and Stochastic Residual Dynamics via Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08478)
*Prakrut Kotecha,Ganga Nair B,Shishir Kolathaya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为STRIDE的动力学学习框架，该框架将保守的刚体力学与不确定的非保守相互作用效应分离，使用拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）建模结构化部分，使用条件流匹配（CFM）建模残差相互作用力，从而在保留物理结构的同时捕捉复杂随机行为，并在机器人控制中实现更可靠的模型预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在非结构化环境中运行的机器人系统面临来自间歇性接触、摩擦变异和未建模顺应性等显著的不确定性。尽管无模型方法表现出色，但在许多场景下仍需要能够支持规划、约束处理和在线适应的预测模型。然而，传统的解析刚体模型往往无法捕捉复杂的相互作用效应，而纯数据驱动模型可能违反物理一致性、存在数据偏差并累积长期漂移。

Method: 提出STRIDE框架，该框架将保守的刚体动力学与不确定的、有效地随机的非保守相互作用效应进行显式分离。保守部分使用拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）建模，以保持能量一致性。残差相互作用力使用条件流匹配（CFM）建模，以捕捉多模态相互作用现象。两个组件联合端到端训练。

Result: 在不同复杂度的系统（包括单摆、Unitree Go1 四足机器人和 Unitree G1 人形机器人）上进行了评估。结果显示，与确定性残差基线相比，STRIDE 将长期预测误差降低了 20%，接触力预测误差降低了 30%。

Conclusion: STRIDE 框架能够保留物理结构，同时有效地表示复杂且不确定的随机相互作用，从而在存在不确定性的机器人环境中实现更可靠的基于模型的控制。

Abstract: Robotic systems operating in unstructured environments must operate under significant uncertainty arising from intermittent contacts, frictional variability, and unmodeled compliance. While recent model-free approaches have demonstrated impressive performance, many deployment settings still require predictive models that support planning, constraint handling, and online adaptation. Analytical rigid-body models provide strong physical structure but often fail to capture complex interaction effects, whereas purely data-driven models may violate physical consistency, exhibit data bias, and accumulate long-horizon drift. In this work, we propose STRIDE, a dynamics learning framework that explicitly separates conservative rigid-body mechanics from uncertain, effectively stochastic non-conservative interaction effects. The structured component is modeled using a Lagrangian Neural Network (LNN) to preserve energy-consistent inertial dynamics, while residual interaction forces are represented using Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) to capture multi-modal interaction phenomena. The two components are trained jointly end-to-end, enabling the model to retain physical structure while representing complex stochastic behavior. We evaluate STRIDE on systems of increasing complexity, including a pendulum, the Unitree Go1 quadruped, and the Unitree G1 humanoid. Results show 20% reduction in long-horizon prediction error and 30% reduction in contact force prediction error compared to deterministic residual baselines, supporting more reliable model-based control in uncertain robotic environments.

</details>


### [578] [3PoinTr: 3D Point Tracks for Robot Manipulation Pretraining from Casual Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08485)
*Adam Hung,Bardienus Pieter Duisterhof,Jeffrey Ichnowski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 3PoinTr 是一种利用 Transformer 架构预训练机器人策略的方法，它能从随意、无约束的人类视频中学习，并能显著减少对机器人演示的需求，从而提高鲁棒性和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人策略的训练需要大量演示才能实现鲁棒性，这在许多实际应用中是不可行的。直接从人类视频中学习是一个有前景的替代方案，可以降低遥操作成本，但需要克服“具身差距”，这通常需要限制或精心编排的人类动作。

Method: 3PoinTr 使用 Transformer 架构预测 3D 点轨迹作为中间的、与具身无关的表示。该方法利用 Perceiver IO 架构提取紧凑表示，以实现样本高效的行为克隆。即使点轨迹违反下游特定于具身的约束，也能有效学习。

Result: 3PoinTr 在模拟和现实世界的任务中表现出鲁棒的空间泛化能力，仅需 20 个带有动作标签的机器人演示。与行为克隆方法及先前的人类视频预训练方法相比，3PoinTr 表现更优。3PoinTr 预测的 3D 点轨迹也比现有方法更准确、质量更高。

Conclusion: 3PoinTr 是一种有效的方法，可以从随意的人类视频中学习机器人策略，克服了具身差距的挑战，并显著提高了数据效率和策略的鲁棒性，使其成为在实际场景中实现自动化的一种有前途的途径。

Abstract: Data-efficient training of robust robot policies is the key to unlocking automation in a wide array of novel tasks. Current systems require large volumes of demonstrations to achieve robustness, which is impractical in many applications. Learning policies directly from human videos is a promising alternative that removes teleoperation costs, but it shifts the challenge toward overcoming the embodiment gap (differences in kinematics and strategies between robots and humans), often requiring restrictive and carefully choreographed human motions. We propose 3PoinTr, a method for pretraining robot policies from casual and unconstrained human videos, enabling learning from motions natural for humans. 3PoinTr uses a transformer architecture to predict 3D point tracks as an intermediate embodiment-agnostic representation. 3D point tracks encode goal specifications, scene geometry, and spatiotemporal relationships. We use a Perceiver IO architecture to extract a compact representation for sample-efficient behavior cloning, even when point tracks violate downstream embodiment-specific constraints. We conduct thorough evaluation on simulated and real-world tasks, and find that 3PoinTr achieves robust spatial generalization on diverse categories of manipulation tasks with only 20 action-labeled robot demonstrations. 3PoinTr outperforms the baselines, including behavior cloning methods, as well as prior methods for pretraining from human videos. We also provide evaluations of 3PoinTr's 3D point track predictions compared to an existing point track prediction baseline. We find that 3PoinTr produces more accurate and higher quality point tracks due to a lightweight yet expressive architecture built on a single transformer, in addition to a training formulation that preserves supervision of partially occluded points. Project page: https://adamhung60.github.io/3PoinTr/.

</details>


### [579] [An Open-Source Robotics Research Platform for Autonomous Laparoscopic Surgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08490)
*Ariel Rodriguez,Lorenzo Mazza,Martin Lelis,Rayan Younis,Sebastian Bodenstedt,Martin Wagner,Stefanie Speidel*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种机器人无关的远程运动中心（RCM）控制器，用于机器人辅助手术，它使用封闭形式的解析速度求解器来确定性地强制执行三通管约束，从而提高了状态空间一致性，并成功应用于 UR5e 和 Franka Emika Panda 机械臂。该系统支持远程操作、演示记录和学习策略的部署，并在各种手术场景中进行了验证，其精度和鲁棒性均达到了要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的机器人辅助手术研究平台（主要基于 da Vinci Research Kit）存在线驱动的机械限制，导致状态空间不一致，阻碍了可靠自主策略的训练。需要一种更可靠、更精确且不受机械限制的平台。

Method: 开发了一个开源、机器人无关的 RCM 控制器，基于封闭形式的解析速度求解器，在笛卡尔空间中操作，以确定性方式强制执行三通管约束，无需迭代优化。提供了 UR5e 和 Franka Emika Panda 机械臂的实现，并集成了立体 3D 感知。将机器人控制集成到基于 ROS 的全栈手术机器人平台中，支持远程操作、演示记录和解耦的服务器-客户端架构。

Result: 该系统在体模、离体和体内猪腹腔手术的肠道抓取和牵拉任务中得到了验证。RCM 偏差在所有条件下均保持在亚毫米级别。轨迹平滑度指标（SPARC、LDLJ）与 da Vinci 系统上的专家演示相当。

Conclusion: 该平台提供了在现实手术场景中进行远程操作、数据收集和自主策略部署所需的精度和鲁棒性，解决了现有研究平台的局限性。

Abstract: Autonomous robot-assisted surgery demands reliable, high-precision platforms that strictly adhere to the safety and kinematic constraints of minimally invasive procedures. Existing research platforms, primarily based on the da Vinci Research Kit, suffer from cable-driven mechanical limitations that degrade state-space consistency and hinder the downstream training of reliable autonomous policies. We present an open-source, robot-agnostic Remote Center of Motion (RCM) controller based on a closed-form analytical velocity solver that enforces the trocar constraint deterministically without iterative optimization. The controller operates in Cartesian space, enabling any industrial manipulator to function as a surgical robot. We provide implementations for the UR5e and Franka Emika Panda manipulators, and integrate stereoscopic 3D perception. We integrate the robot control into a full-stack ROS-based surgical robotics platform supporting teleoperation, demonstration recording, and deployment of learned policies via a decoupled server-client architecture. We validate the system on a bowel grasping and retraction task across phantom, ex vivo, and in vivo porcine laparoscopic procedures. RCM deviations remain sub-millimeter across all conditions, and trajectory smoothness metrics (SPARC, LDLJ) are comparable to expert demonstrations from the JIGSAWS benchmark recorded on the da Vinci system. These results demonstrate that the platform provides the precision and robustness required for teleoperation, data collection and autonomous policy deployment in realistic surgical scenarios.

</details>


### [580] [Rethinking the semantic classification of indoor places by mobile robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08512)
*Oscar Martinez Mozos,Alejandra C. Hernandez,Clara Gomez,Ramon Barber*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种新的范式，允许语义分类器在房间内部产生混淆标签，以提高服务机器人在搜索物体任务中的适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有服务机器人语义理解方法将房间划分为固定区域并赋予单一标签，无法适应同一房间内不同功能区域的变化，例如厨房里的桌椅可能被用作办公室。

Method: 提出一种新的范式，有意地放宽语义分类器的标签限制，允许在房间内部产生模糊的、相互混淆的标签。

Result: 通过一个在物体搜索任务中的概念验证（proof of concept）来展示该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 允许语义标签在房间内部产生混淆，可能对服务机器人在动态环境下的任务执行（如物体搜索）是有益的。

Abstract: A significant challenge in service robots is the semantic understanding of their surrounding areas. Traditional approaches addressed this problem by segmenting the floor plan into regions corresponding to full rooms that are assigned labels consistent with human perception, e.g. office or kitchen. However, different areas inside the same room can be used in different ways: Could the table and the chair in my kitchen become my office? What is the category of that area now? office or kitchen? To adapt to these circumstances we propose a new paradigm where we intentionally relax the resulting labeling of semantic classifiers by allowing confusions inside rooms. Our hypothesis is that those confusions can be beneficial to a service robot. We present a proof of concept in the task of searching for objects.

</details>


### [581] [AtomVLA: Scalable Post-Training for Robotic Manipulation via Predictive Latent World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08519)
*Xiaoquan Sun,Zetian Xu,Chen Cao,Zonghe Liu,Yihan Sun,Jingrui Pang,Ruijian Zhang,Zhen Yang,Kang Pang,Dingxin He,Mingqi Yuan,Jiayu Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了AtomVLA，一个首个集成了可扩展离线后训练管道的子任务感知视觉-语言-动作（VLA）框架，通过将高级指令分解为原子子任务，并利用预测性世界模型在潜在空间中评估动作，显著提高了VLA模型在长周期任务中的鲁棒性，并在仿真和真实机器人实验中取得了优异成果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型在处理复杂多步任务时，由于主要依赖粗粒度的高层指令进行微调，缺乏明确的中间指导，容易出现指令接地差距，导致长周期任务中的累积性错误。因此，弥合指令差距并为VLA模型提供可扩展的后训练方法至关重要。

Method: 本文提出的AtomVLA框架，首先利用大型语言模型将高级演示分解为细粒度的原子子任务。然后，利用预训练的预测性世界模型在潜在空间中根据子任务目标评估候选动作块，以缓解错误累积并提高长周期鲁棒性。此外，该框架支持高效的Group Relative Policy Optimization，避免了在线物理机器人部署的高昂成本。

Result: 在LIBERO基准测试中，AtomVLA达到了97.0%的平均成功率，在LIBERO-PRO基准测试中达到了48.0%的成功率。仿真实验表明，AtomVLA在扰动下保持了良好的鲁棒性。真实世界实验（Galaxea R1 Lite平台）证明了其在多样化任务（尤其长周期任务）上的广泛适用性。

Conclusion: AtomVLA通过引入子任务感知机制和可扩展的离线后训练流程，有效解决了VLA模型在长周期任务中的指令接地差距问题，显著提升了模型的鲁棒性和性能，并证明了其在真实机器人应用中的潜力。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models demonstrate remarkable potential for generalizable robotic manipulation. The execution of complex multi-step behaviors in VLA models can be improved by robust instruction grounding, a critical component for effective control. However, current paradigms predominantly rely on coarse, high-level task instructions during supervised fine-tuning. This instruction grounding gap leaves models without explicit intermediate guidance, leading to severe compounding errors in long-horizon tasks. Therefore, bridging this instruction gap and providing scalable post-training for VLA models is urgent. To tackle this problem, we propose \method, the first subtask-aware VLA framework integrated with a scalable offline post-training pipeline. Our framework leverages a large language model to decompose high-level demonstrations into fine-grained atomic subtasks. This approach utilizes a pretrained predictive world model to score candidate action chunks against subtask goals in the latent space, mitigating error accumulation while significantly improving long-horizon robustness. Furthermore, this approach enables highly efficient Group Relative Policy Optimization without the prohibitive expenses associated with online rollouts on physical robots. Extensive simulations validate that our AtomVLA maintains strong robustness under perturbations. When evaluated against fundamental baseline models, it achieves an average success rate of 97.0\% on the LIBERO benchmark and 48.0\% on the LIBERO-PRO benchmark. Finally, experiments conducted in the real world using the Galaxea R1 Lite platform confirm its broad applicability across diverse tasks, especially long-horizon tasks. All datasets, checkpoints, and code will be released to the public domain following the acceptance of this work for future research.

</details>


### [582] [CRED: Counterfactual Reasoning and Environment Design for Active Preference Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08531)
*Yi-Shiuan Tung,Gyanig Kumar,Wei Jiang,Bradley Hayes,Alessandro Roncone*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为CRED的新型轨迹生成方法，用于主动偏好学习（APL），通过联合优化环境设计和轨迹选择来提高奖励函数推断的准确性和样本效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人操作环境和任务复杂性的增加，显式定义和平衡优化目标以实现理想行为变得越来越困难。虽然机器人受益于学习人类偏好和响应纠正，但手动编码反馈是不可行的。现有的APL方法在轨迹采样或回放缓冲区方面存在局限性，无法识别信息性比较。

Method: CRED通过联合优化环境设计和轨迹选择来生成轨迹对。它利用反事实推理，从当前信念中采样可能的奖励，并询问“如果这是真实偏好会怎样？”，以生成能够区分竞争奖励函数的轨迹对。

Result: 实验和用户研究表明，CRED在奖励准确性和样本效率方面显著优于最先进的方法，并且用户评分更高。

Conclusion: CRED通过生成更具信息量的轨迹对，提高了主动偏好学习的效率和准确性，克服了现有方法的局限性。

Abstract: As a robot's operational environment and tasks to perform within it grow in complexity, the explicit specification and balancing of optimization objectives to achieve a preferred behavior profile moves increasingly farther out of reach. These systems benefit strongly by being able to align their behavior to reflect human preferences and respond to corrections, but manually encoding this feedback is infeasible. Active preference learning (APL) learns human reward functions by presenting trajectories for ranking. However, existing methods sample from fixed trajectory sets or replay buffers that limit query diversity and often fail to identify informative comparisons. We propose CRED, a novel trajectory generation method for APL that improves reward inference by jointly optimizing environment design and trajectory selection to efficiently query and extract preferences from users. CRED "imagines" new scenarios through environment design and leverages counterfactual reasoning -- by sampling possible rewards from its current belief and asking "What if this were the true preference?" -- to generate trajectory pairs that expose differences between competing reward functions. Comprehensive experiments and a user study show that CRED significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in reward accuracy and sample efficiency and receives higher user ratings.

</details>


### [583] [EquiBim: Learning Symmetry-Equivariant Policy for Bimanual Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08541)
*Zhiyuan Zhang,Aditya Mohan,Seungho Han,Wan Shou,Dongyi Wang,Yu She*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为EquiBim的对称等变策略学习框架，用于双臂操作，通过强制执行对称变换下的观察和动作之间的等变性，解决了现有机器人学习方法在处理物理对称性时的局限性，并在仿真和真实世界的双臂操作任务中取得了性能和鲁棒性的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人学习方法在处理双臂操作等具有固有物理对称性的场景时，往往会产生不对称或不一致的行为。这种局限性源于未明确考虑系统的物理对称性。

Method: 提出EquiBim框架，将物理对称性建模为作用于观察和动作空间的群作用，并在训练过程中对策略预测施加等变性约束。该框架模型无关，可集成到多种模仿学习管道中，支持点云、图像等多种观察模态，以及末端执行器空间和关节空间等多种动作表示。

Result: 在RoboTwin双臂机器人平台和仿真环境中评估EquiBim。实验结果表明，该方法在不同观察和动作配置下，均能提升性能和鲁棒性，尤其是在分布偏移的情况下。真实世界双臂系统实验也验证了其有效性。

Conclusion: 显式强制执行物理对称性为双臂机器人学习提供了一个简单而有效的归纳偏倚，能够提升模型性能和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Robotic imitation learning has achieved impressive success in learning complex manipulation behaviors from demonstrations. However, many existing robot learning methods do not explicitly account for the physical symmetries of robotic systems, often resulting in asymmetric or inconsistent behaviors under symmetric observations. This limitation is particularly pronounced in dual-arm manipulation, where bilateral symmetry is inherent to both the robot morphology and the structure of many tasks. In this paper, we introduce EquiBim, a symmetry-equivariant policy learning framework for bimanual manipulation that enforces bilateral equivariance between observations and actions during training. Our approach formulates physical symmetry as a group action on both observation and action spaces, and imposes an equivariance constraint on policy predictions under symmetric transformations. The framework is model-agnostic and can be seamlessly integrated into a wide range of imitation learning pipelines with diverse observation modalities and action representations, including point cloud-based and image-based policies, as well as both end-effector-space and joint-space parameterizations. We evaluate EquiBim on RoboTwin, a dual-arm robotic platform with symmetric kinematics, and evaluate it across diverse observation and action configurations in simulation. We further validate the approach on a real-world dual-arm system. Across both simulation and physical experiments, our method consistently improves performance and robustness under distribution shifts. These results suggest that explicitly enforcing physical symmetry provides a simple yet effective inductive bias for bimanual robot learning.

</details>


### [584] [Interactive World Simulator for Robot Policy Training and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08546)
*Yixuan Wang,Rhythm Syed,Fangyu Wu,Mengchao Zhang,Aykut Onol,Jose Barreiros,Hooshang Nayyeri,Tony Dear,Huan Zhang,Yunzhu Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为Interactive World Simulator的框架，利用一致性模型进行图像解码和潜在空间动力学预测，从而实现快速、稳定且物理一致的视频预测，适用于机器人交互数据生成和策略训练评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有用于机器人应用的动作条件视频预测模型（世界模型）存在速度慢、难以捕捉长时程物理一致性交互的问题，限制了其在机器人策略训练和评估中的应用。因此，需要一个能够快速、稳定且物理一致地进行模拟的框架。

Method: 该研究提出了一种利用一致性模型（consistency models）进行图像解码和潜在空间动力学预测的框架，称为Interactive World Simulator。该框架能够从适量机器人交互数据集中学习，并支持快速（15 FPS）且长时程（超过10分钟）的稳定物理交互模拟。

Result: 学习到的世界模型能够生成交互一致的像素级预测，并在单块RTX 4090 GPU上实现15 FPS的长时间（超过10分钟）稳定交互模拟。利用该框架生成的模拟数据训练的模仿策略，在性能上与使用相同数量真实世界数据训练的策略相当。模拟与真实世界性能之间存在强相关性。

Conclusion: Interactive World Simulator是一个稳定且物理一致的模拟器，能够实现可扩展的机器人数据生成，并支持忠实、可复现的策略评估，为机器人研究和应用提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Action-conditioned video prediction models (often referred to as world models) have shown strong potential for robotics applications, but existing approaches are often slow and struggle to capture physically consistent interactions over long horizons, limiting their usefulness for scalable robot policy training and evaluation. We present Interactive World Simulator, a framework for building interactive world models from a moderate-sized robot interaction dataset. Our approach leverages consistency models for both image decoding and latent-space dynamics prediction, enabling fast and stable simulation of physical interactions. In our experiments, the learned world models produce interaction-consistent pixel-level predictions and support stable long-horizon interactions for more than 10 minutes at 15 FPS on a single RTX 4090 GPU. Our framework enables scalable demonstration collection solely within the world models to train state-of-the-art imitation policies. Through extensive real-world evaluation across diverse tasks involving rigid objects, deformable objects, object piles, and their interactions, we find that policies trained on world-model-generated data perform comparably to those trained on the same amount of real-world data. Additionally, we evaluate policies both within the world models and in the real world across diverse tasks, and observe a strong correlation between simulated and real-world performance. Together, these results establish the Interactive World Simulator as a stable and physically consistent surrogate for scalable robotic data generation and faithful, reproducible policy evaluation.

</details>


### [585] [The Neural Compass: Probabilistic Relative Feature Fields for Robotic Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08544)
*Gabriele Somaschini,Adrian Röfer,Abhinav Valada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为ProReFF的模型，能够从无标签的视觉数据中隐式学习物体间的共现关系，并利用这些关系来指导智能体进行高效的目标搜索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常需要标注数据或语言模型来学习物体间的共现关系，但尚不清楚是否能仅从无标签的观察中隐式学习。本文旨在解决这个问题，探索从无标签数据中学习物体共现关系的可能性。

Method: 提出ProReFF模型，通过预训练的视觉-语言模型提取特征，并学习特征的相对分布。引入了一种基于学习的策略，通过对齐不一致的观察来处理潜在矛盾的无标签数据。设计了一个搜索智能体，利用预测的特征分布作为语义先验来指导探索。

Result: ProReFF能捕捉到自然场景中有意义的相对特征分布，并证明了对齐步骤的有效性。搜索智能体在Matterport3D模拟器中的100个挑战任务中，比最强的基线提高了20%的效率，并达到了人类性能的80%。

Conclusion: 该研究成功地从无标签数据中隐式学习了物体间的共现关系，并证明了该方法在目标搜索任务中的有效性，为智能体在未知环境中进行高效探索提供了新的途径。

Abstract: Object co-occurrences provide a key cue for finding objects successfully and efficiently in unfamiliar environments. Typically, one looks for cups in kitchens and views fridges as evidence of being in a kitchen. Such priors have also been exploited in artificial agents, but they are typically learned from explicitly labeled data or queried from language models. It is still unclear whether these relations can be learned implicitly from unlabeled observations alone. In this work, we address this problem and propose ProReFF, a feature field model trained to predict relative distributions of features obtained from pre-trained vision language models. In addition, we introduce a learning-based strategy that enables training from unlabeled and potentially contradictory data by aligning inconsistent observations into a coherent relative distribution. For the downstream object search task, we propose an agent that leverages predicted feature distributions as a semantic prior to guide exploration toward regions with a high likelihood of containing the object. We present extensive evaluations demonstrating that ProReFF captures meaningful relative feature distributions in natural scenes and provides insight into the impact of our proposed alignment step. We further evaluate the performance of our search agent in 100 challenges in the Matterport3D simulator, comparing with feature-based baselines and human participants. The proposed agent is 20% more efficient than the strongest baseline and achieves up to 80% of human performance.

</details>


### [586] [Diff-Muscle: Efficient Learning for Musculoskeletal Robotic Table Tennis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08617)
*Wentao Zhao,Jun Guo,Kangyao Huang,Xin Liu,Huaping Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为Diff-Muscle的控制算法，利用差分平坦性将高维度的肌肉激活空间映射到低维度的关节空间，并通过分层强化学习框架，成功使肌肉骨骼机器人完成了高难度的双人乒乓球对打任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有肌骨骼机器人研究多局限于简单任务，未能充分挖掘其在多关节协调方面的潜力。同时，高维度动作空间和冗余的执行器结构给高效学习带来了挑战。

Method: 提出Diff-Muscle算法，利用差分平坦性将策略学习从冗余的肌肉激活空间重构到低维度的关节空间。采用分层强化学习框架，结合基于运动学的肌肉驱动控制器（K-MAC）和高级轨迹规划，以执行灵巧且精确的乒乓球击打。

Result: Diff-Muscle在成功率上显著优于现有最先进的算法，同时保持了最小的肌肉激活量。成功实现了肌骨骼机器人在具有挑战性的双人场景下的连续击球对打。

Conclusion: Diff-Muscle算法能够有效地解决肌骨骼机器人的高维度动作空间和冗余执行器问题，并通过分层强化学习框架，显著提升了机器人在复杂任务（如乒乓球对打）中的控制性能和学习效率。

Abstract: Musculoskeletal robots provide superior advantages in flexibility and dexterity, positioning them as a promising frontier towards embodied intelligence. However, current research is largely confined to relative simple tasks, restricting the exploration of their full potential in multi-segment coordination. Furthermore, efficient learning remains a challenge, primarily due to the high-dimensional action space and inherent overactuated structures. To address these challenges, we propose Diff-Muscle, a musculoskeletal robot control algorithm that leverages differential flatness to reformulate policy learning from the redundant muscle-activation space into a significantly lower-dimensional joint space. Furthermore, we utilize the highly dynamic robotic table tennis task to evaluate our algorithm. Specifically, we propose a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework that integrates a Kinematics-based Muscle Actuation Controller (K-MAC) with high-level trajectory planning, enabling a musculoskeletal robot to perform dexterous and precise rallies. Experimental results demonstrate that Diff-Muscle significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in success rates while maintaining minimal muscle activation. Notably, the proposed framework successfully enables the musculoskeletal robots to achieve continuous rallies in a challenging dual-robot setting.

</details>


### [587] [CONTACT: CONtact-aware TACTile Learning for Robotic Disassembly](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08560)
*Yosuke Saka,Jyun-Chi Hu,Adeesh Desai,Zhiyuan Zhang,Bihao Zhang,Quan Khanh Luu,Md Rakibul Islam Prince,Minghui Zheng,Yu She*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究探讨了触觉传感在机器人拆卸中的作用，发现在接触密集和易变形场景下，基于力场表示的触觉感知策略比仅依赖视觉的策略表现更好，且简单的多模态融合效果不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于视觉的机器人拆卸策略在结构化环境中表现良好，但在公差配合紧密、以接触为主或易变形的场景下可靠性下降，这促使研究者探索触觉传感的潜力。

Method: 作者在仿真和真实世界中设计了多种拆卸任务，对比了仅使用视觉（Vision Only）、视觉+触觉RGB（TacRGB）和视觉+触觉力场（TacFF）三种传感配置下的策略表现，并在统一的学习框架下进行评估。

Result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中，基于TacFF的策略成功率最高，尤其在接触依赖和变形场景下优势明显。 TacRGB和TacFF的简单融合效果不如单独使用任一模态，表明简单拼接会稀释任务相关的力信息。

Conclusion: 触觉传感在机器人拆卸中扮演着关键的、任务相关的角色，其中结构化的力场表示在以接触为主的场景中尤为有效。

Abstract: Robotic disassembly involves contact-rich interactions in which successful manipulation depends not only on geometric alignment but also on force-dependent state transitions. While vision-based policies perform well in structured settings, their reliability often degrades in tight-tolerance, contact-dominated, or deformable scenarios. In this work, we systematically investigate the role of tactile sensing in robotic disassembly through both simulation and real-world experiments. We construct five rigid-body disassembly tasks in simulation with increasing geometric constraints and extraction difficulty. We further design five real-world tasks, including three rigid and two deformable scenarios, to evaluate contact-dependent manipulation. Within a unified learning framework, we compare three sensing configurations: Vision Only, Vision + tactile RGB (TacRGB), and Vision + tactile force field (TacFF). Across both simulation and real-world experiments, TacFF-based policies consistently achieve the highest success rates, with particularly notable gains in contact-dependent and deformable settings. Notably, naive fusion of TacRGB and TacFF underperforms either modality alone, indicating that simple concatenation can dilute task-relevant force information. Our results show that tactile sensing plays a critical, task-dependent role in robotic disassembly, with structured force-field representations being particularly effective in contact-dominated scenarios.

</details>


### [588] [Embedding Classical Balance Control Principles in Reinforcement Learning for Humanoid Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08619)
*Nehar Poddar,Stephen McCrory,Luigi Penco,Geoffrey Clark,Hakki Erhan Svil,Robert Griffin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种统一的强化学习策略，通过将经典平衡指标（捕获点、质心状态、质心动量）嵌入作为特权批评者输入和奖励塑造，实现了人形机器人在各种跌倒场景下的自主恢复，并实现了高成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的人形机器人强化学习方法在处理跌倒和不可恢复的故障状态时存在不足，限制了其在非结构化环境中的实用性，而现有的方法没有明确考虑平衡状态。

Method: 提出了一种统一的强化学习策略，将捕获点、质心状态和质心动量等经典平衡指标作为特权批评者输入，并围绕这些量进行奖励塑造。Actor仅使用本体感受信息进行训练。在Isaac Lab中训练，并在Unitree H1-2上进行评估。

Result: 该策略能够覆盖从踝部和臀部策略到纠正性步态，再到利用手臂和膝盖进行多点接触站立的完整恢复谱。在随机初始姿势和非脚本化跌倒配置下，恢复成功率达到93.4%。消融研究表明，去除平衡信息结构会导致站立学习完全失败。

Conclusion: 将可解释的平衡结构嵌入学习框架能够显著减少机器人在故障状态下花费的时间，并拓宽自主恢复的范围，实现跨环境泛化。

Abstract: Humanoid robots remain vulnerable to falls and unrecoverable failure states, limiting their practical utility in unstructured environments. While reinforcement learning has demonstrated stand-up behaviors, existing approaches treat recovery as a pure task-reward problem without an explicit representation of the balance state. We present a unified RL policy that addresses this limitation by embedding classical balance metrics: capture point, center-of-mass state, and centroidal momentum, as privileged critic inputs and shaping rewards directly around these quantities during training, while the actor relies solely on proprioception for zero-shot hardware transfer. Without reference trajectories or scripted contacts, a single policy spans the full recovery spectrum: ankle and hip strategies for small disturbances, corrective stepping under large pushes, and compliant falling with multi-contact stand-up using the hands, elbows, and knees. Trained on the Unitree H1-2 in Isaac Lab, the policy achieves a 93.4% recovery rate across randomized initial poses and unscripted fall configurations. An ablation study shows that removing the balance-informed structure causes stand-up learning to fail entirely, confirming that these metrics provide a meaningful learning signal rather than incidental structure. Sim-to-sim transfer to MuJoCo and preliminary hardware experiments further demonstrate cross-environment generalization. These results show that embedding interpretable balance structure into the learning framework substantially reduces time spent in failure states and broadens the envelope of autonomous recovery.

</details>


### [589] [Bilevel Planning with Learned Symbolic Abstractions from Interaction Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08599)
*Fatih Dogangun,Burcu Kilic,Serdar Bahar,Emre Ugur*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种双层神经符号框架，结合了符号规则生成候选计划和连续效应模型进行验证和前向搜索，在多对象操作任务中优于纯符号方法，并能与连续前向搜索相媲美。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理连续动态和离散表示的复杂环境时存在不足，例如依赖确定性符号域、缺乏计划验证机制以及仅在抽象层面操作而忽略连续动态。

Method: 提出一个双层神经符号框架：高层使用学习到的概率符号规则快速生成候选计划，低层使用学习到的连续效应模型进行计划验证，并在必要时进行前向搜索。

Result: 在多对象操作任务上的实验表明，该双层方法优于纯符号方法，能可靠地识别出失败的计划，并且在规划性能上与连续前向搜索相当，同时通过高效的符号推理解决了大部分问题。

Conclusion: 提出的双层神经符号框架能够有效地结合符号推理和连续动力学建模，从而在复杂环境中实现高效且可靠的规划。

Abstract: Intelligent agents must reason over both continuous dynamics and discrete representations to generate effective plans in complex environments. Previous studies have shown that symbolic abstractions can emerge from neural effect predictors trained with a robot's unsupervised exploration. However, these methods rely on deterministic symbolic domains, lack mechanisms to verify the generated symbolic plans, and operate only at the abstract level, often failing to capture the continuous dynamics of the environment. To overcome these limitations, we propose a bilevel neuro-symbolic framework in which learned probabilistic symbolic rules generate candidate plans rapidly at the high level, and learned continuous effect models verify these plans and perform forward search when necessary at the low level. Our experiments on multi-object manipulation tasks demonstrate that the proposed bilevel method outperforms symbolic-only approaches, reliably identifying failing plans through verification, and achieves planning performance statistically comparable to continuous forward search while resolving most problems via efficient symbolic reasoning.

</details>


### [590] [Exp-Force: Experience-Conditioned Pre-Grasp Force Selection with Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08668)
*Siqi Shang,Minchao Huang,Bill Fan,Lillian Chin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为Exp-Force的基于经验的框架，该框架仅通过RGB图像即可预测抓取所需的最小可行力，并成功地减少了抓取力的误差并提高了实际抓取任务的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器人操作中，准确地预估抓取力至关重要，以避免对易碎物体造成损坏或需要进行被动调整。然而，对于力学难以解析建模的柔顺夹持器来说，这是一个特别的挑战。

Method: Exp-Force 框架通过检索相关的过往抓取经验，并利用这些经验来指导一个视觉-语言模型进行上下文推理，从而预测所需的最小抓取力。该方法不依赖于解析的接触模型或手动设计的启发式方法。

Result: 在129个物体实例上的实验显示，Exp-Force 实现了 0.43 N 的最小平均绝对误差（MAE），比零样本推理降低了 72%。在30个未见过的物体上的实际测试中，它将合适的抓取力选择率从 63% 提高到 87%。

Conclusion: Exp-Force 框架通过利用先前的交互经验，实现了可靠且可泛化的抓取前力估计，从而提高了机器人操作的安全性和效率。

Abstract: Accurate pre-contact grasp force selection is critical for safe and reliable robotic manipulation. Adaptive controllers regulate force after contact but still require a reasonable initial estimate. Starting a grasp with too little force requires reactive adjustment, while starting a grasp with too high a force risks damaging fragile objects. This trade-off is particularly challenging for compliant grippers, whose contact mechanics are difficult to model analytically. We propose Exp-Force, an experience-conditioned framework that predicts the minimum feasible grasping force from a single RGB image. The method retrieves a small set of relevant prior grasping experiences and conditions a vision-language model on these examples for in-context inference, without analytic contact models or manually designed heuristics. On 129 object instances, ExpForce achieves a best-case MAE of 0.43 N, reducing error by 72% over zero-shot inference. In real-world tests on 30 unseen objects, it improves appropriate force selection rate from 63% to 87%. These results demonstrate that Exp-Force enables reliable and generalizable pre-grasp force selection by leveraging prior interaction experiences. http://expforcesubmission.github.io/Exp-Force-Website/

</details>


### [591] [MetaWorld-X: Hierarchical World Modeling via VLM-Orchestrated Experts for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08572)
*Yutong Shen,Hangxu Liu,Penghui Liu,Jiashuo Luo,Yongkang Zhang,Rex Morvley,Chen Jiang,Jianwei Zhang,Lei Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为MetaWorld-X的分层世界模型框架，用于解决人形机器人同时进行运动和操作（loco-manipulation）的控制难题。该框架通过将复杂任务分解为多个专门的专家策略，并利用视觉语言模型指导的智能路由机制来动态组合这些专家策略，从而提高了运动的自然性、稳定性和组合泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法在处理人形机器人高自由度、同时进行运动和操作（loco-manipulation）的任务时，常因单一策略导致梯度干扰和动作冲突，产生不自然、不稳定且泛化能力差的行为。为了克服这些限制，需要一种能够分解复杂问题、生成自然运动并实现组合泛化的方法。

Method: 提出MetaWorld-X分层世界模型框架。该框架遵循“分而治之”的原则，将复杂控制问题分解为多个专门的专家策略（SEP）。每个专家策略通过模仿学习约束的强化学习（imitation-constrained reinforcement learning）并在人类运动先验指导下进行训练，以确保动作的自然性和物理合理性。此外，开发了一种由视觉语言模型（VLM）监督的智能路由机制（IRM），该机制能够根据高层任务语义动态组合专家策略，从而实现组合泛化和多阶段loco-manipulation任务的自适应执行。

Result: MetaWorld-X框架能够生成更自然、更稳定的全身运动。通过VLM指导的路由机制，实现了对多阶段loco-manipulation任务的语义驱动的专家策略组合，从而显著提升了组合泛化能力。

Conclusion: MetaWorld-X框架通过将复杂的loco-manipulation控制问题分解为可管理的专家策略，并利用VLM引导的智能路由机制进行动态组合，有效解决了现有方法在自然性、稳定性和组合泛化方面的不足，为人形机器人控制提供了一种有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Learning natural, stable, and compositionally generalizable whole-body control policies for humanoid robots performing simultaneous locomotion and manipulation (loco-manipulation) remains a fundamental challenge in robotics. Existing reinforcement learning approaches typically rely on a single monolithic policy to acquire multiple skills, which often leads to cross-skill gradient interference and motion pattern conflicts in high-degree-of-freedom systems. As a result, generated behaviors frequently exhibit unnatural movements, limited stability, and poor generalization to complex task compositions. To address these limitations, we propose MetaWorld-X, a hierarchical world model framework for humanoid control. Guided by a divide-and-conquer principle, our method decomposes complex control problems into a set of specialized expert policies (Specialized Expert Policies, SEP). Each expert is trained under human motion priors through imitation-constrained reinforcement learning, introducing biomechanically consistent inductive biases that ensure natural and physically plausible motion generation. Building upon this foundation, we further develop an Intelligent Routing Mechanism (IRM) supervised by a Vision-Language Model (VLM), enabling semantic-driven expert composition. The VLM-guided router dynamically integrates expert policies according to high-level task semantics, facilitating compositional generalization and adaptive execution in multi-stage loco-manipulation tasks.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [592] [Adaptive Gain Nonlinear Observer for External Wrench Estimation in Human-UAV Physical Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06933)
*Hussein N. Naser,Hashim A. Hashim,Mojtaba Ahmadi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自适应增益非线性观测器 (AGNO)，用于估计人机无人机物理交互中的外部交互扳手（力和力矩），以实现辅助载荷运输。AGNO 利用完整的非线性动力学模型，无需专用力矩传感器即可实现准确鲁棒的扳手估计。该方法的一个关键特性是明确考虑了非恒定惯性矩阵，这对于质量分布不对称或有效载荷转移的航空系统至关重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是为了在人机无人机物理交互进行辅助载荷运输时，能够准确估计外部交互扳手（力和力矩），以实现更直观和安全的交互，并减少系统成本和重量。

Method: 本文提出了一种自适应增益非线性观测器 (AGNO)，利用了完整的非线性动力学模型，并显式考虑了非恒定惯性矩阵。通过使用李亚普诺夫稳定性分析来严格证明观测器的稳定性。仿真结果验证了AGNO的有效性，并与扩展卡尔曼滤波器 (EKF) 进行了比较。

Result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的 AGNO 在估计外部交互扳手方面是有效且鲁棒的，尤其是在扭矩估计方面，其均方根误差 (RMSE) 低于 EKF，尤其是在非线性交互条件下。该方法无需额外的传感硬件，减轻了系统重量并降低了成本。

Conclusion: AGNO 是一种有效且鲁棒的方法，可以准确估计人机无人机物理交互中的外部交互扳手，而无需专用传感器。该方法通过考虑非恒定惯性矩阵提高了估计精度，并有望实现更安全、更具成本效益的人机协同运输。

Abstract: This paper presents an Adaptive Gain Nonlinear Observer (AGNO) for estimating the external interaction wrench (forces and torques) in human-UAV physical interaction for assistive payload transportation. The proposed AGNO uses the full nonlinear dynamic model to achieve an accurate and robust wrench estimation without relying on dedicated force-torque sensors. A key feature of this approach is the explicit consideration of the non-constant inertia matrix, which is essential for aerial systems with asymmetric mass distribution or shifting payloads. A comprehensive dynamic model of a cooperative transportation system composed of two quadrotors and a shared payload is derived, and the stability of the observer is rigorously established using Lyapunov-based analysis. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of the proposed observer in enabling intuitive and safe human-UAV interaction. Comparative evaluations demonstrate that the proposed AGNO outperforms an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) in terms of estimation root mean square errors (RMSE), particularly for torque estimation under nonlinear interaction conditions. This approach reduces system weight and cost by eliminating additional sensing hardware, enhancing practical feasibility.

</details>


### [593] [Quantum Technologies and Edge Devices in Electrical Grids: Opportunities, Challenges, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06783)
*Marjorie Hoegen,René Glebke,M. Sahnawaz Alam,Alessandro David,Juan Navarro Arenas,Nikolaus Wirtz,Mario Albanese,Daniele Carta,Felix Motzoi,Antonello Monti,Carsten Schuck,Andrea Benigni,Klaus Wehrle,Ferdinanda Ponci*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文探讨了将量子技术（包括量子计算、量子传感和量子通信）集成到电网边缘设备中的机遇与挑战，以解决传统边缘设备在处理能力、传感精度和通信安全方面面临的限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统电网边缘设备在处理复杂信号、提高传感精度和保障通信安全方面存在瓶颈，这阻碍了电网的效率和稳定性。量子技术有望克服这些挑战。

Method: 本文通过分析量子计算（优化和机器学习）、量子传感（原子级精度传感）和量子通信（量子密钥分发）在电网边缘设备中的应用潜力，来探讨集成机遇和挑战。

Result: 量子技术可以为边缘设备带来指数级的计算加速、前所未有的传感精度以及信息论安全和高带宽的通信，从而提升电网的监测、控制和安全性。

Conclusion: 将量子技术集成到电网边缘设备中，为应对现代电网日益增长的复杂性和安全性需求提供了新的途径，尽管仍面临技术和实施上的挑战。

Abstract: In modern power systems, edge devices serve as local hubs that collect data, perform on-site computing, sense electrical parameters, execute control actions, and communicate with neighboring edge devices as part of the larger grid. However, as the number of monitored nodes and control loops grows, traditional edge devices face serious limits. They can become overloaded by complex signal processing and decision tasks, causing delays and higher energy use. Standard sensors hit a noise floor that prevents them from detecting miniature changes, making it harder to spot early signs of faults or instability. Meanwhile, conventional communication links struggle with bandwidth limits, security risks, and rising encryption demands, which together slow down and weaken the transfer of critical grid information. Quantum technologies have the potential to overcome these challenges. Quantum computers can deliver exponential speed-ups for optimization and machine-learning tasks that ordinary processors cannot handle. Quantum sensors can sense signals with atomic precision, giving edge devices a more precise view of grid dynamics. Quantum communication techniques, including quantum key distribution, offer methods to achieve information-theoretic security and ensure that information arrives quickly and without tampering. We explore how quantum technologies can be integrated into edge devices, highlighting both opportunities and challenges.

</details>


### [594] [A SISA-based Machine Unlearning Framework for Power Transformer Inter-Turn Short-Circuit Fault Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06962)
*Nanhong Liu,Jingyi Yan,Mucun Sun,Jie Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于SISA（分片、隔离、切片和聚合）的机器遗忘框架，用于电力变压器匝间短路故障定位，以解决训练数据中毒导致模型性能下降且难以清除的问题，该方法通过隔离数据影响和仅重训练受影响部分来提高效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际应用中，由传感器故障引起的数据中毒会严重影响机器学习模型的性能，而完整重训练模型计算量大、耗时久，难以有效地清除受污染数据的负面影响。

Method: 提出了一种基于SISA（分片、隔离、切片和聚合）的机器遗忘框架。该框架将训练数据划分为分片和切片，通过独立训练使得每个数据点的影响被隔离在特定的组件模型中。当检测到中毒数据时，仅重训练受影响的分片，避免了从头开始重训练整个模型。

Result: 在模拟的匝间短路故障条件下进行实验，结果表明，该框架实现的诊断准确率几乎与完整重训练模型相当，同时显著减少了重训练所需的时间。

Conclusion: SISA-based机器遗忘框架能够有效地处理因数据中毒导致的ML模型性能下降问题，并且在保持高诊断精度的同时，大幅提高了模型重训练的效率，特别适用于电力变压器故障诊断等场景。

Abstract: In practical data-driven applications on electrical equipment fault diagnosis, training data can be poisoned by sensor failures, which can severely degrade the performance of machine learning (ML) models. However, once the ML model has been trained, removing the influence of such harmful data is challenging, as full retraining is both computationally intensive and time-consuming. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a SISA (Sharded, Isolated, Sliced, and Aggregated)-based machine unlearning (MU) framework for power transformer inter-turn short-circuit fault (ITSCF) localization. The SISA method partitions the training data into shards and slices, ensuring that the influence of each data point is isolated within specific constituent models through independent training. When poisoned data are detected, only the affected shards are retrained, avoiding retraining the entire model from scratch. Experiments on simulated ITSCF conditions demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves almost identical diagnostic accuracy to full retraining, while reducing retraining time significantly.

</details>


### [595] [Impact of Work Schedule Flexibility on EV Hosting Capacity: Insights from Analyzing Field Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06943)
*Marco Iorio,Mohammad Golgol,Anamitra Pal*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种考虑工作安排灵活性的电动汽车充电协调方法，并结合屋顶光伏发电，以确定变压器的电动汽车承载能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无序的电动汽车充电正在改变居民用电模式并导致配电变压器过载，现有研究尚未深入探讨如何利用车主的工作时间灵活性来缓解这一问题。

Method: 提出了一种结合工作日程的鲁棒和机会约束优化模型，用于协调电动汽车充电，并以此确定变压器的电动汽车承载能力。

Result: 在亚利桑那州一个居民区馈线数据的模拟结果表明，结合工作日程灵活性和光伏发电可以有效管理电网需求。

Conclusion: 通过智能地结合工作日程灵活性和光伏发电，电力公司可以有效地管理不断变化的电网需求，应对电动汽车充电带来的挑战。

Abstract: Uncoordinated electric vehicle (EV) charging is altering residential load patterns and pushing distribution transformers to operate beyond their limits. These outcomes can be offset by exploiting the flexibility in work schedules (hybrid, remote vs. in-person) of EV owners, particularly when combined with rooftop photovoltaic (PV) generation. However, this phenomenon has not been explored in-depth yet. This paper addresses this research gap by introducing weekly work schedule-aware robust and chance-constrained optimization formulations for EV charging coordination to determine a transformer's EV hosting capacity. The results obtained using data from a residential feeder in Arizona indicate that an intelligent combination of work schedule flexibility with PV generation can help power utilities effectively manage changing grid demands.

</details>


### [596] [Topology-Aware Reinforcement Learning over Graphs for Resilient Power Distribution Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06964)
*Roshni Anna Jacob,Prithvi Poddar,Jaidev Goel,Souma Chowdhury,Yulia R. Gel,Jie Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究提出了一个拓扑感知的图强化学习框架，用于电力配电网的故障管理，通过整合拓扑数据分析（TDA）工具（持久性同调），在故障恢复过程中提高了能源供应和电网稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 极端天气事件和网络攻击可能导致电力配电网组件故障和运行中断，需要有效的故障管理策略来增强电网的韧性，而现有的方法在适应性和自动化方面存在不足。

Method: 该研究引入了一个拓扑感知的图强化学习（RL）框架，该框架将配电网的高阶拓扑特征嵌入到基于图的RL模型中。使用了拓扑数据分析（TDA）工具——持久性同调（PH）来提取和利用这些拓扑特征，并将其与RL相结合，以实现配电网的重构和负荷削减，目标是最大化能源供应并维持运行稳定性。

Result: 在修改后的IEEE 123节点馈线上的300种不同故障场景下进行的实验表明，与基线图-RL模型相比，整合了TDA（PH）的框架可以带来9-18%的累积奖励提升，电力输送增加高达6%，电压违规减少6-8%。

Conclusion: 将强化学习与拓扑数据分析相结合，能够有效地提升电力配电网在故障管理中的韧性，实现快速、自适应和自动化的故障恢复，从而促进配电网的自愈能力。

Abstract: Extreme weather events and cyberattacks can cause component failures and disrupt the operation of power distribution networks (DNs), during which reconfiguration and load shedding are often adopted for resilience enhancement. This study introduces a topology-aware graph reinforcement learning (RL) framework for outage management that embeds higher-order topological features of the DN into a graph-based RL model, enabling reconfiguration and load shedding to maximize energy supply while maintaining operational stability. Results on the modified IEEE 123-bus feeder across 300 diverse outage scenarios demonstrate that incorporating the topological data analysis (TDA) tool, persistence homology (PH), yields 9-18% higher cumulative rewards, up to 6% increase in power delivery, and 6-8% fewer voltage violations compared to a baseline graph-RL model. These findings highlight the potential of integrating RL with TDA to enable self-healing in DNs, facilitating fast, adaptive, and automated restoration.

</details>


### [597] [Communication Network-Aware Missing Data Recovery for Enhanced Distribution Grid Visibility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07049)
*Biswas Rudra Jyoti Arka,Md Zahidul Islam,Yuzhang Lin,Vinod M. Vokkarane,Junbo Zhao*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通信感知的数据恢复框架，通过将通信路由约束与低秩矩阵恢复相结合，提高了电网传感器数据丢失时的恢复准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的传感器数据恢复方法忽略了通信网络的角色，这会导致当多个传感器共享故障的通信链路时，出现大范围、空间相关的测量数据丢失。需要一种能够考虑通信网络故障的数据恢复技术。

Method: 将传感器分组为簇，并设计路由路径以限制同一簇内的传感器共享公共通信链路。然后，对每个簇中剩余的测量数据使用最优奇异值阈值（OSVT）方法进行恢复。

Result: 在IEEE标准测试馈线和真实世界数据上的仿真结果表明，所提出的框架相比于通信无关、仅基于测量值的方法，显著提高了数据恢复的准确性。

Conclusion: 将通信路由约束集成到低秩矩阵恢复中，可以有效地解决因通信故障导致的大范围传感器数据丢失问题，并提高数据恢复的准确性。

Abstract: Power distribution systems increasingly rely on dense sensor networks for real-time monitoring, yet unreliable communication links and equipment malfunctions often result in missing or incomplete measurement sets at the operating center, requiring accurate data recovery techniques. Most existing approaches operate solely on the available measurements and overlook the role of the communication network that delivers sensor data, leading to large, spatially correlated losses when multiple sensors share failing communication links. This paper proposes a communication-aware framework that integrates routing constraints with low-rank matrix completion to improve data recovery accuracy under communication failures. Sensors are grouped into balanced clusters, and routing paths are designed to limit intracluster sensors sharing a common communication path, preventing complete data loss within any cluster. The remaining measurements for each cluster are then recovered using an optimal singular value thresholding (OSVT) method. Simulation results on the IEEE standard test feeder with real-world data demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly improves recovery accuracy compared to communication-agnostic, measurement-only methods.

</details>


### [598] [Statistical Contraction for Chance-Constrained Trajectory Optimization of Non-Gaussian Stochastic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07092)
*Rihan Aaron D'Silva,Hiroyasu Tsukamoto*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需分布假设的、用于离散时间、非线性、非高斯随机系统的鲁棒轨迹优化和控制新方法，并提供闭环概率约束满足的保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究的动机是为离散时间、非线性、非高斯随机系统开发一种无需分布假设的鲁棒轨迹优化和控制方法，并能保证闭环概率约束满足，从而支持学习型运动规划器和控制器的安全应用。

Method: 采用共形推断技术，通过构建联合非一致性评分来量化收缩有效性和外部随机扰动的影响，从而生成覆盖置信集。通过适当的约束收紧，将概率约束转化为可行的、统计上有效的确定性约束。

Result: 提出的方法能够在有限样本下计算出非发散的统计保证，无需过度保守的结构先验。在数值模拟和硬件实验中，该方法成功应用于设计安全、动态可行的运动轨迹。

Conclusion: 该框架为在安全关键的实际应用中利用和验证基于学习的运动规划器和控制器（如具有神经收缩度量的控制器）提供了一条正式途径，实现了分布无关、鲁棒且具有统计保证的轨迹优化和控制。

Abstract: This paper presents novel method for distribution-free robust trajectory optimization and control of discrete-time, nonlinear, and non-Gaussian stochastic systems, with closed-loop guarantees on chance constraint satisfaction. Our framework employs conformal inference to generate coverage-based confidence sets for the closed-loop dynamics around arbitrary reference trajectories, by constructing a joint nonconformity score to quantify both the validity of contraction (i.e., incremental stability) conditions and the impact of external stochastic disturbance on the closed-loop dynamics, without any distributional assumptions. Via appropriate constraint tightening, chance constraints can be reformulated into tractable, statistically valid deterministic constraints on the reference trajectories. This enables a formal pathway to leverage and validate learning-based motion planners and controllers, such as those with neural contraction metrics, in safety-critical real-world applications. Notably, our statistical guarantees are non-diverging and can be computed with finite samples of the underlying uncertainty, without overly conservative structural priors. We demonstrate our approach in motion planning problems for designing safe, dynamically feasible trajectories in both numerical simulation and hardware experiments.

</details>


### [599] [Reinforcement Learning for Vehicle-to-Grid Voltage Regulation: Single-Hub to Multi-Hub Coordination with Battery-Aware Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07237)
*Jingbo Wang,Roshni Anna Jacob,Harshal D. Kaushik,Jie Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的车辆到电网（V2G）协调框架，用于在考虑电池状态和车队约束的情况下进行电压调节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了在 V2G 充电过程中实现电压调节，同时保证车队的可用性和电池健康。

Method: 采用软 Actor-Critic (SAC) 算法作为智能控制策略，并结合两阶段训练方法：首先进行以稳定性为导向的学习，然后进行电池感知部署。

Result: 在 IEEE 34 节点系统上的仿真研究表明，RL 智能体在名义场景下性能与标准控制器相当，在严重过载情况下，RL 智能体能提供稳健的电压恢复（接近基线性能的 10%），并优先考虑车队可用性和电池荷电状态的保持。

Conclusion: 约束感知的强化学习方法对于提供关键电网服务是可行的，能够有效地平衡电网需求和 V2G 系统的实际约束。

Abstract: This paper presents a Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) coordination framework using reinforcement learning (RL). {An intelligent control strategy based on the soft actor-critic algorithm is developed for voltage regulation through single and multi-hub charging systems while respecting realistic fleet constraints. A two-phase training approach integrates stability-focused learning with battery-aware deployment to ensure practical feasibility. Simulation studies on the IEEE 34-bus system validate the framework against a standard Volt-Var/Volt-Watt droop controller. Results indicate that the RL agent achieves performance comparable to the baseline control strategy in nominal scenarios. Under aggressive overloading, it provides robust voltage recovery (within 10% of the baseline) while prioritizing fleet availability and state-of-charge preservation, demonstrating the viability of constraint-aware learning for critical grid services.}

</details>


### [600] [Towards Network-Aware Operation of Integrated Energy Systems: A Comprehensive Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07266)
*Alessandra Parisio*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本综述全面分析了集成能源系统（IES）中考虑网络约束和拓扑的建模、优化和控制方法，指出了现有方法的局限性，并提出了未来研究方向，旨在实现可扩展、网络感知的低碳能源系统运行框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市已成为多能源系统，但现有能源网络仍孤立规划和运行，导致效率低下和灵活性未被充分利用。随着分布式能源（DERs）的增长，跨载流子（如电力、热力、燃气）的局部耦合日益增强，因此需要跨载流子和基础设施的协调运行。尽管IES具有提高效率、灵活性和可再生能源整合的潜力，但其运行面临复杂相互依赖、非凸行为和多尺度动力学的挑战。现有研究常常忽视网络约束和拓扑在塑造可行操作区域、影响可扩展性以及处理不确定性和提供正式保证方面的明确作用。

Method: 本文通过对现有文献进行系统性回顾，分析了集成能源系统中“网络感知”（network-aware）的建模、优化和控制方法。研究识别了在可处理性、可行性保证和可扩展性方面的方法论局限性。

Result: 识别出当前IES网络感知建模、优化和控制方法的局限性，主要体现在可处理性（tractability）、可行性保证（feasibility guarantees）和可扩展性（scalability）方面。

Conclusion: 本综述为未来低碳能源系统的可扩展、网络感知运行框架奠定了基础。未来的研究方向应侧重于具有理论保证的分布式优化方法以及受运行数据启发的控制方法。

Abstract: Integrated Energy Systems (IES) are systems of interconnected electricity, gas, heating, and cooling networks, where the carriers interact and depend on one another. Beyond these core vectors, IES may also incorporate additional infrastructures, such as hydrogen, transportation and water networks, whenever sector coupling or cross-vector exchanges are relevant. Although modern cities already function as multi-energy systems, these networks are still planned and operated in isolation, which leads to inefficiencies and unused flexibility. As distributed energy resources (DERs) grow, local coupling among electricity, heating, and gas networks becomes stronger, so coordinated operation across carriers and infrastructures is essential. IES can improve efficiency, flexibility, and renewable integration, yet operation is challenging because of complex interdependencies, non-convex behaviors, and multi-scale dynamics of the energy networks. A key point that the literature often overlooks is the explicit role of network constraints and topology, which shape feasible operating regions, affect scalability, and determine how uncertainty and formal guarantees can be addressed. This review provides a first comprehensive analysis of network-aware modeling, optimization, and control methods for IES. We identify methodological limitations related to tractability, feasibility guarantees, and scalability. Building on these insights, we outline research directions that include distributed optimization with theoretical guarantees and control approaches informed by operational data. The review offers a foundation for scalable, network-aware operational frameworks for future low-carbon energy systems.

</details>


### [601] [Multi-Agentic AI for Conflict-Aware rApp Policy Orchestration in Open RAN](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07375)
*Haiyuan Li,Yulei Wu,Dimitra Simeonidou*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于多智能体AI框架的自动化rApp策略生成和编排方法，利用三个基于LLM的智能体（感知、推理、精炼）结合RAG和类比推理，解决了当前rApp开发手动、脆弱和可扩展性差的问题，实验证明该方法能显著提高部署准确率并降低推理成本，同时具备零样本泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前Open RAN架构中rApp策略的开发过程仍然是手动的、脆弱的且可扩展性差，无法跟上xApp多样性的快速增长。因此，需要一种自动化的解决方案来生成和编排rApp策略。

Method: 提出了一种多智能体AI框架，该框架包含三个专门的大型语言模型（LLM）智能体：感知（Perception）、推理（Reasoning）和精炼（Refinement）。该框架还集成了检索增强生成（RAG）和基于记忆的类比推理技术。这三个智能体协同工作，分析潜在冲突，合成符合意图的控制流水线，并逐步优化部署决策。

Result: 在多种部署场景下的实验表明，提出的系统与基线方法相比，部署准确率提高了70%以上，推理成本降低了95%，并且能够对未知的意图实现零样本泛化。

Conclusion: 该研究成功地建立了一个可扩展且具备冲突意识的解决方案，实现了Open RAN中完全自主、零接触的rApp编排。

Abstract: Open Radio Access Network (RAN) enables flexible, AI-driven control of mobile networks through disaggregated, multi-vendor components. In this architecture, xApps handle real-time functions, whereas rApps in the non-real-time controller generate strategic policies. However, current rApp development remains largely manual, brittle, and poorly scalable as xApp diversity proliferates. In this work, we propose a Multi-Agentic AI framework to automate rApp policy generation and orchestration. The architecture integrates three specialized large language model (LLM)-based agents, Perception, Reasoning, and Refinement, supported by retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and memory-based analogical reasoning. These agents collectively analyze potential conflicts, synthesize intent-aligned control pipelines, and incrementally refine deployment decisions. Experiments across diverse deployment scenarios demonstrate that the proposed system achieves over 70% improvement in deployment accuracy and 95% reduction in reasoning cost compared to baseline methods, while maintaining zero-shot generalization to unseen intents. These results establish a scalable and conflict-aware solution for fully autonomous, zero-touch rApp orchestration in Open RAN.

</details>


### [602] [Machine Learning for the Internet of Underwater Things: From Fundamentals to Implementation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07413)
*Kenechi Omeke,Attai Abubakar,Michael Mollel,Lei Zhang,Qammer H. Abbasi,Muhammad Ali Imran*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本教程综述了机器学习（ML）在水下物联网（IoUT）通信中的应用，重点介绍了监督、无监督、强化和深度学习方法，并分析了它们在不同网络层级上的性能提升，包括物理层、MAC层、网络层和传输层，以及在数据压缩和目标检测等应用层面的优势。该研究回顾了大量现有文献，量化了ML带来的能效、吞吐量和跨层优化等方面的显著改进，同时也指出了当前面临的挑战和未来的研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下物联网（IoUT）面临着声学衰减、长传播延迟、严格的能源限制和动态拓扑等严峻挑战，阻碍了其发展。机器学习（ML）因其数据驱动的特性，被认为是克服这些限制的关键技术，能够提升水下无线传感器网络的性能。

Method: 该研究采用教程综述的方式，系统性地梳理和分析了适用于水下通信环境的四种机器学习范式：监督学习、无监督学习、强化学习和深度学习。文章分析了每种方法的算法原理及其在特定条件下的性能优势，并从物理层到应用层进行了分层分析，同时结合了2012年至2025年间的300项研究。

Result: ML在IoUT的各个层面都带来了显著的性能提升：物理层在定位和信道估计方面获得增益；MAC层改进了信道利用率；网络层路由策略延长了运行寿命；传输层机制可减少高达91%的数据包丢失。应用层方面，ML实现了大幅数据压缩和高达92%的目标检测准确率。研究量化了ML带来的7到29倍的能效提升、吞吐量改进以及高达42%的跨层优化效益。

Conclusion: 机器学习是推动水下物联网发展的强大工具，能够有效克服水下通信的固有挑战并显著提升网络性能。尽管在数据集、计算能力和理论模型与实际部署的差距等方面仍存在挑战，但未来的研究方向和技术路线图将支持ML在实际水下网络中的广泛应用。

Abstract: The Internet of Underwater Things (IoUT) is becoming a critical infrastructure for ocean observation, marine resource management, and climate science. Its development is hindered by severe acoustic attenuation, propagation delays far exceeding those of terrestrial wireless systems, strict energy constraints, and dynamic topologies shaped by ocean currents. Machine learning (ML) has emerged as a key enabler for addressing these limitations, offering data driven mechanisms that enhance performance across all layers of underwater wireless sensor networks. This tutorial survey synthesises ML methodologies supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement, and deep learning specifically contextualised for underwater communication environments. It outlines the algorithmic principles of each paradigm and examines the conditions under which particular approaches deliver superior performance. A layer wise analysis highlights physical layer gains in localisation and channel estimation, MAC layer adaptations that improve channel utilisation, network layer routing strategies that extend operational lifetime, and transport layer mechanisms capable of reducing packet loss by up to 91 percent. At the application layer, ML enables substantial data compression and object detection accuracies reaching 92 percent. Drawing on 300 studies from 2012 to 2025, the survey documents energy efficiency gains of 7 to 29 times, throughput improvements over traditional protocols, and cross layer optimisation benefits of up to 42 percent. It also identifies persistent barriers, including limited datasets, computational constraints, and the gap between theoretical models and real world deployment. The survey concludes with emerging research directions and a technology roadmap supporting ML adoption in operational underwater networks.

</details>


### [603] [IQC-Based Output-Feedback Control of LPV Systems with Time-Varying Input Delays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07453)
*Fen Wu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于具有时变输入延迟的 LPV 系统的 H_无穷输出反馈控制方法，通过参数相关李雅普诺夫函数和动态 IQC 乘子，将问题转化为参数相关的 LMI，并给出了控制器重建公式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 输入延迟是导致控制系统性能下降和不稳定的常见原因，本文旨在解决具有时变输入延迟的 LPV 系统的 H_无穷输出反馈控制问题。

Method: 文章结合了参数相关李雅普诺夫函数和动态 IQC 乘子，利用精确记忆控制器结构，将控制问题转化为参数相关的 LMI，并提供了明确的控制器重建公式。

Result: 所提出的方法能够解决标准输出反馈设计中的非凸性问题，并在性能、保守性和计算效率方面取得显著改进。

Conclusion: 该方法能够有效地处理具有时变输入延迟的 LPV 系统的 H_无穷输出反馈控制问题，并且具有广泛的适用性，通过数值示例进行了验证。

Abstract: Input delays are a common source of performance degradation and instability in control systems. This paper addresses the $\mathcal{H}_\infty$ output-feedback control problem for LPV systems with time-varying input delays under the integral quadratic constraint (IQC) framework. By integrating parameter-dependent Lyapunov functions with dynamic IQC multipliers, we derive convex, delay-dependent synthesis conditions formulated as parameter-dependent LMIs, enabled by the proposed exact-memory controller structure. An explicit controller reconstruction formula is provided to recover the LPV controller from the LMI solution, avoiding the need to specify the functional form of the parameter-dependent controller gains. While the synthesis problem for memoryless control is inherently non-convex, the proposed approach demonstrates significant performance improvement, reduced conservatism, and computational efficiency for standard output-feedback design. Numerical examples illustrate the effectiveness and broad applicability of the method to LPV systems with time-varying input delays.

</details>


### [604] [Inverse-dynamics observer design for a linear single-track vehicle model with distributed tire dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07499)
*Luigi Romano,Ole Morten Aamo,Jan Åslund,Erik Frisk*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合线性单轨模型和轮胎分布式表示的创新型观测器，仅使用偏航率和侧向加速度测量即可估计车辆的侧滑角和轮胎力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了在未知的驾驶场景中提高车辆的安全性和操控性能，需要精确估计车辆的侧滑角和轮胎力。

Method: 采用线性单轨模型，并利用双曲偏微分方程（PDEs）对轮胎进行分布式表示。通过动力学反演，仅使用偏航率和侧向加速度传感器信息来重构集总和分布式的车辆状态。

Result: 仿真结果表明，该观测器在存在噪声和模型不确定性的情况下，能够有效地估计侧滑角和轮胎力。

Conclusion: 该提出的观测器是一种有效的方法，可以仅通过标准传感器测量来估计车辆的关键动态参数，从而提高车辆的安全性。

Abstract: Accurate estimation of the vehicle's sideslip angle and tire forces is essential for enhancing safety and handling performances in unknown driving scenarios. To this end, the present paper proposes an innovative observer that combines a linear single-track model with a distributed representation of the tires and information collected from standard sensors. In particular, by adopting a comprehensive representation of the tires in terms of hyperbolic partial differential equations (PDEs), the proposed estimation strategy exploits dynamical inversion to reconstruct the lumped and distributed vehicle states solely from yaw rate and lateral acceleration measurements. Simulation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the observer in estimating the sideslip angle and tire forces even in the presence of noise and model uncertainties.

</details>


### [605] [VB-NET: A physics-constrained gray-box deep learning framework for modeling air conditioning systems as virtual batteries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07601)
*Yuchen Qi,Ye Guo,Yinliang Xu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为VB-NET的物理约束的灰盒深度学习框架，通过将空调系统建模为虚拟电池，有效解决了参数获取、可解释性和数据稀缺性问题，实现了高精度的状态跟踪和物理参数恢复，并解决了冷启动难题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可再生能源的普及需要释放需求侧灵活性，而空调系统作为重要的热惯性资源，现有模型在参数获取、可解释性和数据稀缺性方面存在不足。

Method: 提出VB-NET，一个物理约束的灰盒深度学习框架。该框架将空调热力学转化为标准化的虚拟电池（VB）模型，并通过数学证明了AC和VB模型的同构等价性。VB-NET通过解耦气象驱动因素和建筑热特性，并嵌入可微分的物理层来强制执行物理定律。利用多任务学习和终端敏感性调制来解决冷启动问题。

Result: VB-NET在状态荷跟踪方面显著优于传统黑盒模型，并成功恢复了底层热力学定律，产生了物理上一致的参数。利用2%到6%的历史数据即可实现新空调设备的高精度建模。

Conclusion: VB-NET提供了一种可解释且数据高效的途径，用于聚合分散的空调资源以进行电网调控。

Abstract: The increasing penetration of renewable energy necessitates unlocking demand-side flexibility. While air conditioning (AC) systems offer significant thermal inertia, existing physical and data-driven models struggle with parameter acquisition, interpretability, and data scarcity. This paper proposes VB-NET, a physics-constrained gray-box deep learning framework that transforms complex AC thermodynamics into a standardized Virtual Battery (VB) model. We first mathematically prove the isomorphic equivalence between the AC and VB models. Subsequently, VB-NET is designed to strictly enforces physical laws by decoupling shared meteorological drivers from private building thermal fingerprints and embedding a differentiable physics layer. Experimental results demonstrate that VB-NET significantly outperforms conventional black-box models in state of charge tracking while successfully recovering underlying thermodynamic laws to yield physically consistent parameters. Furthermore, utilizing multi-task learning and terminal sensitivity modulation, VB-NET overcomes the cold-start dilemma, achieving high-precision modeling for new AC units using only 2% to 6% of historical data. Ultimately, this study provides an interpretable and data-efficient pathway for aggregating decentralized AC resources for grid regulation.

</details>


### [606] [Tunable Input-to-State Safety with Input Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07736)
*Ming Li,Jin Chen,Dimos V. Dimarogonas*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将紧凑型输入约束整合到可调输入到状态安全性（TISSf）框架中的方法，通过状态依赖的半空间约束和支持函数来表征TISSf条件，并推导出可验证的输入兼容性证书，从而为TISSf的调谐函数设计提供了指导，确保了QP安全滤波器的兼容性和可行性，并通过CCC应用验证了其鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有TISSf框架在设计调谐函数时未明确考虑执行器限制，可能导致与输入约束不兼容。本文旨在解决这一问题，提出一个将一般紧凑型输入约束整合到TISSf调谐函数合成中的框架。

Method: 文章采用几何视角，将TISSf条件表征为状态依赖的半空间约束，并利用支持函数推导出可验证的输入兼容性证书。这种表征将兼容性要求转化为调谐函数的设计约束，从而产生一个规定性的下界，定义了在输入约束下的可容许调谐族。研究结果专门应用于范数界限、多面体和盒约束，并给出了易于处理的控制设计条件。此外，还提出了一种使用覆盖采样策略的离线参数选择程序，通过线性规划（LP）来确保整个安全集上的兼容性。

Result: 提出的框架将输入兼容性转化为对调谐函数的具体设计约束，给出了一个可容许调谐的下界。当结合调谐函数的单调性时，这些条件保证了基于二次规划（QP）的安全滤波器的输入兼容性和递归可行性。离线参数选择程序通过LP确保了整个安全集上的兼容性。在连接巡航控制（CCC）应用中，通过设计保证了在TISSf下的鲁棒安全性并强制执行了输入约束。

Conclusion: 本文成功地将一般紧凑型输入约束整合到TISSf框架中，为调谐函数的合成提供了一种新的方法，确保了在执行器限制下的鲁棒安全控制。提出的几何表征和验证方法为实际的控制系统设计提供了理论基础和可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Tunable input-to-state safety (TISSf) generalizes the input-to-state safety (ISSf) framework by incorporating a tuning function that regulates safety conservatism while preserving robustness against perturbations. Despite its flexibility, the TISSf tuning function is often designed without explicitly incorporating actuator limits, which can lead to incompatibility with input constraints. To address this gap, this paper proposes a framework that integrates general compact input constraints into tuning function synthesis. Leveraging a geometric perspective, we characterize the TISSf condition as a state-dependent half-space constraint and derive a verifiable certificate for input compatibility using support functions. This characterization transforms the compatibility requirement into a design constraint on the tuning function, yielding a prescriptive lower bound that defines an admissible family of tunings under input constraints. These results are specialized to norm-bounded, polyhedral, and box constraints, yielding tractable control design conditions. We show that these conditions, combined with tuning function monotonicity, guarantee input compatibility and recursive feasibility of the resulting quadratic program (QP)-based safety filter. Furthermore, an offline parameter selection procedure using a covering-based sampling strategy ensures compatibility across the entire safe set via a linear program (LP). A connected cruise control (CCC) application demonstrates robust safety under TISSf while enforcing input constraints by design.

</details>


### [607] [Robust Cooperative Output Regulation of Discrete-Time Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07783)
*Kursad Metehan Gul,Selahattin Burak Sarsilmaz*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了离散时间不确定异构多智能体系统（MASs）的鲁棒协同输出调控方法。研究表明，问题解决方案的关键在于存在一个结构化控制增益，使得标称闭环系统矩阵 Schur 可约。文章提供了全局和局部（逐代理）的充分条件来设计该增益。全局条件通过结构化 Lyapunov 不等式转化为 LMI 可解性问题。局部条件则让每个代理独立解决一个无结构控制问题，其 LMI 可解性也能保证存在性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在解决离散时间不确定异构多智能体系统的鲁棒协同输出调控问题，并为设计分布式控制律提供理论依据。

Method: 提出了一种基于内部模型的分布式控制律。通过分析闭环系统矩阵的 Schur 可约性，将问题转化为寻找结构化控制增益的问题。提出了基于结构化 Lyapunov 不等式的凸化方法，得到线性矩阵不等式（LMI）作为全局充分条件。同时，也提出了逐代理独立设计的局部充分条件，同样转化为 LMI 问题。

Result: 文章给出了设计结构化控制增益的全局和局部（逐代理）充分条件。全局条件基于 LMI 的可行性，局部条件允许每个代理独立设计其无结构控制增益。最后，分析了全局和局部控制增益集之间的关系。

Conclusion: 离散时间不确定异构MASs的鲁棒协同输出调控问题可以通过寻找特定的结构化控制增益来解决。文章提供了基于LMI的全局和局部（逐代理）设计方法，并探讨了两种方法之间的联系。

Abstract: This article considers robust cooperative output regulation of discrete-time uncertain heterogeneous (in dimension) multi-agent systems (MASs). We show that the solvability of this problem with an internal model-based distributed control law reduces to the existence of a structured control gain that makes the nominal closed-loop system matrix of the MAS Schur. Accordingly, this article focuses on global and agent-wise local sufficient conditions for the existence and design of such a structured control gain. Based on a structured Lyapunov inequality, we present a convexification that yields a linear matrix inequality (LMI), whose feasibility is a global sufficient condition for the existence and design. Considering the individual nominal dynamics of each agent, the existence is also ensured if each agent solves a structure-free control problem. Its convexification yields LMIs that allow each agent to separately design its structure-free control gain. Lastly, we study the relationships between the sets of control gains emerging from both global and local perspectives.

</details>


### [608] [Temperature-Aware Scheduling of LLM Inference in Large-Scale Geo-Distributed Edge Data Centers with Distributed Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07810)
*Arash Khalatbarisoltani,Amin Mahmoudi,Jie Han,Muhammad Saeed,Wenxue Liu,Jinwen Li,Solmaz Kahourzade,Amirmehdi Yazdani,Xiaosong Hu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种温度感知的LLM部署方法，通过考虑数据中心位置的温度差异，优化LLM的能耗、碳排放、响应时间和水消耗，以提高分布式边缘数据中心的整体可持续性和成本效益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM的运行（特别是推理阶段）对数据中心的环境影响日益严重，其碳和水消耗可能超过训练成本。数据中心的冷却能耗受环境温度影响很大，而现有方法往往忽视了这种地理位置差异。

Method: 研究采用一种温度感知的分布式优化方法，利用交替方向乘子法（ADMM）算法，在澳大利亚的地理分布式边缘数据中心进行LLM的部署和管理。该方法旨在联合优化LLM的能耗、碳排放、首个token的响应时间以及水消耗。

Result: 所提出的方法能够显著降低冷却能耗，并提高地理分布式云环境的整体成本效益。

Conclusion: 通过利用地理位置的温度多样性，并采用温度感知的优化策略，可以有效提升LLM部署在分布式边缘数据中心时的可持续性，并降低运营成本。

Abstract: The environmental impact of Large Language Models (LLMs) on data centers hosting these models is becoming a significant concern. While many efforts have focused on reducing the substantial training overhead of LLMs, carbon and water consumption during the inference phase can often surpass the costs associated with their training. The cooling systems of data centers are crucial in this context, but they are frequently modeled with a location-independent efficiency term. However, their energy efficiency is highly influenced by ambient temperature, which can vary significantly across different geographical locations. Leveraging this temperature diversity can help reduce total cooling energy costs and improve the performance of edge data centers. To address these critical sustainability issues related to LLMs, this study proposes a temperature-aware approach that co-optimizes LLM energy costs, carbon emissions, time-to-first token, and water consumption. The approach employs a distributed optimization algorithm based on an alternating direction method of multipliers, aimed at enhancing the sustainability of LLM hosting across geo-distributed edge data centers in Australia. Our method demonstrates reductions in cooling energy consumption and improves overall cost efficiency for geo-distributed cloud environments.

</details>


### [609] [A Curved Monopole Antenna for HF Radar with Enhanced Gain and Bandwidth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07818)
*Masoud Salmani Arani,Reza Shahidi,Lihong Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文设计并模拟了一种新的弯曲单极子天线，优化用于天波高频雷达。通过调整曲率和直线段长度，与传统单极子相比，该天线在阻抗匹配、带宽和增益方面均有提升，并成功应用于12单元阵列，用于超视距雷达。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了提高天波高频雷达的性能，需要一种具有更优阻抗匹配、更宽带宽和更高增益的天线设计，同时要求设计紧凑且可扩展。

Method: 采用系统性的参数分析方法，研究了天线曲率和固定段长度对性能的影响。通过仿真软件进行设计和优化，并将单极子天线扩展为12单元线性阵列，分析了阵列的嵌入单元行为和低到中等仰角增益。

Result: 弯曲单极子天线在15 MHz下比传统单极子具有更优的阻抗匹配、更宽的带宽和更高的增益。优化后的设计实现了18.5%的增益提升和400 kHz的带宽扩展。12单元阵列在θ = 30°下实现了14.04 dBi的增益，比参考阵列（13.11 dBi）提升了24%。

Conclusion: 提出的弯曲单极子天线是一种紧凑、宽带且可扩展的解决方案，适用于下一代高频雷达阵列，能够显著提升天波超视距雷达的性能。

Abstract: This paper presents the design and simulation of a new curved monopole antenna optimized for skywave HF radar applications, with a systematic investigation of the effects of curvature and fixed-section length on antenna performance. The proposed design achieves improved impedance matching, broader bandwidth, and enhanced realized gain compared to a conventional quarter-wavelength monopole at 15 MHz. Parametric analysis shows that fully bending the monopole degrades performance, whereas introducing a straight section and carefully optimizing the curvature enables a 18.5% gain increase and a 400 kHz bandwidth expansion. The single-element design is further extended to a 12-element linear array with 0.45λ spacing (where λ is the wavelength), demonstrating stable embedded-element behavior and improved low-to- moderate elevation gain for skywave over-the-horizon radar operation. At θ = 30°, the proposed array achieves 14.04 dBi compared to 13.11 dBi for the reference array, corresponding to 24% gain enhancement, which is significant in high-power HF radar systems. These results confirm that the proposed curved monopole antenna provides a compact, broadband, and scalable solution for next-generation HF radar arrays.

</details>


### [610] [Leveraging Quantum Annealing for Large-Scale Household Energy Scheduling with Hydrogen Storage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07823)
*Arash Khalatbarisoltani,Amin Mahmoudi,Jie Han,Muhammad Saeed,Wenxue Liu,Jinwen Li,Solmaz Kahourzade,Amirmehdi Yazdani,Xiaosong Hu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种基于量子退火（QA）的模型预测控制（MPC）分层功率分配框架，以加速大规模微电网中氢能系统（燃料电池和电解槽）的复杂优化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大规模微电网中涉及多个燃料电池和电解槽的复杂优化问题（涉及大量二元决策变量）难以快速解决，阻碍了氢能的有效整合。

Method: 采用分层MPC方法，结合量子退火（QA）和传统优化。日调度阶段使用QA确定燃料电池和电解槽的启停；短期调度阶段则优化燃料电池输出功率和电解槽制氢率。

Result: 在包含多个家庭的澳大利亚案例研究中，QA方法在连接家庭数量增加时，相较于传统优化方法，更能有效地在可接受的时间范围内解决问题。

Conclusion: 所提出的分层QA-MPC框架能够有效地加速大规模微电网中氢能系统的功率分配优化问题，尤其是在系统规模增大时，优于传统优化方法。

Abstract: Hydrogen integration into microgrids facilitates the absorption of intermittencies from renewable energy resources. However, significant challenges remain due to complex optimization problems, particularly in large-scale applications involving multiple fuel cells (FCs) and electrolyzers (ELs) with numerous binary decision variables. This paper presents a hierarchical quantum annealing (QA) model predictive control-based power allocation framework aimed at accelerating these optimization problems. First, in a day-ahead stage, the framework determines the startup and shutdown of the FCs and ELs. The short-term stage then refines the output power of the FCs and the hydrogen generation rate of the ELs. The feasibility is evaluated through a case study consisting of multiple households in Australia. Our findings demonstrate that while the traditional optimization approach performs satisfactorily in scenarios with a small number of households, the QA approach becomes more appropriate and effectively solves the problem within an acceptable range as the number of connected households increases.

</details>


### [611] [A Novel Phase-Noise Module for the QUCS Circuit Simulator. Part II : Noise Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07828)
*Torsten Djurhuus,Viktor Krozer*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一个在开源电路仿真器QUCS中实现的、基于统一时域方法的新型相位噪声分析模块，该模块提出了通用的耦合振荡器幅度和相位-幅度相关性响应的闭式表达式，并超越了现有商用EDA的噪声仿真能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了应对现代通信和遥感系统中无处不在的受噪声扰动的自由运行和耦合自治电路的预测、综合和优化需求，开发先进的噪声仿真工具。现有方法（如LTI和LTV理论）存在局限性，作者提出了一种新的、无经验模型限制的统一时域方法。

Method: 基于作者近期提出的（耦合）振荡器噪声响应的严格、统一的时域方法，开发并实现了QUCS仿真环境中的相位噪声分析模块。该方法避免了经验性和现象学建模技术，并引入了新的统一闭式表达式来描述耦合振荡电路的幅度和相位-幅度相关性响应。

Result: 成功实现了QUCS中的相位噪声分析模块，并提出了适用于一般耦合振荡电路的幅度和相位-幅度相关性响应的新的统一闭式表达式。该仿真工具在许多方面超越了当前商业EDA的噪声仿真能力。

Conclusion: 开发的QUCS相位噪声分析模块是一种先进的、基于物理的仿真工具，能够准确预测和优化受噪声影响的振荡电路性能，具有重要的科学和工业应用价值，尤其是在通信和遥感领域。

Abstract: The paper documents the implementation of a novel phase-noise analysis module within the open-source QUCS circuit simulator environment. The underlying algorithm is based on a rigorous, unified time-domain methodology of (coupled) oscillator noise-response, recently proposed by the authors. The theoretical approach used to develop this model is entirely unconstrained by any empirical and/or phenomenological modelling techniques, such as e.g. LTI and LTV theory, and this differentiates it from all prior proposals on this topic. The paper introduces important, and previously unpublished, extensions to this framework, in the form of novel unified closed-form expressions for both the amplitude and phase-amplitude correlation response of a general coupled oscillating circuit perturbed by noise. The research discussed herein has many important scientific and industrial applications w.r.t. predicting, synthesizing and optimizing the performance of noise-perturbed free-running and coupled autonomous circuits operating under large-signal steady-state conditions. These timing circuits are ubiquitous in all modern communication and remote-sensing systems and the developed simulation tools will prove to have great impact in various areas of industrial circuit design. This paper represents second part of a two-part series with the first part discussing the implementation of the underlying steady-state analysis module. The open-source simulator, discussed and developed herein, applies advanced state-of-the-art stochastic modelling techniques, in-order to produce noise simulation tools with capabilities and scope which, in many areas, exceed what is found in the commercial EDAs currently on the market.

</details>


### [612] [Model-Free DRL Control for Power Inverters: From Policy Learning to Real-Time Implementation via Knowledge Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07964)
*Yang Yang,Chenggang Cui,Xitong Niu,Jiaming Liu,Chuanlin Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于策略蒸馏的无模型深度强化学习（DRL）控制框架，用于解决DLR在电力逆变器部署中的控制性能与计算负担之间的权衡问题。该框架通过误差能量引导的混合奖励机制和自适应重要性加权蒸馏，有效压缩DRL策略，同时保持高性能并克服计算瓶颈，实验验证其在瞬态响应速度和鲁棒性方面优于传统方法，并将推理时间缩短至微秒级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习（DRL）在电力逆变器中的应用面临控制性能与计算负担之间的权衡问题，部署受限。无模型DRL易出现收敛不稳定和稳态误差。

Method: 提出一种基于策略蒸馏的无模型控制框架。引入误差能量引导的混合奖励机制来约束探索空间，以解决收敛不稳定和稳态误差问题。集成自适应重要性加权机制到蒸馏架构中，以放大波动区域的显著性，克服稳态数据的主导的观测偏差，高质量地迁移瞬态控制逻辑。该方法将大型DRL策略压缩到轻量级神经网络。

Result: 提出的方法在千瓦级实验平台得到验证。与传统方法相比，推理时间减少到微秒级别，瞬态响应速度和参数鲁棒性均得到提升。

Conclusion: 该框架能够高效地将DRL策略压缩为轻量级神经网络，在保持期望控制性能的同时，克服了部署时的计算瓶颈，显著提升了电力逆变器的控制性能和效率。

Abstract: In response to the trade-off between control performance and computational burden hindering the deployment of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) in power inverters, this paper presents a novel model-free control framework leveraging policy distillation. To handle the convergence instability and steady-state errors inherent in model-free agents, an error energy-guided hybrid reward mechanism is established to theoretically constrain the exploration space. More specifically, an adaptive importance weighting mechanism is integrated into the distillation architecture to amplify the significance of fluctuation regions, ensuring high-quality transfer of transient control logic by mitigating the observational bias dominated by steady-state data. This approach efficiently compresses the heavy DRL policy into a lightweight neural network, retaining the desired control performance while overcoming the computational bottleneck during deployment. The proposed method is validated through a hardware-based kilowatt-level experimental platform. Experimental comparison results with traditional methods demonstrate that the proposed technique reduces inference time to the microsecond level and achieves superior transient response speed and parameter robustness.

</details>


### [613] [Robust control synthesis for uncertain linear systems with input saturation using mixed IQCs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07907)
*Xu Zhang,Fen Wu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于积分二次约束（IQC）的鲁棒控制合成方法，用于处理具有输入饱和的不确定线性系统。该方法通过线性分数表示（LFR）捕捉死区非线性和时变不确定性，并结合混合IQC耗散不等式和二次Lyapunov函数，推导出了鲁棒镇定的充分条件。与仅使用静态扇区条件的传统方法相比，该方法通过使用缩放混合IQC提高了L2增益性能。此外，还开发了一种新的基于IQC表征的缩放有界实引理，用于处理时变结构不确定性。最终的H无穷合成条件被表述为线性矩阵不等式（LMIs），易于数值求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理具有输入饱和和时变不确定性的系统时存在局限性，特别是对于死区非线性，传统的静态扇区条件可能无法充分利用系统信息，导致性能下降。研究者希望开发一种更先进的控制合成方法，以提高鲁棒稳定性和L2增益性能。

Method: 1. 将系统重写为线性分数表示（LFR），以包含死区非线性和时变不确定性。
2. 结合混合IQC（包括死区非线性和时变不确定性）与二次Lyapunov函数，推导鲁棒镇定的充分条件。
3. 开发基于IQC表征的新型缩放有界实引理，以处理时变结构不确定性。
4. 将所得的H无穷合成条件表示为易于数值求解的线性矩阵不等式（LMIs）。

Result: 1. 提出了一种新的鲁棒控制合成方法，能够处理具有输入饱和和时变不确定性的不确定线性系统。
2. 该方法通过使用缩放混合IQC，相比于仅使用静态扇区条件的传统方法，能够获得更好的L2增益性能。
3. 推导出的H无穷合成条件为LMIs，确保了数值求解的可行性。

Conclusion: 本文提出了一种有效的鲁棒控制合成方法，通过IQC框架有效处理了不确定线性系统中的输入饱和和时变不确定性问题，并实现了性能上的改进。该方法通过LMIs形式表达，具有良好的数值计算特性。
