Abstract: This paper develops a robust control synthesis method for uncertain linear systems with input saturation in the framework of integral quadratic constraints (IQCs). The system is reformulated as a linear fractional representation (LFR) that captures both dead-zone nonlinearity and time-varying uncertainties. By combining mixed IQC-based dissipation inequalities with quadratic Lyapunov functions, sufficient conditions for robust stabilization are established. Compared with conventional approaches based on a single static sector condition for the dead-zone nonlinearity, the proposed method yields improved $\mathcal{L}_2$-gain performance through the use of scaled mixed IQCs. For systems subject to time-varying structured uncertainties, a new scaled bounded real lemma is further developed based on the IQC characterization. The resulting $\mathcal{H}_\infty$ synthesis conditions are expressed as linear matrix inequalities (LMIs), which are numerically tractable in all decision variables, including the scaling factors in the IQC multipliers. The proposed method is validated using a second-order uncertain system in linear fractional form, and its superiority over an anti-windup design is further illustrated by a cart-pendulum example.

</details>


### [614] [Distributed Coordination Algorithms with Efficient Communication for Open Multi-Agent Systems with Dynamic Communication Links and Processing Delays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08038)
*Jiaqi Hu,Karl H. Johansson,Apostolos I. Rikos*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了三种适用于开放多智能体系统的分布式量化平均共识算法，解决了动态定向通信链路下的问题，并证明了有限时间收敛的充分必要条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是为了解决开放多智能体系统中，节点动态加入和离开，通信链路不稳定的情况下，如何实现分布式量化平均共识的问题。

Method: 提出了三种分布式算法，分别针对有限网络开放、存在处理延迟和无限网络开放的场景。通过分析算法操作、建立正确性证明，并提出确保有限时间收敛的拓扑条件。

Result: 数值模拟结果表明，所提算法具有快速的有限时间收敛性和鲁棒性，并且在不同网络规模、节点到达/离开率和处理延迟下表现良好，优于现有文献中的算法。

Conclusion: 所提出的三种分布式量化平均共识算法能够有效解决开放多智能体系统中的动态通信和节点开放性问题，并能实现有限时间收敛，在实际应用中具有优势。

Abstract: In this paper we focus on the distributed quantized average consensus problem in open multi-agent systems consisting of dynamic directed communication links among active nodes. We propose three communication-efficient distributed algorithms designed for different scenarios. Our first algorithm solves the quantized averaging problem over the currently active node set under finite network openness (i.e., when the active set eventually stabilizes). Our second algorithm extends the aforementioned approach for the case where nodes suffer from arbitrary bounded processing delays. Our third algorithm operates over indefinitely open multi-agent networks with dynamic communication links (i.e., with continuous node arrivals and departures), computing the average that incorporates both active and historically active nodes. We analyze our algorithms' operation, establish their correctness, and present novel necessary and sufficient topological conditions ensuring their finite-time convergence. Numerical simulations on distributed sensor fusion for environmental monitoring demonstrate fast finite-time convergence and robustness across varying network sizes, departure/arrival rates, and processing delays. Finally, it is shown that our proposed algorithms compare favorably to algorithms in the existing literature.

</details>


### [615] [Trajectory Tracking Control Design for Autonomous Helicopters with Guaranteed Error Bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08045)
*Philipp Schitz,Johann C. Dauer,Paolo Mercorelli*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种基于鲁棒正不变集（RPI）的框架，用于计算自主直升机的轨迹跟踪误差界限。通过将误差动力学转化为多面体LPV形式，计算了轴心RPI集，从而得到明确的位置误差界限，可用作轨迹规划的认证缓冲区。比较了三种控制器架构的保守性与跟踪性能，并通过仿真验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了在自主直升机的轨迹规划和控制中提供形式化的安全保证，需要计算精确且可靠的轨迹跟踪误差界限。

Method: 该方法首先建立闭环平移误差动力学，并将其表示为具有有界扰动的多面体线性参数变化（LPV）形式。然后，计算轴心鲁棒正不变（RPI）集，得到明确的位置误差界限。最后，比较了三种不同的控制器架构在误差界限保守性和跟踪性能方面的表现。

Result: 研究计算出的误差界限可以作为上层轨迹规划的认证缓冲区。仿真结果表明，所有三种控制器架构都满足导出的误差界限。同时，研究也揭示了在不变集计算中，动力学保真度与保守性之间的权衡关系。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了一个系统性的框架，能够计算自主直升机的形式化轨迹跟踪误差界限。所提出的方法能够提供可认证的安全缓冲区，并且可以通过比较不同的控制器架构来优化性能和保守性之间的平衡。

Abstract: This paper presents a systematic framework for computing formally guaranteed trajectory tracking error bounds for autonomous helicopters based on Robust Positive Invariant (RPI) sets. The approach focuses on establishing a closed-loop translational error dynamics which is cast into polytopic linear parameter-varying form with bounded additive and state-dependent disturbances. Ellipsoidal RPI sets are computed, yielding explicit position error bounds suitable as certified buffer zones in upper-level trajectory planning. Three controller architectures are compared with respect to the conservatism of their error bounds and tracking performance. Simulation results on a nonlinear helicopter model demonstrate that all architectures respect the derived bounds, while highlighting trade-offs between dynamical fidelity and conservatism in invariant set computation.

</details>


### [616] [Augmented Model Predictive Control: A Balance between Satellite Agility and Computation Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08078)
*Yiming Wang,Mihindukulasooriya Sheral Crescent Tissera,Haihong Yu,Kai Jie Ethan Foo,Sean Yeo Keyuan,Ankit Srivastava,Hao An*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种增强模型预测控制（MPC）方法，以提高地球观测卫星的敏捷性，同时考虑硬件实现约束，并通过仿真和实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管地球观测卫星的驱动器技术取得了进步，但提高卫星敏捷性的控制策略研究不足。

Method: 对不同的MPC配方进行了比较分析，并引入了一种增强-MPC方法，该方法结合了非线性MPC的高性能和线性MPC的计算简易性。

Result: 所提出的增强-MPC方法在数值模拟和物理实验中均表现出有效性和可行性，能够平衡敏捷性要求和硬件实现约束。

Conclusion: 该增强-MPC方法能够提供高吞吐量和高动态性能，同时保持计算效率，为未来高敏捷性地球观测卫星的设计提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Agile earth observation satellites employ multiple actuators to enable flexible and responsive imaging capabilities. While significant advancements in actuator technology have enhanced satellites' torque and momentum, relatively little attention has been given to control strategies specifically tailored to improve satellite agility. This paper provides a comparative analysis of different Model Predictive Control (MPC) formulations and introduces an augmented-MPC method that effectively balances agility requirements with hardware implementation constraints. The proposed method achieves the high-performance characteristics of nonlinear MPC while preserving the computational simplicity of linear MPC. Numerical simulations and physical experiments are conducted to validate the effectiveness and feasibility of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [617] [Coupling Europe's Capacity Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08248)
*Kamal Adekola,Laurens de Vries,Kenneth Bruninx*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种新的耦合欧洲容量市场设计，利用基于流的市场耦合逻辑，以解决当前孤立的国家容量机制的低效率问题，并减少系统成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 孤立的国家容量机制在高度互联的欧洲电力系统中效率低下，容易导致投资不足或过度，并且未能充分评估互联容量对成员国充足性目标的重要性。

Method: 提出了一种耦合欧洲容量市场的设计概念，并利用基于流的市场耦合逻辑。通过在一个说明性的多区域案例研究中使用定制的长期均衡问题进行比较分析，评估了不同的市场设计场景。

Result: 提出的基于流的容量市场耦合能够减少系统成本，通过利用邻近市场区域的可用容量，并在所有稀缺情况下确保符合网络约束的可送达性。

Conclusion: 与孤立的国家容量机制相比，耦合欧洲容量市场的设计能够更有效地管理充足性风险，提高系统效率，并更合理地利用互联容量。

Abstract: European Member States are increasingly introducing national capacity mechanisms (CMs) to manage growing adequacy risks. However, isolated national CMs are inefficient in highly interconnected electricity systems, such as the European system. While progress has been made in facilitating cross-border participation by generation capacity in CMs, existing arrangements are prone to under- or over-investment and do not properly value the contribution of interconnection capacity to Member States' adequacy targets. In this paper, we propose a novel conceptual design for a coupled European capacity market that utilises the logic of flow-based market coupling. In a comparative analysis of different market design scenarios in an illustrative multi-zone case study, using a bespoke long-run equilibrium problem, we show that the proposed flow-based coupling of capacity markets reduces system costs by harnessing available capacity in neighbouring market zones while ensuring deliverability with respect to network constraints in all scarcity situations.

</details>


### [618] [Adaptive Tracking Control of Euler-Lagrange Systems with Time-Varying State and Input Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08307)
*Poulomee Ghosh,Shubhendu Bhasin*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种自适应控制框架，用于在存在参数不确定性和有界扰动的情况下，对具有用户定义时变状态和输入约束的欧拉-拉格朗日（E-L）系统强制执行约束。该方法集成了时变障碍李雅普诺夫函数（TVBLF）和饱和控制律，无需实时优化即可保证约束满足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究的动机是开发一种能够处理参数不确定性、有界扰动以及用户定义时变状态和输入约束的E-L系统自适应控制器。

Method: 该方法通过集成一个时变障碍李雅普诺夫函数（TVBLF）和一个饱和控制律来实现。此外，论文开发了一个离线可验证的可行性条件，以证明存在一个可行的控制策略。

Result: 证明了所有闭环信号的有界性。提出的方法能够保证约束满足，而无需进行实时优化。通过对2-DoF直升机模型的实时实验验证了该方法的有效性和实际可行性。

Conclusion: 该研究提出了一种新颖的E-L系统自适应控制框架，能够有效处理时变状态和输入约束，同时抵抗不确定性和扰动，并且无需实时优化。该方法的有效性已通过实验得到验证。

Abstract: This paper presents an adaptive control framework for Euler-Lagrange (E-L) systems that enforces user-defined time-varying state and input constraints in the presence of parametric uncertainties and bounded disturbances. The proposed design integrates a time-varying barrier Lyapunov Function (TVBLF) with a saturated control law to guarantee constraint satisfaction without resorting to real-time optimization. A key contribution is the development of an offline, verifiable feasibility condition that certifies the existence of a feasible control policy for any prescribed pair of time-varying state and input envelopes. Additionally, we prove boundedness of all closed-loop signals. Real-time experiments conducted on a 2-DoF helicopter model validate the efficacy and practical viability of the proposed method.

</details>


### [619] [The coordination between TSO and DSO in the context of energy transition - A review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08335)
*Hang Nguyen,Koen Kok,Trung Thai Tran,Phuong H. Nguyen*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文综述了电力系统运营商（TSO/DSO）之间在能源转型背景下的协调方案（CS），分析了其分类、现状、挑战以及如何利用分布式能源（DERs）的灵活性来维持系统平衡和网络无拥塞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 能源转型带来了对化石燃料和二氧化碳排放的依赖性降低，但同时也给系统运营商带来了能量系统集成、减少不确定性和激励客户等技术挑战，TSO/DSO之间的协调是应对这些挑战的关键。

Method: 本文通过对现有协调方案（CS）进行分类、评估现状和分析实际应用中的挑战，并提出一个描述运营商和第三方在提供平衡市场服务时交互作用的通用场景，对比了有协调和无协调的情况。

Result: 文章提供了多种协调方案及其利用灵活性服务的可能性，并分析了它们的优缺点，旨在找到TSO/DSOs最有效地利用灵活性资源以维持系统平衡并避免网络拥塞的方法。

Conclusion: TSO/DSO之间的有效协调对于整合分布式能源、利用灵活性资源以及在能源转型期间维护电力系统的稳定性和可靠性至关重要。

Abstract: Nowadays, energy transition is ongoing in many countries, aiming to reduce dependence on fossil fuels and CO2 emissions. Besides the positive impacts on the environment, this transition brings technical challenges to the system operators, such as the intricacies of energy system integration, diminishing uncertainty, and incentivizing customers with advanced transaction models. The coordination between the Transmission system operator (TSO) and the Distribution system operator (DSO) is one of the most important aspects of encountering these obstacles. This coordination enhances the utilization of flexibility from Distributed energy resources (DERs) by incentivizing the market parties with better willingness to pay schemes. This paper provides an overview of the coordination schemes (CS), their classification, assessment of the current situation and the challenges associated with applying these schemes in practical context. The main purpose is to investigate the most effective way for TSO/DSOs to use the flexibility resource to maintain the balancing of the entire system while ensuring no congestion occurs in the network. A broad range of possible coordination schemes along with exploiting flexibility services is presented and the pros and cons are analyzed. Additionally, the study presents a general scenario that describes the interaction between the operators and the third party in providing service to the balancing market, considering cases with and without coordination.

</details>


### [620] [Eigenvalue Patterns and Participation Analysis of Symmetric Renewable Energy Power Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08351)
*Yao Qin,Yitong Li,Wei Wang,Shaoze Zhou,Zheng Wei,Jinjun Liu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种分析含大量逆变器并网发电单元（IBRs）的大规模电力系统动力学的方法，特别关注具有对称性的可再生能源系统。通过区分内群模态和群-电网模态，并引入群参与因子，可以简化模态分析，并为系统稳定性分析和优化提供指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模电力系统集成大量IBRs导致系统状态急剧增加，给传统的模态分析带来挑战。然而，可再生能源系统常包含多个同质发电机组，这种对称性可用于简化分析。

Method: 研究了理想对称、准对称和群对称三种对称可再生能源系统的特征值模式和参与因子。定义了描述组内子系统相互作用的内群模态和描述组与外部电网相互作用的群-电网模态。提出群参与因子来扩展传统参与因子的应用。分析了内群模态和群-电网模态的不变性。

Result: 内群模态和群-电网模态的提出，能够有效表征不同类型的模态相互作用。群参与因子能够处理重复和接近的模态。理论分析得到了数值结果和电磁瞬态（EMT）仿真的验证。

Conclusion: 在对称可再生能源系统中，通过分析内群模态和群-电网模态，并利用群参与因子，可以更有效地进行系统稳定性分析和有针对性的优化，为处理大规模IBR系统提供了新的视角。

Abstract: State-space analysis is widely employed for examining power system dynamics but faces challenges in large-scale power systems integrated with numerous inverter-based resources (IBRs), where the significant increase of system states complicates modal analysis. Notably, renewable energy power systems often consist of multiple homogeneous generation units. This uniformity, termed symmetry in this paper, can facilitate the system stability analysis. Eigenvalue patterns and participation factors in three types of symmetric renewable energy power systems are investigated, including ideally-, quasi-, and group-symmetric systems. An ideally-symmetric (quasi-symmetric) system comprises a group of identical (similar) subsystems connected to an external grid. A system containing multiple such groups is termed group-symmetric. In these symmetric systems, two types of modes are defined to characterize different interactions: inner-group modes, which describe the interactions among subsystems within a single group, and group-grid modes, which describe the interactions between the groups and the external grid. A new concept termed group participation factor is also proposed to extend the use of conventional participation factors for repeated and close modes. In addition, the invariance properties of the inner-group modes and group-grid modes are discussed. The findings provide insights for stability analysis and targeted optimization in power systems. Theoretical advances are validated through numerical results and electromagnetic transient (EMT) simulations on example power systems of varied types and scales.

</details>


### [621] [Integrating Lagrangian Neural Networks into the Dyna Framework for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08468)
*Shreya Das,Kundan Kumar,Muhammad Iqbal,Outi Savolainen,Dominik Baumann,Laura Ruotsalainen,Simo Särkkä*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种结合拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）的基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）框架，以提高模型动力学的准确性，并使用两种优化器训练LNN。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的基于黑盒模型的MBRL方法在处理与训练数据分布不同的数据时，由于模型不符合物理定律而容易产生不准确的预测。研究者希望通过引入遵守物理定律的LNN来解决这个问题。

Method: 作者将拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）整合到一个基于Dyna的MBRL框架中。LNN通过强制执行潜在的拉格朗日结构来学习模型动力学。此外，研究者采用了基于随机梯度和基于状态估计的两种优化器来训练LNN。

Result: 实验结果表明，基于状态估计的优化器在训练神经网络时比基于随机梯度的优化器收敛更快。所提出的基于LNN的Dyna框架在MBRL任务中是有效的。

Conclusion: 拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）能够提高MBRL中动力学模型的准确性，尤其是在处理分布外数据时。结合Dyna框架和LNN，可以构建一个更鲁棒和高效的MBRL系统。基于状态估计的优化器在LNN训练中显示出更快的收敛速度。

Abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) is sample-efficient but depends on the accuracy of the learned dynamics, which are often modeled using black-box methods that do not adhere to physical laws. Those methods tend to produce inaccurate predictions when presented with data that differ from the original training set. In this work, we employ Lagrangian neural networks (LNNs), which enforce an underlying Lagrangian structure to train the model within a Dyna-based MBRL framework. Furthermore, we train the LNN using stochastic gradient-based and state-estimation-based optimizers to learn the network's weights. The state-estimation-based method converges faster than the stochastic gradient-based method during neural network training. Simulation results are provided to illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed LNN-based Dyna framework for MBRL.

</details>


### [622] [Behavioral Generative Agents for Power Dispatch and Auction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08477)
*Shaoze Li,Justin S. Kim,Cong Chen*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本研究提出使用大型语言模型（LLM）作为生成式代理，以更灵活的方式模拟人类在电力调度和拍卖中的决策过程，并展示了其潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的数学模型在模拟人类在电力调度和拍卖等复杂场景下的决策时可能过于僵化，研究者希望探索更具弹性和表现力的模型。

Method: 设计了两个概念验证的能源实验：1) 在包含随机电价和停电干预的家庭电池管理测试台中，将LLM代理与动态规划进行基准测试，并使用上下文学习（ICL）模块迁移行为模式。2) 在电力网络接入的同时上升拍卖（SAA）中，比较LLM代理与优化基准（直接竞标策略）的行为，并通过ICL提示引入规则、短视和战略性目标。

Result: 在电池管理实验中，ICL使LLM代理能够优先考虑停电后的能源储备而非短期利润。在SAA实验中，结构化提示结合ICL使LLM代理能够复制经济理性策略，并展现出系统性的行为偏差。

Conclusion: 基于LLM的生成式代理为模拟人类在电力系统应用中的决策提供了一个灵活且富有表现力的测试平台，能够捕捉到传统模型难以显示的复杂行为。

Abstract: This paper presents positive initial evidence that generative agents can relax the rigidity of traditional mathematical models for human decision-making in power dispatch and auction settings. We design two proof-of-concept energy experiments with generative agents powered by a large language model (LLM). First, we construct a home battery management testbed with stochastic electricity prices and blackout interventions, and benchmark LLM decisions against dynamic programming. By incorporating an in-context learning (ICL) module, we show that behavioral patterns discovered by a stronger reasoning model can be transferred to a smaller LLM via example-based prompting, leading agents to prioritize post-blackout energy reserves over short-term profit. Second, we study LLM agents in simultaneous ascending auctions (SAA) for power network access, comparing their behavior with an optimization benchmark, the straightforward bidding strategy. By designing ICL prompts with rule-based, myopic, and strategic objectives, we find that structured prompting combined with ICL enables LLM agents to both reproduce economically rational strategies and exhibit systematic behavioral deviations. Overall, these results suggest that LLM-powered agents provide a flexible and expressive testbed for modeling human decision-making in power system applications.

</details>


### [623] [Input Dexterity and Output Negotiation in Feedback-Linearizable Nonlinear Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08480)
*Mirko Mizzoni,Pieter van Goor,Barbara Bazzana,Antonio Franchi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于非线性系统输入-输出反馈线性化框架下的执行器输入分类方法（基本、冗余、灵巧），并展示了如何利用灵巧输入实现任务降级和统一的线性化控制器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有输入-输出反馈线性化框架在处理具有冗余执行器或需要执行器灵活性的非线性系统时存在局限性，缺乏对不同输入作用的系统性分类和利用方法。

Method: 1. 提出任务相关的执行器输入分类：基本输入（必需）、冗余输入（可移除）、灵巧输入（可停用且不影响线性化）。2. 证明了灵巧输入与动态延长（flat-input complement）的关系。3. 提出一种能够根据灵巧输入的激活/停用情况，在不同任务维度之间无瞬态切换的统一线性化控制器。

Result: 1. 成功对执行器输入进行了分类。2. 证明了灵巧输入的数学特性。3. 提出了一种可在全维度和降维任务间平滑切换的控制器。4. 通过对六自由度飞行平台的仿真，展示了在停用侧向力通道时，任务可以从姿态跟踪优雅地降级。

Conclusion: 该研究为理解和控制具有冗余执行器的非线性系统提供了一个新的视角，其提出的分类方法和统一控制器有助于提高系统的灵活性和鲁棒性，尤其是在需要动态调整任务复杂度的应用中。

Abstract: We introduce a task-relative taxonomy of actuator inputs for nonlinear systems within the input-output feedback-linearization framework. Given a flat output specifying the task, inputs are classified as essential, redundant, or dexterity: essential inputs are required for exact linearization, redundant inputs can be removed without effect, and dexterity inputs can be deactivated while preserving exact linearization of a reduced task. We show that a subset is dexterity if and only if, under a suitable dynamic prolongation, it can appear as additional output channels (flat-input complement) on a common validity set. Whenever a family of systems obtained by (de)activating dexterity inputs admits a common prolongation, the family can be interpreted as a single prolonged system endowed with different output selections. This enables a unified linearizing controller that negotiates between full and reduced tasks without transients on shared outputs under compatibility and dwell-time conditions. Simulations on a fully actuated aerial platform illustrate graceful task downgrades from six-dimensional pose tracking as lateral-force channels are deactivated.

</details>


### [624] [Carbon-aware Market Participation for Building Energy Management Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08654)
*Young-ho Cho,Mohamad Chehade,Fatima Al-Janahi,Sol Lim,Javad Mohammadi,Hao Zhu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种碳感知能源管理系统（CAEMS），能够实时协同优化电网购电、储能和灵活需求，以在经济效益和减少碳排放之间取得平衡，并在PJM市场的模拟中取得了显著成效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的能源管理系统（EMS）主要关注经济效益，忽视了运营决策对环境的影响，而应对气候变化需要电力系统的深度脱碳。因此，迫切需要一种能够同时考虑经济性和环境影响的EMS。

Method: 提出了一种统一的、实时建筑级别的碳感知EMS（CAEMS），通过混合整数线性规划（MILP）模型直接将时变边际碳强度信号整合到EMS目标函数中，实现日内（DA）和实时（RT）市场的协同优化。为了处理预测不确定性，采用模型预测控制（MPC）扩展，并结合基于Transformer的预测器联合预测电价和碳强度。

Result: 使用PJM电力市场的真实数据进行模拟，结果表明，即使在中等碳价格下，CAEMS也能实现22.5%的显著减排，同时成本仅增加1.7%。

Conclusion: 所提出的碳感知EMS（CAEMS）能够有效地在实时运行中协同优化电网购电、储能和灵活需求，在不显著增加成本的情况下大幅减少电力系统的碳排放，为实现电力系统的脱碳目标提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Tackling climate change requires the rapid and deep decarbonization of electric power systems. While energy management systems (EMSs) play a central role in this transition, conventional EMSs focus mainly on economic efficiency and often overlook the environmental impact of operational decisions. To address this gap, this paper proposes a unified, real-time building-level carbon-aware EMS (CAEMS) capable of simultaneously co-optimizing grid imports, energy storage, and flexible demand within a single integrated framework. We formulate a mixed-integer linear program (MILP) model that directly integrates time-varying marginal carbon intensity signals into the EMS objective for coordinated participation in both day-ahead (DA) and real-time (RT) markets. To relax the unrealistic assumption of perfect foresight, we incorporate a model predictive control (MPC) extension driven by a Transformer-based forecaster that jointly predicts electricity prices and carbon intensity. The proposed CAEMS is validated using real-world data from the PJM electricity market. Simulation results demonstrate that modest carbon prices can achieve a significant 22.5% reduction in emissions with only a 1.7% increase in cost.

</details>


### [625] [Reachability-based Temporal Logic Verification for Reliable LLM-guided Human-Autonomy Teaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08633)
*Joonwon Choi,Kartik Anand Pant,Karthik Nune,Inseok Hwang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一个基于可达性分析的框架，利用LLM将自然语言指令转换为STL规范，并通过STL可达性过滤器（SFF）验证其可行性，以实现可靠的人机自主协作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了实现更可靠的人机自主协作（HAT），需要一种能够安全有效地处理自然语言指令并进行可行性验证的机制。

Method: 利用LLM作为翻译器，将自然语言指令转换为STL规范；提出STL可达性过滤器（SFF）分解STL，并对子公式进行可达性分析以验证其可行性；如果可行则进行任务规划，否则拒绝并生成反馈信息。 

Result: SFF能够成功过滤掉不可行的子公式，并生成有信息量的反馈，而不仅仅是布尔验证结果。实验证明了该框架在过滤不可行公式和生成反馈方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于可达性分析的LLM-STL框架能够实现更可靠的人机自主协作，通过安全且信息丰富的通信，使LLM能够请求人类修改指令，从而提高系统的整体可靠性。

Abstract: We propose a reachability-based framework for reliable LLM-guided human-autonomy teaming (HAT) using signal temporal logic (STL). In the proposed framework, LLM is leveraged as a translator that transfers natural language commands given by a human operator into corresponding STL specifications or vice versa. An STL feasibility filter (SFF) is proposed to check the feasibility of the generated STL. The SFF first decomposes the complex and nested LLM translation into a set of simpler subformulas for parallelization and informative feedback generation. The reachability analysis method is then applied to verify if each subformula is feasible for a target dynamical system: if feasible, perform mission planning, otherwise, reject it. The proposed SFF can identify infeasible subformulas, more than simply providing the boolean verification results for the whole STL, thereby facilitating the feedback generation of LLM to request modification of the command to the human. Consequently, the proposed framework can allow more reliable HAT by enabling safe and informative communication between the human operator and the autonomous agent. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework can successfully filter out infeasible subformulas and generate informative feedback based on such information.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [626] [Skill-Evolving Grounded Reasoning for Free-Text Promptable 3D Medical Image Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08215)
*Tongrui Zhang,Chenhui Wang,Yongming Li,Zhihao Chen,Xufeng Zhan,Hongming Shan*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为SEER的新框架，用于通过显式连接语言变化和解剖学精确度来改进自由文本可提示的3D医学图像分割。它通过SEER-Trace数据集、基于证据的目标表示和SEER-Loop的动态技能演进策略来实现这一点，从而提高了对不同语言表达的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自由文本可提示3D医学图像分割方法对语言变化非常敏感，细微的措辞变化可能导致性能大幅下降，即使临床意图相同。现有方法试图通过更强的视觉-语言融合或更大的词汇量来提高鲁棒性，但缺乏将模糊的自由表达与解剖学基础表示持续对齐的机制。

Method: 1. 建立SEER-Trace数据集，该数据集将原始临床请求与图像驱动的、带有技能标签的推理轨迹配对。2. SEER构建了一个证据对齐的目标表示，通过一个视觉-语言推理链，根据图像衍生的解剖学证据验证临床意图，从而在体素级解码之前强制执行语义一致性。3. 引入SEER-Loop，一种动态的技能演进策略，将高回报的推理轨迹提炼成可重用的技能构件，并逐步将其整合到后续的推理中。

Result: SEER在自由文本可提示的3D医学图像分割任务上展现出优于最先进基线方法的性能。在语言扰动下，SEER将性能方差降低了81.94%，并将最差情况下的Dice分数提高了18.60%。

Conclusion: SEER框架通过其推理驱动的设计，显式地弥合了语言变化与解剖学精确度之间的差距，从而实现了对自由文本提示的3D医学图像分割的鲁棒性改进，并能够处理各种语言表达。

Abstract: Free-text promptable 3D medical image segmentation offers an intuitive and clinically flexible interaction paradigm. However, current methods are highly sensitive to linguistic variability: minor changes in phrasing can cause substantial performance degradation despite identical clinical intent. Existing approaches attempt to improve robustness through stronger vision-language fusion or larger vocabularies, yet they lack mechanisms to consistently align ambiguous free-form expressions with anatomically grounded representations. We propose Skill-Evolving grounded Reasoning (SEER), a novel framework for free-text promptable 3D medical image segmentation that explicitly bridges linguistic variability and anatomical precision through a reasoning-driven design. First, we curate the SEER-Trace dataset, which pairs raw clinical requests with image-grounded, skill-tagged reasoning traces, establishing a reproducible benchmark. Second, SEER constructs an evidence-aligned target representation via a vision-language reasoning chain that verifies clinical intent against image-derived anatomical evidence, thereby enforcing semantic consistency before voxel-level decoding. Third, we introduce SEER-Loop, a dynamic skill-evolving strategy that distills high-reward reasoning trajectories into reusable skill artifacts and progressively integrates them into subsequent inference, enabling structured self-refinement and improved robustness to diverse linguistic expressions. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior performance of SEER over state-of-the-art baselines. Under linguistic perturbations, SEER reduces performance variance by 81.94% and improves worst-case Dice by 18.60%.

</details>


### [627] [HiDE: Hierarchical Dictionary-Based Entropy Modeling for Learned Image Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06766)
*Haoxuan Xiong,Yuanyuan Xu,Kun Zhu,Yiming Wang,Baoliu Ye*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为HiDE的分层字典熵模型，用于学习图像压缩，该模型通过结构化的外部先验利用和上下文感知的参数估计，显著提高了压缩性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习图像压缩方法主要利用内部上下文，未充分利用大规模训练数据中的丰富外部先验。现有的基于字典的熵模型存在外部先验利用不平衡和表示能力有限的问题。

Method: 提出HiDE框架，将外部先验分解为全局结构和局部细节字典，并采用级联检索。引入上下文感知的参数估计器，采用并行多感受野设计，以自适应地利用异构上下文进行条件概率估计。

Result: 在Kodak、CLIC和Tecnick数据集上，HiDE相较于VTM-12.1分别实现了18.5%、21.99%和24.01%的BD-rate节省。

Conclusion: HiDE通过分层字典和上下文感知的参数估计，能够更有效地利用外部先验，从而在学习图像压缩中获得优越的性能。

Abstract: Learned image compression (LIC) has achieved remarkable coding efficiency, where entropy modeling plays a pivotal role in minimizing bitrate through informative priors. Existing methods predominantly exploit internal contexts within the input image, yet the rich external priors embedded in large-scale training data remain largely underutilized. Recent advances in dictionary-based entropy models have demonstrated that incorporating external priors can substantially enhance compression performance. However, current approaches organize heterogeneous external priors within a single-level dictionary, resulting in imbalanced utilization and limited representational capacity. Moreover, effective entropy modeling requires not only expressive priors but also a parameter estimation network capable of interpreting them. To address these challenges, we propose HiDE, a Hierarchical Dictionary-based Entropy modeling framework for learned image compression. HiDE decomposes external priors into global structural and local detail dictionaries with cascaded retrieval, enabling structured and efficient utilization of external information. Moreover, a context-aware parameter estimator with parallel multi-receptive-field design is introduced to adaptively exploit heterogeneous contexts for accurate conditional probability estimation. Experimental results show that HiDE achieves 18.5%, 21.99%, and 24.01% BD-rate savings over VTM-12.1 on the Kodak, CLIC, and Tecnick datasets, respectively.

</details>


### [628] [3-D Near-Field Passive Radar Imaging Using Multiple Illumination Sources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08217)
*Quanfeng Wang,Mei Song Tong,Thomas F. Eibert*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种结合多发射天线进行近场无源雷达成像的方法，通过多视角照明和相干累加来提高成像性能，尤其适用于复杂目标，并通过仿真和测量验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有近场无源雷达成像方法在处理具有凹陷结构（如二面角）的复杂目标时，容易受到未照明区域和多重反射伪影的影响。作者希望通过结合不同发射天线位置的成像结果来提升成像质量，克服这些限制。

Method: 采用多发射天线（Tx）在不同位置进行近场无源雷达成像。对于每种照明配置，使用单频逆源求解器重建目标等效源，生成单频图像。然后，对不同配置下获得的单频图像进行相干累加，并应用相应的相位和幅度校正方法。最后，将得到的多频图像进行相干组合，以提高成像质量。

Result: 通过仿真和实际测量结果表明，所提出的多发射天线协同成像方法能够有效地减少未照明区域，抑制伪影，并提高复杂目标的成像质量。该方法特别有利于成像具有凹陷结构的物体。

Conclusion: 结合不同发射天线位置的成像结果，并通过相干累加和校正技术进行融合，是提升近场无源雷达成像性能的有效途径，尤其适用于复杂目标的成像。

Abstract: Near-field (NF) passive radar imaging depends on the illumination of the imaging scene by a non-cooperative transmitter (Tx). It is demonstrated that combining imaging results obtained with Tx antennas at different positions can enhance the performance of passive radar imaging. On the one hand, multiple Tx antennas provide diverse illumination perspectives, reducing the likelihood of unilluminated regions on the targets of interest (TOIs). On the other hand, the coherent summation of imaging results obtained for different illuminations helps to suppress potential artifacts. This approach is in particular advantageous for imaging complex objects with concave structures such as dihedral arrangements, where the ghosts due to multiple reflections are highly configuration-dependent. For each illuminating configuration, a single-frequency inverse source solver is utilized to reconstruct the equivalent sources of the TOIs and the resulting single-frequency images are then superimposed coherently with corresponding phase and magnitude correction methods. The obtained multi-frequency images are finally coherently combined to enhance the imaging quality. Both simulation and measurement results are presented to validate the effectiveness of the approach.

</details>


### [629] [Rectified flow-based prediction of post-treatment brain MRI from pre-radiotherapy priors for patients with glioma](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08385)
*Selena Huisman,Nordin Belkacemi,Vera Keil,Joost Verhoeff,Szabolcs David*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种基于AI的条件化多模态图像生成模型，用于生成脑肿瘤患者治疗后的随访MRI图像，并集成了治疗信息，能够实现比DDPM快250倍的推理速度，为治疗优化和个性化预测提供了可能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑肿瘤平均导致20年的生命损失。标准疗法会引起复杂的脑部结构变化，需要通过MRI监测。AI在条件化多模态图像生成方面的最新进展，促使研究者探索AI生成脑肿瘤患者治疗后MRI的可能性，以优化治疗。

Method: 使用SAILOR公共数据集（25名患者），构建了一个2D的受限流模型（Rectified Flow model），该模型以治疗前MRI的轴向切片和RT剂量图作为条件。利用交叉注意力机制整合了时间信息和化疗数据。使用SSIM、PSNR、Dice系数和Jacobian行列式对生成的图像进行验证。

Result: 该模型能够生成任何时间点的逼真随访MRI，并整合治疗信息。与真实图像相比，预测图像的SSIM为0.88，PSNR为22.82。真实MRI与预测MRI的组织分割平均Dice系数为0.91。该受限流模型比DDPM的推理速度快250倍。

Conclusion: 所提出的模型能够实时生成逼真的随访MRI，同时保持语义和视觉保真度，这已通过图像质量指标和组织分割得到证实。条件化生成模型允许通过改变治疗参数进行反事实模拟，产生预测的形态学变化。这种能力有潜力支持脑肿瘤患者的适应性治疗剂量规划和个性化预后预测。

Abstract: Purpose/Objective: Brain tumors result in 20 years of lost life on average. Standard therapies induce complex structural changes in the brain that are monitored through MRI. Recent developments in artificial intelligence (AI) enable conditional multimodal image generation from clinical data. In this study, we investigate AI-driven generation of follow-up MRI in patients with in- tracranial tumors through conditional image generation. This approach enables realistic modeling of post-radiotherapy changes, allowing for treatment optimization. Material/Methods: The public SAILOR dataset of 25 patients was used to create a 2D rectified flow model conditioned on axial slices of pre-treatment MRI and RT dose maps. Cross-attention conditioning was used to incorporate temporal and chemotherapy data. The resulting images were validated with structural similarity index measure (SSIM), peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR), Dice scores and Jacobian determinants. Results: The resulting model generates realistic follow-up MRI for any time point, while integrating treatment information. Comparing real versus predicted images, SSIM is 0.88, and PSNR is 22.82. Tissue segmentations from real versus predicted MRI result in a mean Dice-Sørensen coefficient (DSC) of 0.91. The rectified flow (RF) model enables up to 250x faster inference than Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPM). Conclusion: The proposed model generates realistic follow-up MRI in real-time, preserving both semantic and visual fidelity as confirmed by image quality metrics and tissue segmentations. Conditional generation allows counterfactual simulations by varying treatment parameters, producing predicted morphological changes. This capability has potential to support adaptive treatment dose planning and personalized outcome prediction for patients with intracranial tumors.

</details>


### [630] [Subclass Classification of Gliomas Using MRI Fusion Technique](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.18775)
*Kiranmayee Janardhan,Christy Bobby Thomas*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种融合多模态MRI（T1、T2、T1ce、FLAIR）图像的方法，用于提高胶质瘤亚型的分类准确性，并取得了99.25%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 胶质瘤的精确分类对治疗规划和预后预测至关重要，现有方法在分类准确性方面有待提高。

Method: 使用BraTS数据集的MRI图像，通过2D和3D UNET分割坏死核心、瘤周水肿和增强肿瘤区域，然后使用加权平均技术融合这些分割结果，并将融合后的图像输入预训练的ResNet50模型进行胶质瘤亚型分类。

Result: 该方法在分类准确性、精确率、召回率、F1分数、IoU和特异性方面均取得了优异的性能，准确率达到99.25%，显著优于现有技术。

Conclusion: 融合多模态MRI图像的分割和分类方法对于提高胶质瘤诊断的准确性具有重要意义。

Abstract: Glioma, the prevalent primary brain tumor, exhibits diverse aggressiveness levels and prognoses. Precise classification of glioma is paramount for treatment planning and predicting prognosis. This study aims to develop an algorithm to fuse the MRI images from T1, T2, T1ce, and fluid-attenuated inversion recovery (FLAIR) sequences to enhance the efficacy of glioma subclass classification as no tumor, necrotic core, peritumoral edema, and enhancing tumor. The MRI images from BraTS datasets were used in this work. The images were pre-processed using max-min normalization to ensure consistency in pixel intensity values across different images. The segmentation of the necrotic core, peritumoral edema, and enhancing tumor was performed on 2D and 3D images separately using UNET architecture. Further, the segmented regions from multimodal MRI images were fused using the weighted averaging technique. Integrating 2D and 3D segmented outputs enhances classification accuracy by capturing detailed features like tumor shape, boundaries, and intensity distribution in slices, while also providing a comprehensive view of spatial extent, shape, texture, and localization within the brain volume. The fused images were used as input to the pre-trained ResNet50 model for glioma subclass classification. The network is trained on 80% and validated on 20% of the data. The proposed method achieved a classification of accuracy of 99.25%, precision of 99.30%, recall of 99.10, F1 score of 99.19%, Intersection Over Union of 84.49%, and specificity of 99.76, which showed a significantly higher performance than existing techniques. These findings emphasize the significance of glioma segmentation and classification in aiding accurate diagnosis.

</details>


### [631] [Deep Learning-Based Approach for Automatic 2D and 3D MRI Segmentation of Gliomas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.19760)
*Kiranmayee Janardhan,Christy Bobby T*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种结合2D和3D卷积的改进型U-Net模型，用于提高脑胶质瘤分割的准确性和计算效率，并在BraTS数据集上取得了优异的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手动分割脑肿瘤耗时且易出错，而现有的2D卷积模型无法充分利用体积影像的空间信息，3D卷积模型计算成本高。因此，需要一种既能兼顾计算效率又能保证空间精度的模型。

Method: 研究人员基于U-Net架构，并结合了Inception和ResNet模型，开发了2D和3D卷积模型。模型在BraTS 2018、2019和2020数据集上进行了训练和评估。

Result: ResNet模型在3D分割中达到98.91%的准确率，在2D分割中达到99.77%的准确率。2D和3D分割的Dice分数分别为0.8312和0.9888。所提出的方法在胶质瘤分割方面显示出优越的潜力。

Conclusion: 本研究提出的模型在脑胶质瘤分割任务上取得了显著成效，有效平衡了计算效率和空间精度。该模型具有泛化能力，可应用于其他医学影像分析任务，辅助医生进行脑肿瘤诊断。

Abstract: Brain tumor diagnosis is a challenging task for clinicians in the modern world. Among the major reasons for cancer-related death is the brain tumor. Gliomas, a category of central nervous system (CNS) tumors, encompass diverse subregions. For accurate diagnosis of brain tumors, precise segmentation of brain images and quantitative analysis are required. A fully automatic approach to glioma segmentation is required because the manual segmentation process is laborious, prone to mistakes, as well as time-consuming. Modern techniques for segmenting gliomas are based on fully convolutional neural networks (FCNs), which can either use two-dimensional (2D) or three-dimensional (3D) convolutions. Nevertheless, 3D convolutions suffer from computational costs and memory demand, while 2D convolutions cannot fully utilize the spatial insights of volumetric clinical imaging data. To obtain an optimal solution, it is vital to balance the computational efficiency of 2D convolutions along with the spatial accuracy of 3D convolutions. This balance can potentially be realized by developing an advanced model to overcome these challenges. The 2D and 3D models implemented here are based on UNET architecture, Inception, and ResNet models. The research work has been implemented on the BraTS 2018, 2019, and 2020 datasets. The best performer of all the models' evaluations metrics for proposed methodologies offer superior potential in terms of the effective segmentation of gliomas. The ResNet model has resulted in 98.91% accuracy for 3D segmentation and 99.77 for 2D segmentations. The dice scores for 2D and 3D segmentations are 0.8312 and 0.9888, respectively. This model can be applied to various other medical applications with fine-tuning, thereby aiding clinicians in brain tumor analysis and improving the diagnosis process effectively.

</details>
